Raphael Warnock (D) and turn Georgia red.**

After experts at CNN named Raphael the most vulnerable Senate Democrat up for reelection, Mitch McConnell and his shady dark-money PACs made him their TOP target for defeat.

Now, they've MASSIVELY outspent Raphael on the airwaves with misleading attack ads to smear his record, turn Georgia red and retake Senate control for McConnell.

Raphael is the moral warrior Democrats need to keep Georgia blue, defend our Senate majority and pass our progressive agenda. But with national Republicans pulling out all the stops to defeat him, we need to fight back NOW, or these attacks could leave a major mark.

**That's why we set a $75,000 grassroots-response goal to fight back against the surge in GOP spending and win this race. But with time running out before our midnight deadline, we're still falling dangerously short.**

subject: Libertarian Perspectives on the End in Afghanistan
body:
Amidst the bombardment of establishment outrage at all of the fallout
from the end of the war in Afghanistan, it can be easy be swayed to a
momentary emotional response and lose sight of what so many of us have
known for so long: The war in Afghanistan, l

Is this email not displaying correctly? View it in your browser.
[https://d2ag3jdu89hmr4.cloudfront.net/browser_preview/q63IZ2arkd_j6ujX]

[Dennis Misigoy for US Senate 2022 (FL)]
[https://d2ag3jdu89hmr4.cloudfront.net/link_click/q63IZ2arkd_j6ujX/f0de483ff319bf9e5be8048aa75b22b6]

Good Afternoon ,

Amidst the bombardment of establishment outrage at all of the fallout
from the end of the war in AFGHANISTAN, it can be easy be swayed to a
momentary emotional response and lose sight of what so many of us have
known for so long: The war in Afghanistan, like all of the wars that
the US is currently engaged in, are worse than a mistake. They are a
manifestation of misguided, defective policy that is doomed to fail no
matter the amount of time, money, and manpower that is devoted to
accomplishing their goal.

To that point, I wanted to share with you, not only some of my
thoughts, which I posted on my site a bit over a week ago here
[https://d2ag3jdu89hmr4.cloudfront.net/link_click/q63IZ2arkd_j6ujX/f0a9649c1bd7d1c5a2eee3abe6b78359],
but a couple of other Libertarian perspectives. It's important for us
to recognize that as bad as the withdrawal was,

and inevitably always would be, continuing the war there would be
worse.

While the media fixates on tragedies occurring on the ground today and
many war mongers call for action to combat human rights abuses, it is
important to remember two things: First is their relative silence over
tragic losses of countless lives & more in Afghanistan over the last
two decades, and the second is that war is not an antidote to human
rights abuses, especially not the type of war that the US has waged
across the Muslim world over the last twenty years. This article from
Hannah Cox at FEE does a great job of explaining it.
[https://d2ag3jdu89hmr4.cloudfront.net/link_click/q63IZ2arkd_j6ujX/8f553c6c48aff3489dafcc8cdfc0c87e]

It's also important for all of us to realize that the removal of US
forces from Afghanistan doesn't represent an actual change in American
foreign policy. The same world views and ideas that justified this,
the longest war in American history, are still held by the
overwhelming majority of our elected officials in Washington, DC, and
they're not planning on changing their views. We still have a lot of
work to do, so it's important to not allow the media and politicians
to limit our focus to this one time and place. To that end, I
encourage you to also watch this rather prescient interview with Scott
Horton back in July.
[https://d2ag3jdu89hmr4.cloudfront.net/link_click/q63IZ2arkd_j6ujX/324a381bba1ed3869acbeb30190a74c7]

I'm sending you this because I don't want to allow the establishment
to own the narrative at this critical time. You are the most important
advocate for peace & liberty.

Sincerely,

_-DENNIS MISIGOY_

You are receiving this email because you signed up for our list or
have your email on a Florida Voter Registration.

[Visit Our Site]
[https://d2ag3jdu89hmr4.cloudfront.net/link_click/q63IZ2arkd_j6ujX/38612c84841e0d3086ec11c588e196f7]

VISIT US ON SOCIAL MEDIA:

[Facebook icon]
[https://d2ag3jdu89hmr4.cloudfront.net/link_click/q63IZ2arkd_j6ujX/7a2cd0a9618908c4d4067e2e25e65031]

[https://d2ag3jdu89hmr4.cloudfront.net/link_click/q63IZ2arkd_j6ujX/c13a4cb1451fc917bed274280a72080d]

[Twitter icon]
[https://d2ag3jdu89hmr4.cloudfront.net/link_click/q63IZ2arkd_j6ujX/73bf7c67053fb474c7bea130a1e01e29]

[https://d2ag3jdu89hmr4.cloudfront.net/link_click/q63IZ2arkd_j6ujX/e890b81d2313be5676d6fbea484911fb]

[Instagram icon]
[https://d2ag3jdu89hmr4.cloudfront.net/link_click/q63IZ2arkd_j6ujX/4cfc7d157e4e1618dfa03eeb58d9c118]

name: Steve Chabot
subject: Ending Endless Wars?
body:
No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-trlkodd-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trlkodd-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trlkodd-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [Ending Endless Wars?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trlkodd-kujkulhluu-j/)
Joe Biden claims he just got us out of an "endless war." The problem is, one's enemy gets a vote. He also promised he wouldn't pull the troops until all American civilians and our allies were out. He lied. Read about it in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trlkodd-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trlkodd-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [Should Biden Step Down?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trlkodd-kujkulhluu-d/)
Joe Biden is directly responsible for the worst foreign policy blunder in American history. And this is but the latest in a series of critical missteps. Is it time for him to consider stepping aside? Read about it in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trlkodd-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trlkodd-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [A Debacle of Epic Proportions](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trlkodd-kujkulhluu-u/)
Although people may disagree on whether or not it was time to exit Afghanistan, very few think this was the way to do it. Read about it in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trlkodd-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trlkodd-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [Love it or Leave it](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trlkodd-kujkulhluu-n/)
Are you sick of people criticizing America? Yet people keep trying to get in, not out of our country. And the guy responsible for keeping illegal aliens out, isn't doing his job. Maybe he ought to be impeached. You can read about it in this week's blog. name: =?utf-8?Q?Joe=20Kent?=
subject: Trump Endorsed Me
body:
Dear Fellow Patriot,

Today I was endorsed by President Trump. My campaign earned this endorsement by demonstrating that we were the America First candidate who could win this district because of our impressive ground-game, impressive local endorsements, non-stop national media campaign, and because people like you made contributions that proved we are viable.

Take a moment to read his endorsement here: https://www.joekentforcongress.com/trumpendorsed.

I could not be more honored and am more convinced than ever that we will defeat my America Last opponent and Trump Impeachment Voter Jaime Herrera Beutler.

Will you show President Trump that his endorsement matters to you by making a contribution today at https://www.joekentforcongress.com/trumpendorsed

I cannot wait to get to Washington to start fighting to secure our borders, investigate the 2020 election and restore voter integrity, and hold the generals and politicians who have failed us so badly in Afghanistan accountable.

Please help to send me there with a donation today at https://www.joekentforcongress.com/trumpendorsed.

Respectfully,

Joe Kent

name: Roger Misso
subject: What we owe the 800,000 veterans of Afghanistan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
body:
Peter,

The war in Afghanistan is over. Spanning a generation - our nation's longest conflict - it was a war that lasted too long, cost too much, and was largely ignored by most of the country. It wasn't until the harrowing events and sacrifices of the last three weeks - during our withdrawal - that American attention refocused on our presence there.

800,000 Americans served with honor and dignity in Afghanistan. They represented our country with pride. Now, they are home. [_**What do we owe them?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/RH2K19zHFnYoNNSPi83f1iDNwOPsBem6F6FSQeeJpG4=/B8iRripHI6ibJSeArpoeHutXziyhna8IBXs2yj_rv1k=)

A nation worthy of the sacrifices of the past 20 years must commit to not making the same mistakes that befell us in Afghanistan ever again. No more open-ended AUMFs. No more going to war before accounting for veterans care. No more making promises we are not prepared to keep.

At [_**Taking the Hill**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/RH2K19zHFnYoNNSPi83f1iDNwOPsBem6F6FSQeeJpG4=/B8iRripHI6ibJSeArpoeHutXziyhna8IBXs2yj_rv1k=) , we believe in supporting and electing the next generation of veteran leadership to Congress. We identify, develop, and equip veterans of integrity - including many Afghanistan veterans - to serve their House and Senate districts with honor. We believe that this is the best way to ensure our country doesn't make the same mistakes again.

But we've got our work cut out for us. There have never been fewer veterans in Congress than there are right now, and it shows. [_**We need to raise $10,000 before Labor Day to keep our candidates on the right track for the rest of the year. Can you chip in today to help us?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/RH2K19zHFnYoNNSPi83f1iDNwOPsBem6F6FSQeeJpG4=/B8iRripHI6ibJSeArpoeHutXziyhna8IBXs2yj_rv1k=)

We may have left Afghanistan. But the lessons learned there must never leave us. [_**Join me in supporting veterans and military family members of integrity for Congress.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/RH2K19zHFnYoNNSPi83f1iDNwOPsBem6F6FSQeeJpG4=/B8iRripHI6ibJSeArpoeHutXziyhna8IBXs2yj_rv1k=)

Yours in service,
Roger

_Roger Misso_
_Executive Director_
_Taking the Hill_
[_@RogerMissoCNY_](https://act.myngp.com/el/RH2K19zHFnYoNNSPi83f1iDNwOPsBem6F6FSQeeJpG4=/KaENg-lvmuc5Ggw01UG8EIe7f7t__ocAX08cj_XG7Uk=)

To make a contribution, [click here](https://act.myngp.com/el/RH2K19zHFnYoNNSPi83f1iDNwOPsBem6F6FSQeeJpG4=/CZD37XN8tMe3CzdvLz53MuxMfJpjCFFjuzBeuzTKmKI= "https://act.myngp.com/el/RH2K19zHFnYoNNSPi83f1iDNwOPsBem6F6FSQeeJpG4=/CZD37XN8tMe3CzdvLz53MuxMfJpjCFFjuzBeuzTKmKI=").
Checks may be mailed to:
Taking the Hill PAC

Bristol, PA 19007

name: Ben Shapiro
subject: The Violent College Left
body:
Peter, Insidious leftist ideology has taken hold of our educational system. It's never been more important that we expose it, because the Left has lit an ideological fire, and that fire is now consuming the minds of young Americans, burning itself through the most aspects of American culture and politics. That's why it's of utmost importance that I hear back from you today. I'm no stranger to the authoritarian attitudes on campus; I famously felt the brunt of it when conservative students invited me to speak on the University of California, Berkeley campus. Radical leftist groups like Antifa vowed to riot and cause harm to others. The fear of violence from leftist agitators was so great that:
* It cost $600,000 in security expenses and required hundreds of policemen to ensure that agitators didn't disrupt or try to cause violence at my speech.
* The University shut down six buildings on campus during my speech and erected concrete barricades (YES, a wall) to secure the Berkeley campus.
* For the first time in 20 years, the City of Berkeley voted to allow the use of pepper spray against violent protesters.
* In the end, police arrested nine leftists for trying to sneak banned weapons into our event--with the likely intent to do harm.

It's no longer just about the Left trying to suppress your conservative views on campus. It's about using the threat of violence to silence the conservative values you and I share. Meanwhile, schools roll out the red carpet for leftists like Angela Davis, Bill Ayers, Barack Obama, Bill Clinton, and Bernie Sanders. At Berkeley, taxpayer-funded school administrators tried to derail my event from even taking place. They told me that they didn't have a lecture hall available, which was a lie. School administrators even cut the venue in half by not allowing students to sit in the balcony--a dirty tactic to minimize attendance. _**The good news is the radical Left 's attempts to silence me completely backfired.**_**** More than 600 students showed up, and we were able to host an engaging and civil event. Then, OVER 10 MILLION PEOPLE watched my speech online (that's more viewers than any of the major evening newscasts). This victory for the Conservative Movement would have never happened if it weren't for the **Young America 's Foundation** **(YAF)**. When Berkeley tried to illegally block me from coming to campus, YAF sued the university --**and won.** But the radicals who rioted and tried to incite violence at Berkeley are relentless. Their stranglehold on America's universities has not yet been broken. **Young America 's Foundation** has been an incredible partner in making sure I am able to share our conservative values with students on campuses across the country. In fact, I speak on campuses **_exclusively_** through YAF because I know YAF has the experience and leadership necessary to run the nation's leading campus lecture program. Today YAF needs your help. **[Will you contribute $35 today to ensure that YAF can continue to present speakers, including Dr. Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich, Senator Ted Cruz, and many others to high school and college students? Without you, the mission to pass along our conservative values to future generations will stall out.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58237279:J-IaxT2SN:m:1:3253819041:D760AD90E96EF9FC2EEC614770D1A3D7:r)** Let me tell you a little bit more about what YAF does to advance conservative ideas. Speaking to an audience of Young America's Foundation students, Vice President Mike Pence noted, "Since its founding in 1960, YAF has been a bulwark of American greatness." YAF valiantly defends the values we share by educating impressionable young people who have been ideologically poisoned by leftist propaganda for decades, by the very teachers and professors they're told to trust. YAF's team is the best at what they do. They are _**#1: the LARGEST and MOST effective conservative youth outreach organization in America**._ Here's why:
* YAF introduces young audiences to the biggest names in the Conservative Movement through their leading campus lecture program. YAF speakers are the most inspiring conservative voices in America, including **Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich,** YAF's Ronald Reagan Presidential Scholar and Vice President **Mike Pence, Dinesh D 'Souza, Lila Rose, Steve Forbes, **Lt. Col.**Allen West** , Speaker**Newt Gingrich, Michael Knowles, Dana Loesch, James O 'Keefe, **NFL star and Congressman **Burgess Owens, Star Parker,** Fox News's**Jesse Watters,** and many others.
* YAF teaches **_millions of students_ **across the nation YOUR conservative values through breakthrough conferences, training seminars, and campus activism initiatives and activities. (In fact, YAF is the only Conservative Movement organization that has a full suite of conservative educational programs for high school students!)
* And YAF preserves and protects President Reagan's ranch in Santa Barbara, California and Boyhood Home in Dixon, Illinois. They saved these national treasures so young people can learn about Ronald Reagan's lasting accomplishments.

_No other organization reaches conservative students with foundational American ideas on a bigger scale than Young America 's Foundation._ _That 's why I prefer YAF to be my sole sponsor for campus events._ They fight for the right to ensure alternative voices are heard on college campuses. They stop campuses from being turned into Leftist echo chambers. I am glad I have YAF on my side and the side of the students. But YAF can't do this alone. As the Left continues to stoop to desperate new lows to silence conservatives, it's become more important than ever that our values are shared with the next generation of thought leaders. We both know that the Left doesn't want a fair discussion of ideas. But that's why YAF needs your help today. At any moment, a scheduled event could get shut down by campus radicals or administrators, and the YAF team must be ready to engage them on a moment's notice. [**Will you contribute $35 or more today so that YAF 's rapid response team will always be ready to leap into action the next time leftists decide to shut down free speech and deprive students of the chance to hear your conservative ideas?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58237279:J-IaxT2SN:m:1:3253819041:D760AD90E96EF9FC2EEC614770D1A3D7:r) Peter, a donation of $35 or whatever you choose does more than you know. The impact amplifying conservative voices will have on the future of our country can't be overstated. I cannot encourage you enough to consider giving to YAF today. Partnering with YAF today is our opportunity to win a generation that values freedom. I can't think of a better investment. Ronald Reagan stated, "There is no better way to establish hope for the future than to enlighten young minds." I look forward to hearing back from you. -Ben Ben Shapiro [**Will you support Young America 's Foundation with a contribution of $35, $50, $100, or even $1000 today, to save this generation by presenting conservative ideas to students across the country?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58237279:J-IaxT2SN:m:1:3253819041:D760AD90E96EF9FC2EEC614770D1A3D7:r) [**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58237279:J-IaxT2SN:m:1:3253819041:D760AD90E96EF9FC2EEC614770D1A3D7:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58237279:J-IaxT2SN:m:1:3253819041:D760AD90E96EF9FC2EEC614770D1A3D7:r) | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58237280:J-IaxT2SN:m:1:3253819041:D760AD90E96EF9FC2EEC614770D1A3D7:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58237281:J-IaxT2SN:m:1:3253819041:D760AD90E96EF9FC2EEC614770D1A3D7:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58237282:J-IaxT2SN:m:1:3253819041:D760AD90E96EF9FC2EEC614770D1A3D7:r)

clean_body: Peter, Insidious leftist ideology has taken hold of our educational system. It's never been more important that we expose it, because the Left has lit an ideological fire, and that fire is now consuming the minds of young Americans, burning itself through the most aspects of American culture and politics. That's why it's of utmost importance that I hear back from you today. I'm no stranger to the authoritarian attitudes on campus; I famously felt the brunt of it when conservative students invited me to speak on the University of California, Berkeley campus. Radical leftist groups like Antifa vowed to riot and cause harm to others. The fear of violence from leftist agitators was so great that: It cost $600,000 in security expenses and required hundreds of policemen to ensure that agitators didn't disrupt or try to cause violence at my speech. The University shut down six buildings on campus during my speech and erected concrete barricades (YES, a wall) to secure the Berkeley campus. For the first time in 20 years, the City of Berkeley voted to allow the use of pepper spray against violent protesters. In the end, police arrested nine leftists for trying to sneak banned weapons into our event--with the likely intent to do harm. It's no longer just about the Left trying to suppress your conservative views on campus. It's about using the threat of violence to silence the conservative values you and I share. Meanwhile, schools roll out the red carpet for leftists like Angela Davis, Bill Ayers, Barack Obama, Bill Clinton, and Bernie Sanders. At Berkeley, taxpayer-funded school administrators tried to derail my event from even taking place. They told me that they didn't have a lecture hall available, which was a lie. School administrators even cut the venue in half by not allowing students to sit in the balcony--a dirty tactic to minimize attendance. The good news is the radical Left 's attempts to silence me completely backfired.** More than 600 students showed up, and we were able to host an engaging and civil event. Then, OVER 10 MILLION PEOPLE watched my speech online (that's more viewers than any of the major evening newscasts). This victory for the Conservative Movement would have never happened if it weren't for the Young America 's Foundation (YAF). When Berkeley tried to illegally block me from coming to campus, YAF sued the university --and won. But the radicals who rioted and tried to incite violence at Berkeley are relentless. Their stranglehold on America's universities has not yet been broken. Young America 's Foundation has been an incredible partner in making sure I am able to share our conservative values with students on campuses across the country. In fact, I speak on campuses exclusively through YAF because I know YAF has the experience and leadership necessary to run the nation's leading campus lecture program. Today YAF needs your help. Let me tell you a little bit more about what YAF does to advance conservative ideas. Speaking to an audience of Young America's Foundation students, Vice President Mike Pence noted, "Since its founding in 1960, YAF has been a bulwark of American greatness." YAF valiantly defends the values we share by educating impressionable young people who have been ideologically poisoned by leftist propaganda for decades, by the very teachers and professors they're told to trust. YAF's team is the best at what they do. They are #1: the LARGEST and MOST effective conservative youth outreach organization in America. Here's why: YAF introduces young audiences to the biggest names in the Conservative Movement through their leading campus lecture program. YAF speakers are the most inspiring conservative voices in America, including Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich, YAF's Ronald Reagan Presidential Scholar and Vice President Mike Pence, Dinesh D 'Souza, Lila Rose, Steve Forbes, Lt. Col.Allen West , SpeakerNewt Gingrich, Michael Knowles, Dana Loesch, James O 'Keefe, NFL star and Congressman Burgess Owens, Star Parker, Fox News'sJesse Watters, and many others. YAF teaches millions of students across the nation YOUR conservative values through breakthrough conferences, training seminars, and campus activism initiatives and activities. (In fact, YAF is the only Conservative Movement organization that has a full suite of conservative educational programs for high school students!) And YAF preserves and protects President Reagan's ranch in Santa Barbara, California and Boyhood Home in Dixon, Illinois. They saved these national treasures so young people can learn about Ronald Reagan's lasting accomplishments. No other organization reaches conservative students with foundational American ideas on a bigger scale than Young America 's Foundation. That 's why I prefer YAF to be my sole sponsor for campus events. They fight for the right to ensure alternative voices are heard on college campuses. They stop campuses from being turned into Leftist echo chambers. I am glad I have YAF on my side and the side of the students. But YAF can't do this alone. As the Left continues to stoop to desperate new lows to silence conservatives, it's become more important than ever that our values are shared with the next generation of thought leaders. We both know that the Left doesn't want a fair discussion of ideas. But that's why YAF needs your help today. At any moment, a scheduled event could get shut down by campus radicals or administrators, and the YAF team must be ready to engage them on a moment's notice. Peter, a donation of $35 or whatever you choose does more than you know. The impact amplifying conservative voices will have on the future of our country can't be overstated. I cannot encourage you enough to consider giving to YAF today. Partnering with YAF today is our opportunity to win a generation that values freedom. I can't think of a better investment. Ronald Reagan stated, "There is no better way to establish hope for the future than to enlighten young minds." I look forward to hearing back from you. -Ben Ben Shapiro | | | | ---|---|--- 11480 Commerce Park Dr, 6th Floor Reston, VA 20191-1556 This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system March 29, 2021. name: Rob Ortt
subject: A personal note from Leader Rob Ortt
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ORTT FOR STATE SENATE
body:
I am asking you to join me in supporting Congressman Lee Zeldin to be the next Governor of New York.
---
| | | | | | |
---
---
| |
---
| A personal note from Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt
---
|
---
| Friend,
The future of our state is in jeopardy.
One-party rule in Albany has transformed New York into a place where the needs of violent criminals are put ahead of hardworking families and children in communities across our state. And while Andrew Cuomo has finally resigned in disgrace, the corrupt culture he fostered is alive and well in our state capital.
As Leader of the Senate Republican Conference, I fight everyday to give families a voice, support our farms and small businesses, protect our freedoms, defend our law enforcement officers and provide a bright future for the next generation of New Yorkers. Unfortunately, the corrupt leadership under one-party rule is standing in the way of these goals.
To save our state, we need new leadership in Albany.
That is why I am proud to endorse Lee Zeldin to be the next Governor of the State of New York.
Like me, Lee volunteered to serve his country by joining the US Army. He returned home to fight for the future of New York in Albany and in Washington, while raising twin girls - Mikayla and Arianna - with his wife, Diana, on Long Island.
Lee Zeldin has a proven record fighting for New Yorkers. He's lowered taxes for families and small businesses. He has enacted important policies like the PFC Joseph P. Dwyer Program, a statewide program aiding veterans struggling with PTSD, and opening a new health care clinic for disabled veterans.
Lee has a strong record supporting safe communities. He supports a repeal of the pro-criminal bail reform laws and vows to support and protect the men and women who keep our communities safe. He won't stand idly by while Democrats try to defund and disarm our law enforcement.
New York needs a battle-tested leader like Lee Zeldin who understands the challenges of families and communities across New York.
[I am asking you to join me in supporting Congressman Lee Zeldin to be the next Governor of New York. ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001uo3RiYmkRSGs_U_cwvI0AZC0s51hQQ17XMUxuEyE95Z2uVm7VMG0sT8Su62bvm3ubna7ryFzE0w9PgHzquYg7JkCFgC6fYwPlV8zkKOEy-GxZq7r-OmMSCnQCbBkEf-yrzX5B2Bxs1nNCHJNP7jdA0WFoY7Ir2zZg12m-7XFbuS1NmGcv9yGn7gwcLyGwlmQQnOSaOWn025eI9_fox1JBA==&c=FhGy4I-eap7GL-ID9boT3qbfi4FXqe4M_kz5ZV4V0koCrnCmpTkUug==&ch=6lt7x-V70h6lU-p0Om7TfP2BiO8V-fHKAQHHCPUL_KCXuf7AYuGuzA==)
---
| | | [MAKE A CONTRIBUTION TO SUPPORT OUR NEXT GOVERNOR HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001uo3RiYmkRSGs_U_cwvI0AZC0s51hQQ17XMUxuEyE95Z2uVm7VMG0sT8Su62bvm3ubna7ryFzE0w9PgHzquYg7JkCFgC6fYwPlV8zkKOEy-GxZq7r-OmMSCnQCbBkEf-yrzX5B2Bxs1nNCHJNP7jdA0WFoY7Ir2zZg12m-7XFbuS1NmGcv9yGn7gwcLyGwlmQQnOSaOWn025eI9_fox1JBA==&c=FhGy4I-eap7GL-ID9boT3qbfi4FXqe4M_kz5ZV4V0koCrnCmpTkUug==&ch=6lt7x-V70h6lU-p0Om7TfP2BiO8V-fHKAQHHCPUL_KCXuf7AYuGuzA==)

clean_body: I am asking you to join me in supporting Congressman Lee Zeldin to be the next Governor of New York. | | | | | | | | | | A personal note from Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt | | Friend, The future of our state is in jeopardy. One-party rule in Albany has transformed New York into a place where the needs of violent criminals are put ahead of hardworking families and children in communities across our state. And while Andrew Cuomo has finally resigned in disgrace, the corrupt culture he fostered is alive and well in our state capital. As Leader of the Senate Republican Conference, I fight everyday to give families a voice, support our farms and small businesses, protect our freedoms, defend our law enforcement officers and provide a bright future for the next generation of New Yorkers. Unfortunately, the corrupt leadership under one-party rule is standing in the way of these goals. To save our state, we need new leadership in Albany. That is why I am proud to endorse Lee Zeldin to be the next Governor of the State of New York. Like me, Lee volunteered to serve his country by joining the US Army. He returned home to fight for the future of New York in Albany and in Washington, while raising twin girls - Mikayla and Arianna - with his wife, Diana, on Long Island. Lee Zeldin has a proven record fighting for New Yorkers. He's lowered taxes for families and small businesses. He has enacted important policies like the PFC Joseph P. Dwyer Program, a statewide program aiding veterans struggling with PTSD, and opening a new health care clinic for disabled veterans. Lee has a strong record supporting safe communities. He supports a repeal of the pro-criminal bail reform laws and vows to support and protect the men and women who keep our communities safe. He won't stand idly by while Democrats try to defund and disarm our law enforcement. New York needs a battle-tested leader like Lee Zeldin who understands the challenges of families and communities across New York. == | | | == | Saving our state won't be easy, but the mission is worth the challenge. == God bless, | | Rob Ortt Senate Republican Leader | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | | SENATE REPUBLICAN LEADER ROB ORTT == | == == | | | | LEE ZELDIN IS A MEMBER OF THE U.S. ARMY RESERVE. name: Team Greitens
subject: POLITICO highlights Greitens, says 'Senate is about to get even more Trumpy'
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for U
body:
POLITICO points to Missouri GOP frontrunner Eric Greitens as the poster child for the incoming class of pro-MAGA senators.
---
| | | | | |
---
| POLITICO Highlights Former Missouri Governor Eric Greitens, Says 'Senate is About to Get Even More Trumpy'
---
| Missouri GOP frontrunner & former Governor Eric Greitens was featured as the poster child for the incoming class of pro-MAGA senators in a recent POLITICO story:
> If Senate Republicans seem conservative now, just wait until next year.
> The 2022 midterms could usher in a wave of full-spectrum MAGA supporters who would turn the GOP conference an even deeper shade of red -- and make the Senate a lot more like the House.
> In the five states where Republican senators are retiring, the midterm elections could usher in a wave of hardliners who are nothing like their GOP predecessors.
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gxOG_RQnI_TFREDkpWrEmVYL2UwMuscdg_ga4j7bTf5jcfM4RCpnlN5T6QmKWhoF6Kqm2HQ6P326ql8ie5wRyQhjOiU26sHiL_etqb-BrzTbrRyGHcxtQBMyQseXbmTEoTpzNxKoHlDmCbZ5MvgGlDz3RoOSQUruUaAY4QeBCxUNsCyFSHcja2V5ZFk2RwfITefxm3qR3CEkRQgrBIKxhCiiQ52vQtg6dCa2PfR8RgiLm_dwBdHe-hWCyo4UMUP4a2D_4yFbxfc=&c=0R99Fxq5wgUGNXdeMD7a2EkBo_opd8CtejsgKRm67RrkZvWgpFq36w==&ch=wj5ywgCCp1zm8riefBK8EU30EV1rfriQdAdTJxn4xWhuBuzSzi5JGQ==)
---
|
> Greitens, the Republican primary frontrunner, made it clear in a [March radio interview](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gxOG_RQnI_TFREDkpWrEmVYL2UwMuscdg_ga4j7bTf5jcfM4RCpnlN5T6QmKWhoF5LEBgJOt9Dyj4BKkkpn0EWgYM_QH9GXPPmRIr0DK_CG15lbfk5ZwkpY_rE0ZtANAhHkni4gLVM-6odz_dPsODNbCfzDZ4C8L1Izq0N-I7VUe2ANqNjhlmmSld_DwZjOBghXwEpVrDi6CtCrsoGIundIKsmQ0VxuU&c=0R99Fxq5wgUGNXdeMD7a2EkBo_opd8CtejsgKRm67RrkZvWgpFq36w==&ch=wj5ywgCCp1zm8riefBK8EU30EV1rfriQdAdTJxn4xWhuBuzSzi5JGQ==) that he has no intention of following in the footsteps of Blunt, a deal-maker and close McConnell ally.
> This morning, [New Yorker Magazine](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gxOG_RQnI_TFREDkpWrEmVYL2UwMuscdg_ga4j7bTf5jcfM4RCpnlN5T6QmKWhoFZHUWCv42Uoymcd16TlRZSbgXU9H8Fm8beTq7isN8wKkZ_WO014wFbMO9CXFnFhhhttiqOPXVPu6C1acYX2zs647S_-wYKjBtyZruOxpSO2uDFPSQVfiU5F-calTfI6qbjbPTsXGZ94gljhuTBUxLIwQ-_9vt_24RivEre6K88c7VMbahRVedvIio2vpEmofM&c=0R99Fxq5wgUGNXdeMD7a2EkBo_opd8CtejsgKRm67RrkZvWgpFq36w==&ch=wj5ywgCCp1zm8riefBK8EU30EV1rfriQdAdTJxn4xWhuBuzSzi5JGQ==) cited Greitens as one example of the prospective next class of US Senators, arguing that the 2022 midterms could give the Senate a "MAGA Makeover."
This follows [a poll from President Trump's pollster that found Greitens holds a nearly 40 point lead](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gxOG_RQnI_TFREDkpWrEmVYL2UwMuscdg_ga4j7bTf5jcfM4RCpnlB25MdR0avaAz-G3lb_CeBxEvvwfxhJODzVkfNJZhrujNF14tsq8ZAIW-EwgCKrcnUNDnnlwjuD0ZPMv95ypQu8dkrk2DqD_U5DSW3C4_cRTnXcw0aV9Sb8D__5ToDeZnClm0rGpFyUrliG1xcNFGYvWm0Bfe4ti9EOSEe0eglLrupFejdvujTaSLHc-9aOk0PiDb8z-w591YfCacOVfzds=&c=0R99Fxq5wgUGNXdeMD7a2EkBo_opd8CtejsgKRm67RrkZvWgpFq36w==&ch=wj5ywgCCp1zm8riefBK8EU30EV1rfriQdAdTJxn4xWhuBuzSzi5JGQ==) in the contest to replace Blunt.
---
|
---

clean_body: POLITICO points to Missouri GOP frontrunner Eric Greitens as the poster child for the incoming class of pro-MAGA senators. | | | | | | | POLITICO Highlights Former Missouri Governor Eric Greitens, Says 'Senate is About to Get Even More Trumpy' | Missouri GOP frontrunner & former Governor Eric Greitens was featured as the poster child for the incoming class of pro-MAGA senators in a recent POLITICO story: If Senate Republicans seem conservative now, just wait until next year. The 2022 midterms could usher in a wave of full-spectrum MAGA supporters who would turn the GOP conference an even deeper shade of red -- and make the Senate a lot more like the House. In the five states where Republican senators are retiring, the midterm elections could usher in a wave of hardliners who are nothing like their GOP predecessors. | == | Greitens, the Republican primary frontrunner, made it clear in a == that he has no intention of following in the footsteps of Blunt, a deal-maker and close McConnell ally. This morning, == cited Greitens as one example of the prospective next class of US Senators, arguing that the 2022 midterms could give the Senate a "MAGA Makeover." This follows == in the contest to replace Blunt. | | == | | | | FOLLOW US == == == == | | | | Paid for by Greitens for U.S. Senate | PO Box 989, Chesterfield, MO 63006 | | | Sent by mailto:press@ericgreitens.com powered by

name: Rep. Vincent Dixie
subject: Tennessee is next. Re: Texas’ dangerous ban on women’s rights.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tennessee House Democratic Caucus, Jesse Chism Treasurer
body:
We must protect women and their rights.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35093421/304013402/-361920907?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODcxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2U1NWVlOC1mOTBiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d0pd4XHv_sIQ2Lirxig7pew9mvBW8-X4HL-nSlD14ag=#)
Dear Peter,
You’ve probably heard the news. The Supreme Court allowed a dangerous and unconstitutional law to ban a woman’s right to terminate a pregnancy. This law was created by the GOP supermajority in Texas’ legislature and bans abortion after 6 weeks (many women don’t even know they are pregnant at this time.) The ban includes no exemptions for rape and incest.
**Tennessee’s GOP supermajority in the House has already tried to pass similarly scary and harmful laws. Their attempts have only been blocked by Democrats mobilizing to protect women’s rights OR the Supreme Court ruling the laws unconstitutional. **
Now, with the Texas ban, myself and the Tennessee House Democratic Caucus are fearful for what the GOP supermajority in Tennessee will attempt to do to women.
This is a scary moment for millions across the country and us at home in Tennessee. The right to choose is on the ballot next year, and we cannot allow Tennessee to become Texas. WE MUST PROTECT WOMEN AND STOP THE GOP POWER GRAB.
[**Will you make a contribution today to help Democrats win back seats in the House and stop the GOP supermajority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35093422/304013403/6437213?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODcxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2U1NWVlOC1mOTBiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d0pd4XHv_sIQ2Lirxig7pew9mvBW8-X4HL-nSlD14ag=#)
Standing up for our freedoms,
Chairman Vincent Dixie
State Representative, District 54
Tennessee House Democratic Caucus Chairman

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35093423/304013404/-361920907?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODcxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2U1NWVlOC1mOTBiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d0pd4XHv_sIQ2Lirxig7pew9mvBW8-X4HL-nSlD14ag=#)

name: Charlie Crist
subject: we’ve built a movement
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
and thank you so much for being a part of it |
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35094322/304016375/601477077?refcode=20210902_f_1_fl&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMGE3MTg1NS1mYzBiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QbKr7sSXPSRlhgmXtsgBrCyJZzvWbfkuNUI_517EHKI=)

Friend,

From day one of this campaign, I knew that it’d take a movement to defeat Gov. DeSantis and build a Florida for All -- and make no mistake about it: **We’ve built a movement.**

Our incredible momentum in August is proof enough of that.

Thank you so much for being part of this campaign!

**It’s often said that every movement is made up of moments.**

Hearing stories from teachers about how hard they are working, despite our current governor, to educate our students. Talking to people who know how precious the right to vote is and will continue to fight against efforts to suppress Floridians' votes.

And traveling across Florida, sharing good food and memories with so many people I’ve met while I’ve been honored to serve this state.

I want you to share in these moments, friend.

Are you following us on Instagram? If not and you have an account, please be sure to keep up with us here:

| | Derek, believe it or not, the start of early voting in Virginia is just around the corner.

Do you know what scares me the most about the Virginia governor’s race?

In 2020, Virginia voters rebuked Donald Trump by a _**double digit margin.**_

_Less than one year later, polls show Terry and Trump-endorsed Glenn Youngkin virtually tied._

We’ve got to turn this around. In the final weeks of this campaign, let’s do everything we can to help Terry win, just like we did with Joe Biden.

clean_body: it’s really important | | | = | | Derek, believe it or not, the start of early voting in Virginia is just around the corner. Do you know what scares me the most about the Virginia governor’s race? In 2020, Virginia voters rebuked Donald Trump by a double digit margin. Less than one year later, polls show Terry and Trump-endorsed Glenn Youngkin virtually tied. We’ve got to turn this around. In the final weeks of this campaign, let’s do everything we can to help Terry win, just like we did with Joe Biden. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks for stepping up, Mark Warner =** Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. body:
**_BREAKING: The absolute hacks at Facebook suspended the account of a mother whose son was killed in action in Afghanistan. It's time to stand up to soulless censorship.

_****__** [**_JOIN ME: CHIP IN NOW >> _**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58240637:6Df4gT2RN:m:1:3253819041:97E27E19F897063155DAB4A741C078F6:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58240637:6Df4gT2RN:m:1:3253819041:97E27E19F897063155DAB4A741C078F6:r) | |
---
Peter, big tech has a big, liberal agenda.

They want to silence anyone who disagrees with them. ANYONE who threatens their power. And ANYONE who speaks out against their leader of choice, Joe Biden.

**_They made that as clear as day this week when the hacks at Facebook went as far as banning the mother of a fallen marine who wrote of her own negative experience with the president. _**

She criticized their guy - so they took down her Instagram account. _Just like that._

This kind of censorship is unacceptable, Peter. It's unamerican and it's a real threat to our liberty.

I'm working to put an end to the big tech tyranny and I need you to chip in NOW to help out:
**By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution:**
[**STAND WITH RAND: $10**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58240638:6Df4gT2RN:m:1:3253819041:97E27E19F897063155DAB4A741C078F6:r)
[**STAND WITH RAND: $15**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58240639:6Df4gT2RN:m:1:3253819041:97E27E19F897063155DAB4A741C078F6:r)
[**STAND WITH RAND: $20**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58240640:6Df4gT2RN:m:1:3253819041:97E27E19F897063155DAB4A741C078F6:r)
[**STAND WITH RAND: $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58240641:6Df4gT2RN:m:1:3253819041:97E27E19F897063155DAB4A741C078F6:r)
**If you've saved payment information with WinRed, your donation will go through automatically.**
We knew the social media mob was bad - even before today.

They've suspended my account, banned me on Google, tried to get my videos taken off the web...

_**_All for TELLING THE TRUTH!_**_

Now they're doing the same thing to a private citizen-a grieving mother who just lost her son in Biden's catastrophic withdrawal from Afghanistan.

It's absolutely despicable.

Of course, they're claiming the suspension was an "accident" now that they're getting negative press... but we know this game. And we know they **WON'T** stop until they **HAVE** to stop. That's why they need to hear from us.

**[I AGREE: CHIP IN NOW >>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58240637:6Df4gT2RN:m:1:3253819041:97E27E19F897063155DAB4A741C078F6:r)**

Here's the message we need to send to big tech elites at Facebook and Google and the rest:
-> You are not above the Constitution.
-> You cannot censor our right to free speech.
-> You WILL NOT silence us.
-> You WILL FAIL.

Why?

Because Americans are a free people. Our right to free speech cannot be bought and it cannot be erased.

**It is inherent. **

And let's not forget. This nation was created to protect freedom and liberty in moments just like this, when politicians and bureaucrats use intimidation and fear to silence dissent.

**I 'm not going to let them win. **

I'll continue being the champion against big tech censorship and for freedom, but it's not a fight I or anyone can do alone. That's why I need you to join me now by chipping in: **[https://secure.winred.com/randpaul/action-2813976/](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58240637:6Df4gT2RN:m:1:3253819041:97E27E19F897063155DAB4A741C078F6:r)**

Thank you in advance.

In Liberty,
Rand Paul

name: Amanda Edwards
subject: September 2021 Update: Small Businesses & Disaster Relief
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Amanda Edwards
body:
An important update from us.
| | | |
---
---
|

---
| Friends,
It has been 4 years since Hurricane Harvey, and there is still work to be done to help with recovery (see Mr. Brown's story detailed below). Let's remain prepared for this hurricane season and answer the call to assist those who have been impacted by Hurricane Ida. Please consider supporting efforts to assist survivors of Hurricane Ida in Louisiana. To learn more about how you can help Hurricane Ida survivors, visit: [https://www.thecut.com/2021/08/hurricane-ida-how-to-help.html](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Dmm8KSq9SjUe65unMsSpMOkxDu3r2CgVZW1maqZqv4zvngyO73crYkmJNSjDnanJjQ2qFa4lrjJtm5PlBdtzUnBgX9VQ97ZL0FhifphVPuAy9wUOubCstl4H0oiHQEtCraES2gHTrEFk7DqQGwFWzAmEfp9vbKM4z3OygA6N-AlLi-MpyoJfLHxuXxTxX8AWuZAd0kfvZ0g=&c=VPww_4VuT02cE0YjxdwVgsUpPpTBLdl5tx5LM54NyV_cRTCFCi0CPA==&ch=yCWHskfbvrfDU53BUwZuUytsoujYp9rgqbLN1sY0au2jECy2bXUrjQ==). Finally, please remember to get vaccinated and mask up during this critical juncture of the pandemic and continue to remind your friends, family and community to do the same.

---
|
---
|
---
| Although August marked the wrap up of our summer activity, it was a time of new beginnings with respect to the support available in Houston's small business ecosystem. Specifically, on August 26th, we launched the Business Ecosystem Alliance for Minorities and Women (BEAMW) to help reduce barriers faced by women and minority owned businesses seeking to access capital and to scale their businesses. With our launch event, we discussed our [report](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Dmm8KSq9SjUe65unMsSpMOkxDu3r2CgVZW1maqZqv4zvngyO73crYkmJNSjDnanJTwzUXmzQWPTgJlKV9l9Gw_bUts8lR93z6ipPpEXICUkoQeOk6puhe60tte97ne2wgbVDA_EGvdw5VGjqmiiZpivWbzwSNPH2YIrL-M8gtSbYuC09naA2I3ZEhxOyfYEb1ZwX0mlqsWb-bcCCerJJENGpiAC4UWwVjyzKWjJ3YN63mInUlxEjKg==&c=VPww_4VuT02cE0YjxdwVgsUpPpTBLdl5tx5LM54NyV_cRTCFCi0CPA==&ch=yCWHskfbvrfDU53BUwZuUytsoujYp9rgqbLN1sY0au2jECy2bXUrjQ==), featured our partnership with Texas Capital Bank and discussed ways to get involved in BEAMW. Thank You for showing your strong support of our launch event! To see a short clip of what you missed, please click the image below.

---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Dmm8KSq9SjUe65unMsSpMOkxDu3r2CgVZW1maqZqv4zvngyO73crYkmJNSjDnanJcLuJSxnme5kxXYf0ci-_0zkgi4RPsZXGtt_CG-HrkgfWbTrPWl_8N-ypCRKS6lZbnM0hiw_NiR_FL72kQn4B9A==&c=VPww_4VuT02cE0YjxdwVgsUpPpTBLdl5tx5LM54NyV_cRTCFCi0CPA==&ch=yCWHskfbvrfDU53BUwZuUytsoujYp9rgqbLN1sY0au2jECy2bXUrjQ==)
---
|
---
|
---
| Four years after sustaining damage caused by Harvey, the devastation remaining in the home of 85-year old Mr. Brown is heartbreaking. I met Mr. Brown because of his plumbing needs stemming from the Texas Winter Storm (Uri) & power outages. His neighbors reached out to me about his case because of the work Be The Solution: Community Empowerment Organization was doing for seniors. In partnership with another non-profit organization (West Street Recovery), we sent plumbers out to help him, but the plumbers alerted me to outrageous circumstances Mr. Brown faced living in his own home.
We have since removed Mr. Brown from the home, but are excited to announce that Be The Solution: Community Empowerment Organization is teaming up with SBP USA to assist with repairing/rebuilding Mr. Brown's home so that he may return to a safe, decent home! We need volunteers to sign up to assist with the repairs. Please sign up using this [link](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Dmm8KSq9SjUe65unMsSpMOkxDu3r2CgVZW1maqZqv4zvngyO73crYkmJNSjDnanJ8rU8b_Oh_29CCIV9ycnYdbOCb6t8VPpXbkibnq4mOOq0e-gVBsWWg0xp7uz93rNQ9aqcvAixr87avMDhe5GX8w==&c=VPww_4VuT02cE0YjxdwVgsUpPpTBLdl5tx5LM54NyV_cRTCFCi0CPA==&ch=yCWHskfbvrfDU53BUwZuUytsoujYp9rgqbLN1sY0au2jECy2bXUrjQ==) to volunteer! We are grateful to Melissa Correa & KHOU for highlighting Mr. Brown's journey. To learn more about Mr. Brown's story, click the image below. Please sign up to help today!
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Dmm8KSq9SjUe65unMsSpMOkxDu3r2CgVZW1maqZqv4zvngyO73crYkmJNSjDnanJEJJLXD1ucXfuMsaP_8CFWykvRn4W2TdlvrmISYwC5Z8DCS_B32LuwFkjfG3Xf_dLJEUIiNIscCn5Z1jC89nREOnHQS3s8AqjCh4oWP_Qov9XEFqK6aR0iw==&c=VPww_4VuT02cE0YjxdwVgsUpPpTBLdl5tx5LM54NyV_cRTCFCi0CPA==&ch=yCWHskfbvrfDU53BUwZuUytsoujYp9rgqbLN1sY0au2jECy2bXUrjQ==)
---
|
---
CLOSING REMARKS
The upcoming Rosh Hashana new year holiday in the Jewish community is a time of celebration of the new year and hope for peace and prosperity in the coming year. Shortly after that celebration is Yom Kippur, the day of atonement, a time of self-reflection about what each person and the community has done in the year that passed and what can be improved in the year to come. In these challenging times, when we are witnessing a surge of anti-semitism, it is worth noting the need to stand together. I stand with the Jewish community with wishes of Shana Tovah, a sweet new year, and a meaningful Yom Kippur, and the hope we can see better days.
---
Sincerely,
Amanda K Edwards
---

clean_body: An important update from us. | | | | | | Friends, It has been 4 years since Hurricane Harvey, and there is still work to be done to help with recovery (see Mr. Brown's story detailed below). Let's remain prepared for this hurricane season and answer the call to assist those who have been impacted by Hurricane Ida. Please consider supporting efforts to assist survivors of Hurricane Ida in Louisiana. To learn more about how you can help Hurricane Ida survivors, visit: ==. Finally, please remember to get vaccinated and mask up during this critical juncture of the pandemic and continue to remind your friends, family and community to do the same. | | | Although August marked the wrap up of our summer activity, it was a time of new beginnings with respect to the support available in Houston's small business ecosystem. Specifically, on August 26th, we launched the Business Ecosystem Alliance for Minorities and Women (BEAMW) to help reduce barriers faced by women and minority owned businesses seeking to access capital and to scale their businesses. With our launch event, we discussed our ==, featured our partnership with Texas Capital Bank and discussed ways to get involved in BEAMW. Thank You for showing your strong support of our launch event! To see a short clip of what you missed, please click the image below. | == | | | Four years after sustaining damage caused by Harvey, the devastation remaining in the home of 85-year old Mr. Brown is heartbreaking. I met Mr. Brown because of his plumbing needs stemming from the Texas Winter Storm (Uri) & power outages. His neighbors reached out to me about his case because of the work Be The Solution: Community Empowerment Organization was doing for seniors. In partnership with another non-profit organization (West Street Recovery), we sent plumbers out to help him, but the plumbers alerted me to outrageous circumstances Mr. Brown faced living in his own home. We have since removed Mr. Brown from the home, but are excited to announce that Be The Solution: Community Empowerment Organization is teaming up with SBP USA to assist with repairing/rebuilding Mr. Brown's home so that he may return to a safe, decent home! We need volunteers to sign up to assist with the repairs. Please sign up using this == to volunteer! We are grateful to Melissa Correa & KHOU for highlighting Mr. Brown's journey. To learn more about Mr. Brown's story, click the image below. Please sign up to help today! | == | CLOSING REMARKS The upcoming Rosh Hashana new year holiday in the Jewish community is a time of celebration of the new year and hope for peace and prosperity in the coming year. Shortly after that celebration is Yom Kippur, the day of atonement, a time of self-reflection about what each person and the community has done in the year that passed and what can be improved in the year to come. In these challenging times, when we are witnessing a surge of anti-semitism, it is worth noting the need to stand together. I stand with the Jewish community with wishes of Shana Tovah, a sweet new year, and a meaningful Yom Kippur, and the hope we can see better days. Sincerely, Amanda K Edwards | For More Updates, Follow My Social Media By Clicking On The Buttons Below. == == == == == | == == == == == | == Paid for by Amanda Edwards | | | | | | | Amanda Edwards | PO Box 88228, Houston, TX 77288 | | Sent by mailto:akedwards00@yahoo.com

name: Jenna Henry, Keystone Progress
subject: Groundhog Day is apparently on September 2nd now.

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=090221 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=090221]

Dear Friend,

On Groundhog Day, Punxsutawney Phil predicted six more weeks of winter.

Instead, what we got was seven more months of conservative legislators in PA trying to the turn back the clock on progress by voting to remove the Governor's ability to protect us from COVID-19, to undermine our fair elections, diminish abortion rights... And the chilly, dim list goes on.

We have a legislature that promotes lies that endanger our democracy and that is dedicated to restricting our rights -- again and again, like Groundhog Day.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=090221 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=090221]

Winter is literally coming -- and with it a judicial election that will determine who gets to rule on future state and presidential election challenges.

We cannot allow 2024’s election to be judged by folks with robes and tin-foil MAGA hats.

There are no dragons to save us.

We only have a couple of months to get this done.

Please donate here and so maybe, just maybe, Punxsutawney Phil will give us the spring we are looking for in February.
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=090221]

Signed,

Jenna Henry
Keystone Progress

name: Tiffany Smiley
subject: ICYMI: I have the endorsement of the Washington State Republican Party
body:
What an honor!
---
| | | | | | You're receiving this message because you signed up to receive emails from Smiley for Washington. If you no longer wish to receive these emails, you can unsubscribe at the bottom of this email.
---
| |
---
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Friends,
---
| A little over a week ago, I received the endorsement of the Washington State Republican Party. It has been an honor to receive the State Party's endorsement as well as the immense amount of support and encouragement that has come along with it.
For three long decades, Patty Murray has focused on the out-of-touch agenda of Washington, DC politicians rather than the unique needs of her constituents all across Washington State. But in order to defeat her, I need your help! Your continued support will mean that I can take WSRP's endorsement all the way to the US Senate!
---

Join me, and next November, with your continued support, we will send a shockwave from right here in Washington State all the way to Washington, DC.

Tiffany

name: Roger Marshall
subject: You make the difference
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KANSANS FOR MARSHALL
body:
| |
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/da9ca817a363ab16/f7e9cefe0c0d9fc9c3d6b838967d376c)
|
---
# **— I know I’ve emailed you a lot this week, but I just wanted to take a second to say thank you. **

---
With your help, we reached our August end of month fundraising goal!

That means we’re on track to reach our overall End of Quarter goal at the end of this month — and that means we’re one step closer to winning back the U.S. Senate next year.

**If we win back the Senate, we can investigate what led to the debacle in Afghanistan, secure our border, protect our Constitution, and stop the woke left’s push to indoctrinate our kids.**

We couldn’t do this without patriots and supporters like you. With your help, we’re holding the woke left accountable and exposing the Democrats’ disastrous agenda for our country.

And we’re going to win next year.

I’m truly thankful to have you on Team Marshall, and while we will ask for your help again, today is about saying thank you.

Your investment and support truly fuel our efforts.

clean_body: | | | — I know I’ve emailed you a lot this week, but I just wanted to take a second to say thank you. With your help, we reached our August end of month fundraising goal! That means we’re on track to reach our overall End of Quarter goal at the end of this month — and that means we’re one step closer to winning back the U.S. Senate next year. If we win back the Senate, we can investigate what led to the debacle in Afghanistan, secure our border, protect our Constitution, and stop the woke left’s push to indoctrinate our kids. We couldn’t do this without patriots and supporters like you. With your help, we’re holding the woke left accountable and exposing the Democrats’ disastrous agenda for our country. And we’re going to win next year. I’m truly thankful to have you on Team Marshall, and while we will ask for your help again, today is about saying thank you. name: Hala Ayala
subject: This is an abhorrent attack on the right to choose
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hala For Virginia P
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35100170/304030973/691946420?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTcxZDhiNi0wNDBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ScvnRUqBmpugaNNDtERzSRQIUrUGHJcnI7BsihNZp6g=)
---
Peter — Yesterday, Texas’ extreme six week abortion ban went into effect.

This law essentially ends Roe v. Wade in the state — _and places a $10,000 bounty on the head of anyone who dares help an individual obtain an abortion._

**Let me be clear, Peter: This law is inhumane, cruel, and a national disgrace.**

It does nothing but make things worse for individuals seeking an abortion. Low income, minority, and working class individuals without the means to travel to another state to seek an abortion will be most affected.

Abortion is a fundamental right, now being politicized by Republicans for their own gain. I’m extremely disappointed by the Supreme Court’s unwillingness to act on behalf of the decades-long precedent set by Roe v. Wade.

**And make no mistake, Peter: Access to abortion is on the ballot this November in Virginia.**

My Republican opponent has made it a priority to defund critical services like Planned Parenthood — preventing an individual from choosing what is right for their own body.

The state Senate in Virginia is tied on the issue of choice, which means the Lt. Governor will be the last line of defense for reproductive rights.

I refuse to let anti-choice Republicans triumph. I am committed to being a brick wall on the issue of abortion access, and will always protect an individual’s right to make decisions about their own body.

[**As Lt. Governor, I will fight with all I have to make sure abortion access is safe. With two months to go in this campaign, we can’t let Republicans win. Chip in $3 now to help elect me in November!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35100171/304030974/2130246724?amount=3&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250&refcode=HAFV_20210902_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTcxZDhiNi0wNDBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ScvnRUqBmpugaNNDtERzSRQIUrUGHJcnI7BsihNZp6g=) | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35100172/304030975/2130246724?amount=3&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250&refcode=HAFV_20210902_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTcxZDhiNi0wNDBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ScvnRUqBmpugaNNDtERzSRQIUrUGHJcnI7BsihNZp6g=)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Palmer for Illinois
body:
David has been hard at work on the campaign trail. Lately, he’s been meeting with neighbors at community events to find out what’s most important to them. But in order to gauge what the top priorities are for our community, he needs to hear from EVERY member. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, we understand. You can request to get only the most important emails , or you can . | Paid for by Palmer for Illinois Palmer for Illinois PO Box 164 Champaign, IL 61874 United States

Government should be by the people, _for_ the people. But for years the AG’s office has been run by special interest groups who sought to **line their own pockets** rather than protect the people of Arizona.

Diego is ready to change that.

As the **People’s Attorney,** he will serve Arizonans with transparency, accountability, and integrity. He will fight for everyday folks — people working to make ends meet, keep their kids safe, or overcome systemic struggles — because _he's_ faced all those challenges in his life too.

It's time for the government to work for the people. **That's why Diego wants to hear about YOUR priorities.**

**[Will you take three minutes to fill out our issues survey so we can fight for what you care about?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35102530/304034166/1692496535?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDY3MzVkMS0wNjBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_sndlVZ3hZn0ts6TT9bAOTcIYLN6wz36fYnT-i7CrwU=&emci=d8bbef02-3a01-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=846735d1-060c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=10950315)**

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Help me Impeach Joe Biden
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Peter,
American soldiers are dying, American
citizens cannot get out of Afghanistan safely, all while Old Joe
dodders and cries his way through another day in the White House.
Our nation's security will be destroyed if he
stays in office any longer, which is why I'm leading the movement
to Impeach Joe Biden.
Joe Biden must be impeached, tried in the
Senate, convicted, and removed from office.
I introduced articles of impeachment against
old Joe months ago. Still, the utter incompetence of the
Afghanistan drawdown has forced me to submit new articles of
impeachment against Joe Biden for dereliction of duty.
We must impeach and remove Old Joe Biden
before he does MORE damage to our nation's security.

Join the Fight -
Donate Today

There is nothing the left hates more than a
Conservative Woman who dares to question their complete
incompetence, and that's why I need patriotic Americans like you
to have my back.
That starts with your donation of $1,000,
$500, $250, $100, even just $25 so we can send a strong message
that Joe Biden's time in office is coming to an end.
Joe Biden has placed our soldiers and other
American personnel in a position where they need to rely on the
Taliban to provide security, and we have all seen how well that
worked.
American soldiers are now dead because Joe
Biden is unable or unwilling to execute the duties of the Office
of President.
It is our duty to remove him from office
before more people die.
Fight for AMERICA: Join me and donate $25,
$50, $100, or even $1,000 TODAY! We can't waste a single moment
in taking our nation back.
I am fighting for you in Congress, and I need
your help to ensure we can stop Joe Biden before it's too late.
God Bless America,

Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA)

name: Cheri Beasley
subject: I’m grateful.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
It is humbling and inspiring to see the countless ways folks are stepping up to help us win North Carolina.
#

I’m so grateful to everyone on this grassroots team.
I’m thrilled to report that we hit our fundraising goal in August, and that’s entirely because of people like you. It was tough at times — fundraising during the summer months is notoriously difficult. But thanks to thousands of people stepping up to support this campaign, we did it.
It is humbling and inspiring to see the countless ways folks are helping us win here in North Carolina. It’s a true testament to what we can accomplish together, and it’s why I have so much faith in our ability to win this campaign.
There’s no doubt that there will be obstacles and difficult moments, but if we stick together and keep working harder than we’ve ever worked before, we have a real opportunity to deliver meaningful change for people across the country.
That’s really what’s at stake in this Senate race. We are fighting to protect the right to vote, aggressively tackle the climate crisis, confront systemic inequality, provide quality health care for all and so much more.
Whether it’s volunteering, donating, telling your friends about our campaign, or sharing our posts on social media, every action that you take makes a difference.
Thank you again from the bottom of my heart, and let’s keep up the fight!
\- Cheri Beasley
At the end of this month, we’re facing our second FEC deadline, and we’ll have to report our numbers afterward. The media and our opponents will be watching our campaign closely to see if we can sustain our moment.
[**So if you’re able to help us start this month strong, please consider making a donation to our grassroots campaign today. Thank you!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35104851/304040270/1741212721?refcode2=90ef4ce3-080c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210902-1-full&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MGVmNGNlMy0wODBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MB2QmWRyQ3m-sgp6V7nPZnod-kjNboKtYsTytt3DE9I=)

clean_body: It is humbling and inspiring to see the countless ways folks are stepping up to help us win North Carolina. I’m so grateful to everyone on this grassroots team. I’m thrilled to report that we hit our fundraising goal in August, and that’s entirely because of people like you. It was tough at times — fundraising during the summer months is notoriously difficult. But thanks to thousands of people stepping up to support this campaign, we did it. It is humbling and inspiring to see the countless ways folks are helping us win here in North Carolina. It’s a true testament to what we can accomplish together, and it’s why I have so much faith in our ability to win this campaign. There’s no doubt that there will be obstacles and difficult moments, but if we stick together and keep working harder than we’ve ever worked before, we have a real opportunity to deliver meaningful change for people across the country. That’s really what’s at stake in this Senate race. We are fighting to protect the right to vote, aggressively tackle the climate crisis, confront systemic inequality, provide quality health care for all and so much more. Whether it’s volunteering, donating, telling your friends about our campaign, or sharing our posts on social media, every action that you take makes a difference. Thank you again from the bottom of my heart, and let’s keep up the fight! \- Cheri Beasley At the end of this month, we’re facing our second FEC deadline, and we’ll have to report our numbers afterward. The media and our opponents will be watching our campaign closely to see if we can sustain our moment. = = * Paid for by Cheri Beasley for North Carolina Cheri Beasley for North Carolina PO Box 28778 Raleigh, NC 27611 United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Mondaire Jones
subject: Roe v. Wade, the Supreme Court, and the Judiciary Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
#

After the Texas legislature passed legislation banning abortion after six weeks, healthcare providers in the state filed an emergency petition to block the bill in court.
**But the Supreme Court refused to take action, allowing these extreme restrictions to become the law of the land.** By refusing to act, the Supreme Court has essentially overturned _Roe v. Wade._
Make no mistake: this is a threat to Americans not just in Texas, but all across the country. And the only way to reverse this all-out assault on reproductive freedom is to restore balance to the Supreme Court by passing the Judiciary Act to add four seats.
[**If you agree, I’m asking for you to add your name here to join our fight to expand the Supreme Court.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35105435/304041053/1968845141?refcode2=6b8efa6c-090c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210902-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjhlZmE2Yy0wOTBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3hFBmbDg-HOSe_rSxqXpO0QCEMTwO0T71T7bFhl3Cs0=&emci=4dd8a0bf-000c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=6b8efa6c-090c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=24719896)
The Supreme Court’s role is to protect civil liberties, not undermine liberties that are at odds with the justices’ personal beliefs. But this recent development, which effectively overturns _Roe v. Wade_ , is a partisan assault on reproductive freedom and a radical departure from six decades of settled law.
Banning abortion after six weeks is as reckless as it is unjust. Most people don’t know they are pregnant by six weeks; banning abortion at that stage will cause folks in need of abortion care to turn to unlicensed providers, or to attempt to end their pregnancies themselves. This will disproportionately harm economically disadvantaged people, and people of color.
We can’t allow the 6-3 conservative majority on the Court to chip away at the right to choose any longer. That’s why I’m asking for your support:
[**Add your name here if you agree that we must add four seats to the Supreme Court to restore balance and protect our fundamental rights.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35105437/304041055/1968845141?refcode2=6b8efa6c-090c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210902-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjhlZmE2Yy0wOTBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3hFBmbDg-HOSe_rSxqXpO0QCEMTwO0T71T7bFhl3Cs0=&emci=4dd8a0bf-000c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=6b8efa6c-090c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=24719896)
Thank you for your support. I’ll be in touch with more information when I have it.
\- Mondaire

| | Folks, Today marks two months from Election Day. Now’s the time to come together and do everything we can to protect our progress. Under Democratic leadership, Virginia has passed legislation to protect the right to vote, eradicate discrimination, legalize marijuana, tackle climate change, ratify the Equal Rights Amendment, and so much more. _All of that progress is at risk on Election Day._ Terry McAuliffe, Hala Ayala, and Mark Herring have a track record of fighting for progress and standing up against extremist Republicans. They have plans to address gun violence, reform our justice system, build a post-COVID economy that works for everyone, fight the opioid crisis, and make investments in our public schools, and that’s not all. **Here’s the thing though - we need your support to protect that progress. Will you chip in to help us elect Democrats this November?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: it’s time to protect our progress | | | Folks, Today marks two months from Election Day. Now’s the time to come together and do everything we can to protect our progress. Under Democratic leadership, Virginia has passed legislation to protect the right to vote, eradicate discrimination, legalize marijuana, tackle climate change, ratify the Equal Rights Amendment, and so much more. All of that progress is at risk on Election Day. Terry McAuliffe, Hala Ayala, and Mark Herring have a track record of fighting for progress and standing up against extremist Republicans. They have plans to address gun violence, reform our justice system, build a post-COVID economy that works for everyone, fight the opioid crisis, and make investments in our public schools, and that’s not all. Here’s the thing though - we need your support to protect that progress. clean_body: Don’t let this moment pass you by... | Are you there, Peter? Good. We need to talk. | | Last January, Republicans lost Georgia’s two US Senate seats in a tragic defeat in a must-win Runoff Election. That’s why the Democrats are in the majority! Too few Grassroots Republicans stepped up to help -- and we lost! Now, with Herschel Walker in the race, we have the chance to reclaim one of those traditionally Republican seats in Georgia. That would restore our Republican Majority and end Joe Biden’s agenda for good! But this is going to be one tough fight, and we need everyone on board. Especially you, Peter. | | | | Thank you. \-- Elect Republicans

name: Team Faulconer
subject: Did you vote?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Faulconer for Governor 2021
body:
Don’t miss this opportunity to recall Gavin Newsom! Read more >>
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/6aa08ceff13b82cf/a0ffc52f82571ec8c3d6b838967d376c/34943) Peter, Have you voted in California’s election to recall Gavin Newsom? [**YES, I HAVE VOTED**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/6aa08ceff13b82cf/2192c87cf2f1e922c3d6b838967d376c/34943) [**NO, I HAVE NOT VOTED**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/6aa08ceff13b82cf/a88fa115244dcae0c3d6b838967d376c/34943) Peter, if you have already voted, thank you! If not, please do so at your earliest convenience. Ballots were mailed to registered voters in California the week of August 16th. If you haven’t received your ballot yet, please check your status **[HERE](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/6aa08ceff13b82cf/77ba1a6d2585bcd6c3d6b838967d376c/34943)**. **There are three ways you can register to vote: ** 1) Register in person at your county elections office or vote center during regular business hours. 2) Register on Election Day (September 14th) at your local polling center. 3) Register on or before August 30th to receive your ballot via mail. You can drop your ballot in a secure drop box or return it by mail. As long as your ballot is postmarked on or before September 14th, it will be counted. **Regardless of which method you choose, please be sure to VOTE!** Peter, our state just can’t take any more of Gavin Newsom’s failed leadership.
_We urgently need a California Comeback, and Kevin Faulconer is the only candidate in this race with the proven experience to get the job done._ Thanks for your vital support,

clean_body: Don’t miss this opportunity to recall Gavin Newsom! Read more >> Peter, Have you voted in California’s election to recall Gavin Newsom? Peter, if you have already voted, thank you! If not, please do so at your earliest convenience. Ballots were mailed to registered voters in California the week of August 16th. If you haven’t received your ballot yet, please check your status . There are three ways you can register to vote: 1) Register in person at your county elections office or vote center during regular business hours. 2) Register on Election Day (September 14th) at your local polling center. 3) Register on or before August 30th to receive your ballot via mail. You can drop your ballot in a secure drop box or return it by mail. As long as your ballot is postmarked on or before September 14th, it will be counted. Regardless of which method you choose, please be sure to VOTE! Peter, our state just can’t take any more of Gavin Newsom’s failed leadership. We urgently need a California Comeback, and Kevin Faulconer is the only candidate in this race with the proven experience to get the job done. Thanks for your vital support, Team Faulconer | | | | | ---|---|---|--- id:2021-08-26-14:06:20:490t Paid for by Faulconer for Governor 2021

There are lots of ways to get involved with this campaign — whether it’s volunteering, signing petitions, sharing your thoughts through our surveys, or pitching in with grassroots donations. Every single one of these actions helps keep our work rooted in New Mexico. I can't thank you enough for taking part in it. Recently, in the Senate, we passed the historic Build Back Better infrastructure package. Combined with the upcoming budget package, this is a once-in-a-generation opportunity to take on climate change and create millions of good-paying jobs. Senate Democrats, House Democrats, and the Biden administration are investing billions of dollars into making life better for New Mexicans and our whole country. With your support locally, we also recently invested $30,000 in county Democratic parties in every region of New Mexico. These funds will do everything from help local parties train volunteers to fuel down-ballot races. We're helping build powerful Democratic leadership at the local level. But our work isn’t done yet. Together, we can make New Mexico a leader in clean energy, innovation, and opportunity. We can protect our public lands and wildlife and grow our outdoor recreation economy. We can welcome refugees with open hearts and minds. And we can keep our promise to our veterans, and ensure that every New Mexican has access to high-quality health care and education. I know we can do it because this team has shown it time and time again. We never, ever give up, especially when it's hard.
