body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE THURSDAY, SEPT. 2, 2021
ICYMI: GREATER GEORGIA LAUNCHES RED BELT BLITZ
ATLANTA - In case you missed it, yesterday, Greater Georgia [launched](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AaxToFr-j9w3_taGfKmnlHfiu5B7lFsIUF-nSLQK_jeufELnJ69cHcIniWvPwnN7jPfUfrbXqnZlb6xVN095JhDXTWEh-_4rFHd7Okg_SXY9N_8_rR7tvxRwiRHHEKoqiMIFJVc-EY-OOmWD0vFJH7EH1DkHeL0HuiVVwA_oiXav_Jr3q4GCJ0euuoeCkkifn_ogM9MTIqed3yqHtiTs-VJMRLxp-36SyxxkepHRVYcxy8F3Bv9ECisKvazgeS1Z6UCCOWowQ9LRYQqkkJxea2NWIDWDjGH8-zEKJ4uM67k=&c=vMcJifDbIfJea9_gxhaTG5ajd-Bt5c_AwLA5gqAl8PpMFNRfi-vB6Q==&ch=uZ9i8Ie67CMSS8pDPgxXf2ZEEeCGgKSN90Rtfa1xXLkfSF8Q7QOJJw==) the [Red Belt Blitz](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AaxToFr-j9w3_taGfKmnlHfiu5B7lFsIUF-nSLQK_jeufELnJ69cHcIniWvPwnN7pGzC8SXZy2AneA_m5V0SxGMgdEvuARBnEOG6aCDsytXf7Pq5JYpDI6VzkP-VqpH5UAlXEdQ1OQa1tqv9Vn-apTwSZrtHhrvAftgYYuzvqU6k3km_amEbDOrA7D8HQuEUgrCW4mqF_ina9KaTKjyOhc6TfpknWr7gIcUAIAyLkSbcpDtstdxvOsasgmI0tmTp9CmeylaZNYYm6MgsCGlSLg==&c=vMcJifDbIfJea9_gxhaTG5ajd-Bt5c_AwLA5gqAl8PpMFNRfi-vB6Q==&ch=uZ9i8Ie67CMSS8pDPgxXf2ZEEeCGgKSN90Rtfa1xXLkfSF8Q7QOJJw==) campaign - a six-figure outreach and mobilization effort to register and engage conservative-leaning voters in five North Atlanta "Red Belt" counties: Cherokee, Hall, Forsyth, Bartow, and Floyd. This morning, Greater Georgia Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler was a guest on The Morning Xtra radio show in Atlanta to discuss the Red Belt Blitz.
Click [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AaxToFr-j9w3_taGfKmnlHfiu5B7lFsIUF-nSLQK_jeufELnJ69cHcIniWvPwnN7HZx13IbGyjZrQozUtCZvSsO_gTLynNJ9SJomLh5uYREHctUaiuLEkVbCdfMmV-EeDA6JwgA3VP-jUwc-5nqcJA==&c=vMcJifDbIfJea9_gxhaTG5ajd-Bt5c_AwLA5gqAl8PpMFNRfi-vB6Q==&ch=uZ9i8Ie67CMSS8pDPgxXf2ZEEeCGgKSN90Rtfa1xXLkfSF8Q7QOJJw==) or the photo below to listen to the full interview:
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AaxToFr-j9w3_taGfKmnlHfiu5B7lFsIUF-nSLQK_jeufELnJ69cHcIniWvPwnN7HZx13IbGyjZrQozUtCZvSsO_gTLynNJ9SJomLh5uYREHctUaiuLEkVbCdfMmV-EeDA6JwgA3VP-jUwc-5nqcJA==&c=vMcJifDbIfJea9_gxhaTG5ajd-Bt5c_AwLA5gqAl8PpMFNRfi-vB6Q==&ch=uZ9i8Ie67CMSS8pDPgxXf2ZEEeCGgKSN90Rtfa1xXLkfSF8Q7QOJJw==)
---
| The Red Belt Blitz was also featured in a recent AJC article. Click [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AaxToFr-j9w3_taGfKmnlHfiu5B7lFsIUF-nSLQK_jeufELnJ69cHcIniWvPwnN7jPfUfrbXqnZlb6xVN095JhDXTWEh-_4rFHd7Okg_SXY9N_8_rR7tvxRwiRHHEKoqiMIFJVc-EY-OOmWD0vFJH7EH1DkHeL0HuiVVwA_oiXav_Jr3q4GCJ0euuoeCkkifn_ogM9MTIqed3yqHtiTs-VJMRLxp-36SyxxkepHRVYcxy8F3Bv9ECisKvazgeS1Z6UCCOWowQ9LRYQqkkJxea2NWIDWDjGH8-zEKJ4uM67k=&c=vMcJifDbIfJea9_gxhaTG5ajd-Bt5c_AwLA5gqAl8PpMFNRfi-vB6Q==&ch=uZ9i8Ie67CMSS8pDPgxXf2ZEEeCGgKSN90Rtfa1xXLkfSF8Q7QOJJw==) or read below for the full text:
Loeffler's voting group launches 'Red Belt Blitz' in north Georgia
Former U.S. Sen. Kelly Loeffler's conservative voter mobilization group aims to capitalize on the surge of growth in Atlanta's northern exurbs and beyond with a new effort to register and energize residents in a five-county stretch.
The [Greater Georgia group](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AaxToFr-j9w3_taGfKmnlHfiu5B7lFsIUF-nSLQK_jeufELnJ69cHcIniWvPwnN7fwJeqvA7SzhbWArnnjblKfsC8H3iFIGz8eo8LiBHcTLWWbRQsXmSqsEnN75zdNDoaFzMRzFzgdAGB0gXn4FhCZfVtOVdoAoTNGRl1aTXMlWvTbWm1pEWqdK_RsJ8YYmc9JlFuY8TInAmRtQJCVdsmu9ClTKQWlOjHD9gWqD_Td1tIE8mC2R-BZmUy8jUWFRKVbGZ-dEYLQOQPbxbZsY3fGin7x7gGcMj1PwLLU-Np99m4nyugeH3MDdDctotPHJBwVLHLJseL7jMoDnaNL5vIpV_TviI1yW4d7Z16lmjdLEWyIGX7xDClFVZpYu6JWgYz8aj7vigqirMeITL-aIAuZbqzCfVxlY3PeH56y0VXuAAjNzJdI5NVlhQB2DzG7_eUdb5jAks8vUIHqED5BwcMoXDYmA4bVQ5C3t4L_iwiXHz8UZL7Vm05PX2vaefrIVGBg60gY4nuSALnhO1ApL9e2DrMamIWjcW8RNsIjvUIu_zU95dpDGvoYYX8mHOVvSZaMB6ghl-foRia6MvL2aEuQFuw-nJPQixoN_SWcwaOeA=&c=vMcJifDbIfJea9_gxhaTG5ajd-Bt5c_AwLA5gqAl8PpMFNRfi-vB6Q==&ch=uZ9i8Ie67CMSS8pDPgxXf2ZEEeCGgKSN90Rtfa1xXLkfSF8Q7QOJJw==) kicked off a "Red Belt Blitz" in Bartow, Cherokee, Floyd, Forsyth and Hall counties, a six-figure initiative that's part of broader goal to motivate 100,000 additional conservative voters ahead of the 2022 election.
"It's an unprecedented effort we haven't had on our side," said Loeffler. "We've seen the left out-register us in the 2020 cycle. That's why it's important for us to put our resources and efforts toward this new voter registration effort."
Loeffler [launched](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AaxToFr-j9w3_taGfKmnlHfiu5B7lFsIUF-nSLQK_jeufELnJ69cHcIniWvPwnN7fwJeqvA7SzhbWArnnjblKfsC8H3iFIGz8eo8LiBHcTLWWbRQsXmSqsEnN75zdNDoaFzMRzFzgdAGB0gXn4FhCZfVtOVdoAoTNGRl1aTXMlWvTbWm1pEWqdK_RsJ8YYmc9JlFuY8TInAmRtQJCVdsmu9ClTKQWlOjHD9gWqD_Td1tIE8mC2R-BZmUy8jUWFRKVbGZ-dEYLQOQPbxbZsY3fGin7x7gGcMj1PwLLU-Np99m4nyugeH3MDdDctotPHJBwVLHLJseL7jMoDnaNL5vIpV_TviI1yW4d7Z16lmjdLEWyIGX7xDClFVZpYu6JWgYz8aj7vigqirMeITL-aIAuZbqzCfVxlY3PeH56y0VXuAAjNzJdI5NVlhQB2DzG7_eUdb5jAks8vUIHqED5BwcMoXDYmA4bVQ5C3t4L_iwiXHz8UZL7Vm05PX2vaefrIVGBg60gY4nuSALnhO1ApL9e2DrMamIWjcW8RNsIjvUIu_zU95dpDGvoYYX8mHOVvSZaMB6ghl-foRia6MvL2aEuQFuw-nJPQixoN_SWcwaOeA=&c=vMcJifDbIfJea9_gxhaTG5ajd-Bt5c_AwLA5gqAl8PpMFNRfi-vB6Q==&ch=uZ9i8Ie67CMSS8pDPgxXf2ZEEeCGgKSN90Rtfa1xXLkfSF8Q7QOJJw==) the organization shortly after her defeat to Democrat Raphael Warnock in January's runoff as a [GOP answer](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AaxToFr-j9w3_taGfKmnlHfiu5B7lFsIUF-nSLQK_jeufELnJ69cHcIniWvPwnN7fwJeqvA7SzhbWArnnjblKfsC8H3iFIGz8eo8LiBHcTLWWbRQsXmSqsEnN75zdNDoaFzMRzFzgdAGB0gXn4FhCZfVtOVdoAoTNGRl1aTXMlWvTbWm1pEWqdK_RsJ8YYmc9JlFuY8TInAmRtQJCVdsmu9ClTKQWlOjHD9gWqD_Td1tIE8mC2R-BZmUy8jUWFRKVbGZ-dEYLQOQPbxbZsY3fGin7x7gGcMj1PwLLU-Np99m4nyugeH3MDdDctotPHJBwVLHLJseL7jMoDnaNL5vIpV_TviI1yW4d7Z16lmjdLEWyIGX7xDClFVZpYu6JWgYz8aj7vigqirMeITL-aIAuZbqzCfVxlY3PeH56y0VXuAAjNzJdI5NVlhQB2DzG7_eUdb5jAks8vUIHqED5BwcMoXDYmA4bVQ5C3t4L_iwiXHz8UZL7Vm05PX2vaefrIVGBg60gY4nuSALnhO1ApL9e2DrMamIWjcW8RNsIjvUIu_zU95dpDGvoYYX8mHOVvSZaMB6ghl-foRia6MvL2aEuQFuw-nJPQixoN_SWcwaOeA=&c=vMcJifDbIfJea9_gxhaTG5ajd-Bt5c_AwLA5gqAl8PpMFNRfi-vB6Q==&ch=uZ9i8Ie67CMSS8pDPgxXf2ZEEeCGgKSN90Rtfa1xXLkfSF8Q7QOJJw==) to the Fair Fight Action voting rights group founded by Stacey Abrams. It faced its [first test](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AaxToFr-j9w3_taGfKmnlHfiu5B7lFsIUF-nSLQK_jeufELnJ69cHfAW1Fq0kzTjS7A66jjAIg4kQWWhzwX-g11xS4k_H94qHnK7yW5Wa2KZyXH8pxffB32uP8-sn2axy3UBmB-pJ_-UD00QKnDGCgBMm0SPqSxvOc_vp4XIJj85KtSn9GavWk8RhcMJu0xTCaGtwhjvdt5uXkaMeYULhnQI10lMwiKpbcHwit4kE3Apy8xE6Ay1Z0Df6QAn8bzFyGyuLoRBi0bo483YAUT1uGnnDBP_Jasu&c=vMcJifDbIfJea9_gxhaTG5ajd-Bt5c_AwLA5gqAl8PpMFNRfi-vB6Q==&ch=uZ9i8Ie67CMSS8pDPgxXf2ZEEeCGgKSN90Rtfa1xXLkfSF8Q7QOJJw==) in a recent low-profile state legislative special election that Republicans [easily held.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AaxToFr-j9w3_taGfKmnlHfiu5B7lFsIUF-nSLQK_jeufELnJ69cHcIniWvPwnN7bLlbjaDLjxkVhY5gpNPWxEzAP873Aq5CIdmHkUCWBSaOicFr2f8bUy65_Kd2q_PZ-JWSiBZls-qBX1tglAh-RRlhy-4V7ZPwmSlMEyMKz_HtU-_vueKbYtdMGW_jwQyWDt9KxP902Iu3K6gogQJmVIRoejnS-i6dDYcXTHULf7ogVoFomyYQIoBxuyS0kPfIfSNe-4nWpmJ3XvtANa4gpl5KDYaRzruEvJFSKLVDXjPTx0DpPj1BbWfSG8j8o772W6tbRWktWlFKUENdV1pKfr0B6ifM9-NZTit7USbh49lFGdfEynmRCrKeaxPlpNaQrcHzqCN6hvtvMHQKHdgHucMUhLnN0tSSoYRsXPpPkVPF266Sc6yC7090BJmBfwSXzQIgovYiSRWmF-NOxHWYOLTSGu6_7jUO5U6S6CUxXirF7CuYUi0va8k5O6mXokroosRQ5gYLPn5nAMHKUsn1MYd1Z4HdzJBvo0ZHFX5t-acmzx7AEOhaGhj1Kb6Ei62Hbyj5Dy0BhNt5UMIqcSvBnQ==&c=vMcJifDbIfJea9_gxhaTG5ajd-Bt5c_AwLA5gqAl8PpMFNRfi-vB6Q==&ch=uZ9i8Ie67CMSS8pDPgxXf2ZEEeCGgKSN90Rtfa1xXLkfSF8Q7QOJJw==)
"We ran digital ads, pushed texts, emails and logged hundreds of thousands of touches that created an overwhelming win," Loeffler said. "This mobilization is entirely possible again if we organize. And that's what we're doing right now in north metro Atlanta."
The blitz targets some of the state's most booming counties, all GOP strongholds key to the party's 2022 fortunes. Newly released U.S. Census data showed that Forsyth [grew by 43%](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AaxToFr-j9w3_taGfKmnlHfiu5B7lFsIUF-nSLQK_jeufELnJ69cHcIniWvPwnN74tLzI2DvZ5nF1Ya6xbT7YkrtQtPQa3j2Qgt5DZol9aSNT7fComIc3Wr9dPcqTPbMa0LTiB2WjeaaslT-1sOBTTuh0u5MHH_3XNanmDHaXIpb9vy7RmDxSvFSL43e704Uw2h2g-OkgueKhS4OvBPwi_90kzli84Qg2KYZfb28vt17ihVZPk2qcA5r-1QDpDKqOOHAcjJuJClKl8AqxLDytt3Ca3hR-m68CA6MSIsA_Buy4F16Q_TIAw==&c=vMcJifDbIfJea9_gxhaTG5ajd-Bt5c_AwLA5gqAl8PpMFNRfi-vB6Q==&ch=uZ9i8Ie67CMSS8pDPgxXf2ZEEeCGgKSN90Rtfa1xXLkfSF8Q7QOJJw==) over the last decade, making it one of the [fastest growing large counties](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AaxToFr-j9w3_taGfKmnlHfiu5B7lFsIUF-nSLQK_jeufELnJ69cHcIniWvPwnN7LBBYTQ5M-I0S6gK4WR5t6BJzdtAVtzWExrSgTrGAozfNEaZN_RO7cJGTXtET9wbfGsj6_Ebgoqx91Aatl3DdSTmUV0ptRpLl7QLjSURk0kdLK-hWQQ23w9_7RiZ4gjSZKOthlVSYsMU=&c=vMcJifDbIfJea9_gxhaTG5ajd-Bt5c_AwLA5gqAl8PpMFNRfi-vB6Q==&ch=uZ9i8Ie67CMSS8pDPgxXf2ZEEeCGgKSN90Rtfa1xXLkfSF8Q7QOJJw==) in the nation.
Loeffler, who hasn't ruled out a rematch against Warnock next year, said even mobilizing a small fraction of disengaged conservatives could make a difference with election margins in Georgia so tight.
"We're keeping the tent up - we're not taking it down - and that's how we're going to grow it."
[Here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AaxToFr-j9w3_taGfKmnlHfiu5B7lFsIUF-nSLQK_jeufELnJ69cHcIniWvPwnN7x0bNY4sFi1amJohf9R48XjXOWDEVYGeUF5EYJ8wCHjUjKxGY1c5O_n6pS4TmCOU84vA2WbxN0K34bBJDntBGRIM4GJpQEKjwrnUhS4LAjJPshHPNbxq4vg==&c=vMcJifDbIfJea9_gxhaTG5ajd-Bt5c_AwLA5gqAl8PpMFNRfi-vB6Q==&ch=uZ9i8Ie67CMSS8pDPgxXf2ZEEeCGgKSN90Rtfa1xXLkfSF8Q7QOJJw==)'s a sample of the digital ads that will run in the region.

subject: [Add Your Name] Defend Roe v. Wade

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35109479/304055861/715298156?refcode=smp-em-header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWVjMjM3NC0xNTBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hqDGNF5wAqzlagDZjqPW0hCQkGHqJq0Xq5C6MqNriiE=)
Friends — This week, the Supreme Court allowed Texas’s extreme, restrictive abortion law to go into effect. The law bans abortions after six weeks of pregnancy and allows private citizens to sue abortion providers or anyone else who assists someone getting an abortion — even just by driving them to the clinic or helping cover the costs. And what’s also concerning is the Supreme Court’s silence on this matter, especially as Republican-led legislatures begin to return to session and consider these same kinds of restrictive measures in their states. This attack on women’s health care is a powerful reminder of the stakes in next year’s election — and why we must defend a Democratic Senate majority with the power to confirm or reject Supreme Court justices. The freedom for women to make their own health care decisions is on the ballot in 2022, and the contrast between the parties on this issue is crystal clear: while Senate Democrats are committed to protecting and expanding access to affordable health care for women and families, Republicans have shown they’ll use every tool they can, from the courts to Congress, to try and strip away health care coverage from women and families. We need to take immediate action today, so here is something you can do right now to support the women who will be impacted most by this cruel law and others like it gaining traction in state legislatures across the country. **Today we’re asking you to add your name and call on the Supreme Court to urgently act to protect access to safe and legal abortions. They cannot sit by while state legislatures attack reproductive freedoms.** | | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35109480/304055862/-1796862031?refcode=smp-em-210902-texas-petition-full&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWVjMjM3NC0xNTBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hqDGNF5wAqzlagDZjqPW0hCQkGHqJq0Xq5C6MqNriiE=&emci=69ed7de0-0a0c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=69ec2374-150c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=16186895)
---
Look, simply put: abortion is healthcare.
We must make sure it is treated as such and that anyone in any state can gain access to the care they need.
Thank you for stepping up today,
Defend the Senate

SMP 700 13th St NW Suite 800 Washington, DC 20005 United States

name: Herschel Walker
subject: I’m ready to go
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
I'm a conservative because I believe all people have the opportunity to pursue their dreams. |
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58239403:JFmxA82eN:m:1:3253819041:6CD9D1F73C7EB78D95DB0B52AF6A9555:r)

---
Peter,

Today in America, politicians pit American against American.

Rich vs. Poor. Black vs. White. Urban vs. Rural.

I don't believe in that garbage. It's a lie.

**[I'm Herschel Walker, and I want you to be among the first to know that I'm running to be the next United States Senator from Georgia.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58239403:JFmxA82eN:m:1:3253819041:6CD9D1F73C7EB78D95DB0B52AF6A9555:r)**

I'm a conservative who believes in smaller government, a strong military, personal responsibility, and making sure ALL people have the opportunity to pursue their dreams.

I will win this incredibly important race, but I need your help. **[I'm asking you to chip in whatever you can, whether it's $100, $50, or even just $10 to ensure I'm in the strongest starting position possible.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58239403:JFmxA82eN:m:1:3253819041:6CD9D1F73C7EB78D95DB0B52AF6A9555:r)**

[** Join My Offensive Team
Chip In Today -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58239403:JFmxA82eN:m:1:3253819041:6CD9D1F73C7EB78D95DB0B52AF6A9555:r)
At my core, I'm a runner. But I wasn't always fast.

I grew up in the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, where I learned discipline, faith in God, and the value of hard work. It's also where I trained non-stop and got _**real fast.**_

**I'm from a working-class family.** I was one of seven children, so you'd be correct to say my parents had their hands full. My childhood was a happy one - **even more so once I overcame a stutter and disciplined myself to get in strong physical shape.**

Growing up in Georgia, I learned about sacrificing the things you want in the moment for the future you know you can have ... _**if you work hard enough.**_

Growing up in Georgia, I also learned it doesn't matter where you come from, what your family has, or what color your skin is - if you want something bad enough and you're willing to work hard for it, you can achieve it.

You may know of me from my days playing college football at the University of Georgia, where I was awarded the Heisman Trophy in 1982.

I was blessed to be successful in college football, enough so that my college career paved the way for me to play football professionally for many years in the USFL and NFL.

My career took me all over the country. Despite living in New Jersey when I played for the Generals, Dallas when I played for the Cowboys, Minneapolis when I played for the Vikings, or Philadelphia and New York when I played for the Eagles and the Giants, respectively, **my heart was always in Georgia.**

And at this moment in time, I'm deeply concerned about the future of Georgia and our country.

**Unfortunately, a liberal Democrat was elected to the U.S. Senate from Georgia in a runoff election earlier this year, and he's now serving out the last two years of a beloved former Republican senator's term.**

**The future of Georgia - and our country - is too important for me to stand on the sideline as radical liberals take our country down the wrong path.**

_**That's why I'm running for the United States Senate.**_

[** Join My Offensive Team
Chip In Today -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58239403:JFmxA82eN:m:1:3253819041:6CD9D1F73C7EB78D95DB0B52AF6A9555:r)
I'm just a guy from a small town in Georgia who's been blessed by God to live the American Dream.

I'm ready to fight to keep that dream alive - for you too.

Very Respectfully,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58239403:JFmxA82eN:m:1:3253819041:6CD9D1F73C7EB78D95DB0B52AF6A9555:r)
Herschel Walker

P.S. The liberals in Washington are going to unleash everything they've got to defeat me, so I need you on my team. **[Please help my campaign get off to a critically important start by donating $10, $20, or even $50 today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58239403:JFmxA82eN:m:1:3253819041:6CD9D1F73C7EB78D95DB0B52AF6A9555:r)** Thank you.

[** CHIP IN NOW -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58239403:JFmxA82eN:m:1:3253819041:6CD9D1F73C7EB78D95DB0B52AF6A9555:r)

[
](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58239404:JFmxA82eN:m:1:3253819041:6CD9D1F73C7EB78D95DB0B52AF6A9555:r)

| | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC.
---

name: Marco Rubio
subject: Hey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
My race in Florida will be the most closely watched race in the entire country.
|
---
| | | | Peter,

My race in Florida will be the most closely watched race in the entire country. Here's a play-by-play of what is going on in the fight for the Senate and for Trump's Legacy:

**In just the past few months:**
* Fox News has said my race could be the most expensive ever.
* CNN continues to move my race up on their list of Top 10 seats most likely to flip.
* The DNC and DCCC outraised their Republican counterparts in July.
* My opponent raised $4.6 million in Quarter 2 while spending over $2.2 million in Facebook ads since the launch of her campaign.
* I am pacing to land short of my Quarter 3 goal and will be outraised again if we don't improve in September.

**In the last 24 hours since I last emailed you:**
* My liberal opponent has spent almost $20,000 more on ads.

**And by the time you have read this far into the email: **
* A Democrat has already donated $10 to flip the Senate and reverse everything we built under President Trump.

We will be hearing from our statewide Democratic candidates along with other special guests. name: Gwen Moore (personal)
subject: Everything is not better in Texas, especially if you’re a woman
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Gwen Moore for Congress
body:
Governor Greg Abbott said, '_Texans, not government, should decide their best health practices about children wearing masks at schools,_ ' **BUT NOT when it comes to women making decisions about their own bodies.**
Texas just passed a law that makes it illegal to have an abortion after six weeks of pregnancy, which is before many people even know they are pregnant. Six weeks? I'm not speaking out of school, but periods often don't come every six weeks.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/sGGA2tjH22j5VS4bVQYyO2dDOZfXY3uTuA6_liJZFTg=/id1KEjivIOuS__oUrT1NSjhjmae4btmh8BgWl7TKCjo=?refcode=090221)
This law is not only the first step to overturning Roe v. Wade, but it installed vigilante justice that rewards any private citizen if they report someone for simply helping a woman make an abortion decision. **This bill is so extreme that it does not include exceptions even in cases of rape or incest? Are you joking?**
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/sGGA2tjH22j5VS4bVQYyO2dDOZfXY3uTuA6_liJZFTg=/id1KEjivIOuS__oUrT1NSjhjmae4btmh8BgWl7TKCjo=?refcode=090221)
They say don't mess with Texas; I say don't mess with me. 80% of the country believes people should have access to safe and legal abortion. [_**I make no bones about the fact that I am 100% pro-choice. I will fight any and every attempt to take away a woman 's right to control her own body.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/sGGA2tjH22j5VS4bVQYyO2dDOZfXY3uTuA6_liJZFTg=/id1KEjivIOuS__oUrT1NSjhjmae4btmh8BgWl7TKCjo=?refcode=090221)

clean_body: Governor Greg Abbott said, 'Texans, not government, should decide their best health practices about children wearing masks at schools, ' BUT NOT when it comes to women making decisions about their own bodies. Texas just passed a law that makes it illegal to have an abortion after six weeks of pregnancy, which is before many people even know they are pregnant. Six weeks? I'm not speaking out of school, but periods often don't come every six weeks. This law is not only the first step to overturning Roe v. Wade, but it installed vigilante justice that rewards any private citizen if they report someone for simply helping a woman make an abortion decision. This bill is so extreme that it does not include exceptions even in cases of rape or incest? Are you joking? They say don't mess with Texas; I say don't mess with me. 80% of the country believes people should have access to safe and legal abortion. name: Nikki Fried
subject: It could happen in Florida
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Dear Friends,

Last night, the Supreme Court voted 5-4 to keep Texas' extreme anti-abortion law in place.

And just this morning, Florida's Senate President said he's "already working on" the same legislation right here in Florida. You can bet that Ron DeSantis can't wait to sign it, too.

I'm the ONLY candidate running for Governor who has always been pro-choice, and I'll fight every day to protect reproductive rights when I'm Governor.

Stopping Ron DeSantis is CRITICAL to protecting women across Florida. Help us fight back against his radical agenda by making a donation today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-protect-roe]

Let me be clear about this: access to healthcare is a matter of life and death. For me, this was never about politics—it’s about doing what’s right.

We need all hands on deck to make sure what happened in Texas doesn’t happen in Florida. That starts with defeating Ron DeSantis. If you’re with us on this, click here to chip in now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-protect-roe]

Thank you for your continued support.

Warmly,
Nikki

Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
Nikki Fried for Governor
6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148
Miami, FL 33143
United States

body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35113531/304070417/148142193?refcode=fl_email_pt_20210902tx_rs_active_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzRlMzg3Ny0yMDBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ll9UWYmtm7BegPKTZeztePamzQ1XPK7Po9ldgylb370=&emci=7877ec70-200c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=474e3877-200c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=21044445)

Team, Gubernatorial elections matter — just look at what’s happening in Texas right now. The Republican-led state legislature passed an extreme bill establishing **a six-week abortion ban** , preventing people from legally accessing abortion after six weeks of pregnancy. And far-right Governor Greg Abbott signed it into law. This backwards law also incentivizes people in and out of Texas to sue anyone — doctors, nurses, receptionists, friends, and family members — who helps a patient access an abortion after six weeks, by granting them a reward of at least $10,000. This is the most restrictive anti-choice bill in the country, and it almost happened right here in Iowa.**In 2018, extremists in Iowa’s state legislature passed a similar six-week abortion ban, and Governor Kim Reynolds even signed it, attacking Iowans’ right to choice.** Thankfully, it was struck down in a district court for violating our state constitution. I personally know the critical importance of having options. When my wife Amelia and I were first trying to have children, we unfortunately experienced multiple miscarriages. At one point when Amelia was pregnant, she told me something was wrong; I came home from work and found her curled up in pain. At the hospital, we sadly learned that my wife was experiencing an ectopic pregnancy that could end her life if we decided against terminating the pregnancy. Today, Amelia is still by my side and we have two beautiful daughters. As I told my colleagues in the state House earlier this year when opposing another anti-choice bill: _I’m glad my wife and I had a choice._ Every person and family, no matter where you live, deserves that same choice. That’s why — unlike Governor Reynolds — I’m committed to defending _Roe v. Wade_ and access to safe, legal, affordable abortion across Iowa. **[If you’re with me, add your name alongside mine in calling on the Biden Administration and Congress to stop this dangerous law in Texas and uphold every American’s right to reproductive choice established by _Roe v. Wade_.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35113532/304070418/148142193?refcode=fl_email_pt_20210902tx_rs_active_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzRlMzg3Ny0yMDBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ll9UWYmtm7BegPKTZeztePamzQ1XPK7Po9ldgylb370=&emci=7877ec70-200c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=474e3877-200c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=21044445)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35113533/304070419/148142193?refcode=fl_email_pt_20210902tx_rs_active_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzRlMzg3Ny0yMDBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ll9UWYmtm7BegPKTZeztePamzQ1XPK7Po9ldgylb370=&emci=7877ec70-200c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=474e3877-200c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=21044445)

clean_body: | Team, Gubernatorial elections matter — just look at what’s happening in Texas right now. The Republican-led state legislature passed an extreme bill establishing a six-week abortion ban , preventing people from legally accessing abortion after six weeks of pregnancy. And far-right Governor Greg Abbott signed it into law. This backwards law also incentivizes people in and out of Texas to sue anyone — doctors, nurses, receptionists, friends, and family members — who helps a patient access an abortion after six weeks, by granting them a reward of at least $10,000. This is the most restrictive anti-choice bill in the country, and it almost happened right here in Iowa.In 2018, extremists in Iowa’s state legislature passed a similar six-week abortion ban, and Governor Kim Reynolds even signed it, attacking Iowans’ right to choice. Thankfully, it was struck down in a district court for violating our state constitution. I personally know the critical importance of having options. When my wife Amelia and I were first trying to have children, we unfortunately experienced multiple miscarriages. At one point when Amelia was pregnant, she told me something was wrong; I came home from work and found her curled up in pain. At the hospital, we sadly learned that my wife was experiencing an ectopic pregnancy that could end her life if we decided against terminating the pregnancy. Today, Amelia is still by my side and we have two beautiful daughters. As I told my colleagues in the state House earlier this year when opposing another anti-choice bill: I’m glad my wife and I had a choice. Every person and family, no matter where you live, deserves that same choice. That’s why — unlike Governor Reynolds — I’m committed to defending Roe v. Wade and access to safe, legal, affordable abortion across Iowa. | Thank you, Ras | Paid for by Ras Smith for Governor Ras Smith for Governor P. O. Box 1651 Waterloo, IA 50704 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Laura Loomer
subject: The Devil vs Daniel Webster
body:
Within minutes of me announcing my intent to unseat Do-Nothing Republican Dan Webster, leftists on Twitter were calling the race, "The Devil vs Daniel Webster."
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/9Kv8926XfvCAJUQQapX2zRPA/NpQKJCCx16uTq7dkSzR3bg)
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/9Kv8926XfvCAJUQQapX2zRPA/NpQKJCCx16uTq7dkSzR3bg) Within minutes of me announcing my intent to unseat Do-Nothing Republican Dan Webster in Florida's 11th District, leftists on Twitter were calling the race, "The Devil vs Daniel Webster."

**You know I 'm on the right side of this race if radical leftists are running to defend a sitting Republican member of Congress!**

We made progress yesterday, but we need to close out the week strong by getting closer to our goal. [**Have you donated?**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/9Kv8926XfvCAJUQQapX2zRPA/NpQKJCCx16uTq7dkSzR3bg)

Do-Nothing Dan is sitting on $300k for his campaign.

While that's a lot of money, we can quickly catch up - [**and I have to get you on board for that**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/9Kv8926XfvCAJUQQapX2zRPA/NpQKJCCx16uTq7dkSzR3bg).

Ironically, my opponent campaigns to "clean up Washington", but he's been there for nearly a decade and it's only gotten worse!

Before that, Webster spent another 31 years in the Florida legislature. **He 's been an elected politician for 41 years!!!**

What has changed in just the last 10 years while Webster has been in Congress?
> The Federal Deficit went from $1.5 trillion to $3 trillion.
> The Federal Budget has jumped by $2 trillion.
> Taxes are higher.
> Freedom is lower.
>
> **And for the first time since 1993, Democrats control both chambers of Congress and the White House!**
When politicians do nothing but hold their seats in Congress, they fail to inspire, they fail to lead, and most importantly, they fail to implement change.

All they do is cling to power and win the next election based on their incumbency.

[**Let 's change this together!**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/9Kv8926XfvCAJUQQapX2zRPA/NpQKJCCx16uTq7dkSzR3bg)

If you haven't already, please support my campaign today.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

name: PramilaForCongress.com
subject: 5-4: Supreme Court allows TX abortion restrictions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
It’s even more critical that we support advocacy for abortion rights and reproductive health today.
#
Peter,
Late last night, the conservative Supreme Court ruled in a 5-4 decision that the most extreme abortion ban in the country could remain in effect. It could be the end of _Roe v. Wade._
**It’s even more critical that we support advocacy for abortion rights and reproductive health today.**
**[Yesterday, we raised $1,231 for the Planned Parenthood Action Fund — can you help us increase that to $3,000 raised in total? Split a $3 donation right now to Pramila’s campaign and Planned Parenthood Action to help us defend reproductive rights in the weeks and months to come.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210902?refcode=em20210902-598&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&refcode2=598_420207_ZG7f75&akid=598%2E420207%2EZG7f75)**
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210902?refcode=em20210902-598&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=598_420207_ZG7f75&akid=598%2E420207%2EZG7f75)**
The law passed by Republicans in Texas and allowed to remain in effect by conservatives on the Supreme Court bans abortions after six weeks for the millions of people across Texas. _That’s before many people even know they are pregnant._
Now, abortion rights and reproductive health is under direct threat all across the country. This is the most serious, imminent threat to _Roe v. Wade_ since the ruling nearly 5 decades ago.
[**We must continue our collective activism and advocacy to protect reproductive freedom in America. Help us raise another $1,769 for Planned Parenthood Action Fund today by splitting a $3 contribution between our campaign and PPAF right now. The fight continues, Peter.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210902?refcode=em20210902-598&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=598_420207_ZG7f75&akid=598%2E420207%2EZG7f75)
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210902-598-footer&t=23&refcode2=598_420207_ZG7f75&akid=598%2E420207%2EZG7f75)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

name: Lidia Vargas
subject: I don’t normally ask, but it’s Tony’s birthday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony Vargas for Congress
body:
I’m reaching out for a very special reason.

|
---

| | [**_Hi! Please let me introduce myself. I’m Tony’s mom, Lidia — and I’m reaching out for a very special reason. Will you help me reach 450 grassroots donations for Tony’s birthday? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35113985/304072350/1129282168?refcode=20210902_em_fr_b1_lv_30op&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTQ1OWMwZS0yMjBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f12q6gsTHjG3wISVXzTNh2ZGy1KFlgSEOoMZbi284Us=) I know you don’t usually hear from a candidate’s mom!

But I’m here today with a quick request to help make Tony’s birthday extra special.

Seeing him build this race for Congress makes me so proud.

Tony’s dad and I always told him: **[_'Keep your feet on the ground, but reach for the stars.'_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35113986/304072351/1129282168?refcode=20210902_em_fr_b1_lv_30op&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTQ1OWMwZS0yMjBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f12q6gsTHjG3wISVXzTNh2ZGy1KFlgSEOoMZbi284Us=)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35113987/304072352/1129282168?refcode=20210902_em_fr_b1_lv_30op&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTQ1OWMwZS0yMjBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f12q6gsTHjG3wISVXzTNh2ZGy1KFlgSEOoMZbi284Us=)
_Tony's 2nd Birthday_ [**_Tony's been working so hard to connect with voters, raise money, and win this toss-up race -- he won’t even take a break to celebrate! So I’m doing what moms do: I’m stepping in to help him out. I’m determined to raise 450 donations before midnight for my son’s birthday to keep his campaign running strong. Can I count on you to chip in $10 before Tony’s birthday is over? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35113988/304072353/1129282168?refcode=20210902_em_fr_b1_lv_30op&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTQ1OWMwZS0yMjBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f12q6gsTHjG3wISVXzTNh2ZGy1KFlgSEOoMZbi284Us=)

Let me tell you a little bit about my son, Tony.

He is the son of two immigrant parents.

We came here so we could give our family a life full of more possibilities than we had back in Perú.

**[But I never could have imagined just how high Tony would reach.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35113989/304072354/1129282168?refcode=20210902_em_fr_b1_lv_30op&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTQ1OWMwZS0yMjBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f12q6gsTHjG3wISVXzTNh2ZGy1KFlgSEOoMZbi284Us=)**

He was in the first generation of our family to graduate from college.

Then he became a teacher so he could help more kids like him.

He became a school board member and then he ran and won a State Senate seat.

And now he’s exceeding all our expectations and running a strong, principled campaign for Congress.

[**_Tony has never backed down against the odds. It’s one of the reasons I’m so proud to be his mother. I know Tony can win his race for Congress, but I also know we all have to band together to help him. Tony’s dad and I always told him: = = Tony's 2nd Birthday = Let me tell you a little bit about my son, Tony. He is the son of two immigrant parents. We came here so we could give our family a life full of more possibilities than we had back in Perú. = He was in the first generation of our family to graduate from college. Then he became a teacher so he could help more kids like him. He became a school board member and then he ran and won a State Senate seat. body:
As a Veteran of Operation Enduring Freedom, I never thought I’d live to see the day when our own President would willingly abandon our American Servic | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8c4318963bbb4aa09f68f560f8e0b5ed&_e=nXLPv0JuRMXW7zw5VjPB9dF4URpZI5r1kmKi4_lt3Us9dRUnZjdFQ8yV5n4zF86vAok0_SQEc-6x01vEcn_rybjEBYI0i7ZbfdubyD4X0TtdZtTsQqaVYS5JyVFsKy9zsFlR_f1E1SpLX-JQk82u2OPQFISryNP-kD85HzvfjL0m5eFHxftUnPS-mVwUUJ8NDMDVN2jvB2cqCRt5sQ3ITg6LlqVj89HQadF4uN9hzZLhn7GOK_J_1KmsqbmqcXAdQNY79u_9YrjlNhtaeaamsyWQpEA3U7VaFnqQmlWI8mYWDskVjoBr3Ync9SV9ryeXi9SqIedXCGn880VRiG1myBgax-5OQ7tSAqixRGiUlTgt0_diH_GvtwfyaWmw1rlVqW7zzS3e8BvixYPqvPok4-gDsKlE832xavwk_3VPMFAgz5F75kWcPXTEsMi1hlRju46GfShfzJ-063HtxJI_fQ%3D%3D)

Fellow conservative,

As a Veteran of Operation Enduring Freedom, I never thought I’d live to see the day when our own President would willingly abandon our Americans behind enemy lines.

Not only did Biden’s Afghanistan debacle get 13 US Troops killed, but his administration handed the Taliban a list of Americans behind enemy lines!

**The Taliban now have a HIT LIST supplied by our own American President!** I can't imagine a bigger betrayal of his office.

**I'm calling on Biden to resign IMMEDIATELY.** [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8c4318963bbb4aa09f68f560f8e0b5ed&_e=nXLPv0JuRMXW7zw5VjPB9dF4URpZI5r1kmKi4_lt3Us9dRUnZjdFQ8yV5n4zF86vAok0_SQEc-6x01vEcn_rybjEBYI0i7ZbfdubyD4X0TtdZtTsQqaVYS5JyVFsKy9zsFlR_f1E1SpLX-JQk82u2OPQFISryNP-kD85HzvfjL0m5eFHxftUnPS-mVwUUJ8NDMDVN2jvB2cqCRt5sQ3ITg6LlqVj89HQadF4uN9hzZLhn7GOK_J_1KmsqbmqcXAdy6eIPomHYAFXiY1lV-fkP6MkAKTa5Gs5ubz1aY2eP0Foq2af_oBod4VUIjDD80HBMViV3POmbEy8dBJhtGHnUI_Jc7KJgTCMcOZeA-Uhz3Z_HHXYqyJcNEOmfB6yZDRYxHA-PyIqkJVQwE1EDp5nRCK5R0WraMcfpTYE6TwypQGb6cNClj9u3f-Q2pIQqfWe5O9iIYu_SvzGR09VXssKGg%3D%3D)

I was on the frontlines in Afghanistan. I nearly lost my life at the hands of the Taliban. I know from first-hand experience that this was a failure of bureaucrats and a collapse in leadership at the very top. _**And now Biden needs to be held accountable and RESIGN for the good of the country.**_

This has been a tragic month for America and her Military. But with real leadership in Washington we can move our Country forward to avoid the betrayals of this administration.

[**That’s why I’m asking for your help to send me to Washington as your next Senator so we can stop another catastrophe like this from ever happening again.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8c4318963bbb4aa09f68f560f8e0b5ed&_e=nXLPv0JuRMXW7zw5VjPB9dF4URpZI5r1kmKi4_lt3Us9dRUnZjdFQ8yV5n4zF86vAok0_SQEc-6x01vEcn_rybjEBYI0i7ZbfdubyD4X0TtdZtTsQqaVYS5JyVFsKy9zsFlR_f1E1SpLX-JQk82u2OPQFISryNP-kD85HzvfjL0m5eFHxftUnPS-mVwUUJ8NDMDVN2jvB2cqCRt5sQ3ITg6LlqVj89HQadF4uN9hzZLhn7GOK_J_1KmsqbmqcXAdcNGBTaGwyE-ADt1YIqmdyfA36HI4kndzQZOshk23hCss6tBwdBc5r4BRhl3AIuSmpuMX55TrIs2jhgROICj5eCy7dC58KhrcIu_GMd6EBr3AGDoGCaw4d0ZwN5P9z-vryHD5eHbw_bI05NzLJUeb5ekjXKksywBZc2YqpDSbZM6EVdUBK9-UDnLX68MjtFGHbD8EW2rZiUZAiVjXOJzWGQ%3D%3D)

| [Send Capt. Sam Brown
to Congress](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8c4318963bbb4aa09f68f560f8e0b5ed&_e=nXLPv0JuRMXW7zw5VjPB9dF4URpZI5r1kmKi4_lt3Us9dRUnZjdFQ8yV5n4zF86vAok0_SQEc-6x01vEcn_rybjEBYI0i7ZbfdubyD4X0TtdZtTsQqaVYS5JyVFsKy9zsFlR_f1E1SpLX-JQk82u2OPQFISryNP-kD85HzvfjL0m5eFHxftUnPS-mVwUUJ8NDMDVN2jvB2cqCRt5sQ3ITg6LlqVj89HQadF4uN9hzZLhn7GOK_J_1KmsqbmqcXAdxIEoSJAJUp6DpjkBuZiuanzEr1sGfR3o2NBZUgCMRGkgqzC8sadSJQFYgX_45vfVGcmB_xjgWIQBwMk6uMpTGbqwOqnnofamrx_vyrkIQdRIQL5EJR2wNCmdzK1IU9tvILYBn5xLXVCobTxpjAisc1yQZeRdyyk1ZS8Ck-_r8uIMCKSGyYBnWTnilXaHEpJueEfekz6uJUdJE0ty5STfSQ%3D%3D)
---

I didn’t fight the Taliban just to see my own Country sell out my fellow Americans to the same enemy that tried to have me killed. Our Veterans and our Country deserve more from their leaders.

[**Send this Veteran to Congress so Americans never have to witness the same tragedy we witnessed last week.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8c4318963bbb4aa09f68f560f8e0b5ed&_e=nXLPv0JuRMXW7zw5VjPB9dF4URpZI5r1kmKi4_lt3Us9dRUnZjdFQ8yV5n4zF86vAok0_SQEc-6x01vEcn_rybjEBYI0i7ZbfdubyD4X0TtdZtTsQqaVYS5JyVFsKy9zsFlR_f1E1SpLX-JQk82u2OPQFISryNP-kD85HzvfjL0m5eFHxftUnPS-mVwUUJ8NDMDVN2jvB2cqCRt5sQ3ITg6LlqVj89HQadF4uN9hzZLhn7GOK_J_1KmsqbmqcXAd0Owqjgzn3majKiJhkZu454yC7PJjwToIjv7v1syWannZFWoDB2-x8WxebamrLzyWyTP19jcaUeyvbYW16AG1B0KBK3YwS1EepaJbjMi7gA5sXmgbEmib3hEgFt9y47igEEZfrLeY_QiN9dVTr-Z0TwlW0B09NwQSXzaa8LwX5cjWn5rmz5uyh8cSLaqY-cgULXWwdyhl6mjUXZfSPIJ9IA%3D%3D)

clean_body: As a Veteran of Operation Enduring Freedom, I never thought I’d live to see the day when our own President would willingly abandon our American Servic | Fellow conservative, As a Veteran of Operation Enduring Freedom, I never thought I’d live to see the day when our own President would willingly abandon our Americans behind enemy lines. Not only did Biden’s Afghanistan debacle get 13 US Troops killed, but his administration handed the Taliban a list of Americans behind enemy lines! The Taliban now have a HIT LIST supplied by our own American President! I can't imagine a bigger betrayal of his office. I'm calling on Biden to resign IMMEDIATELY. I was on the frontlines in Afghanistan. I nearly lost my life at the hands of the Taliban. I know from first-hand experience that this was a failure of bureaucrats and a collapse in leadership at the very top. And now Biden needs to be held accountable and RESIGN for the good of the country. This has been a tragic month for America and her Military. But with real leadership in Washington we can move our Country forward to avoid the betrayals of this administration. | I didn’t fight the Taliban just to see my own Country sell out my fellow Americans to the same enemy that tried to have me killed. Our Veterans and our Country deserve more from their leaders. For America, Capt. Sam Brown | | Paid for by Sam Brown for Nevada Military references and photos do not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense or any Service Branch. name: MarkKelly.com
subject: you've been selected —> September state of the race and issue survey
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Team -
Occasionally, we like to check in with some of Mark Kelly's top supporters to see how you think he's doing in the Senate, how the race is going, and what issues are important to you.
Today is that day.
[**Can you please take two minutes to sound off on Mark Kelly's September state of the race and issue survey?**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-sept-issue-survey/?source=em210902-1-15&refcode2=1264.6688874.jxBGiB&t=1&akid=1264%2E6688874%2EjxBGiB)
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-sept-issue-survey/?source=em210902-1-15&refcode2=1264.6688874.jxBGiB&t=2&akid=1264%2E6688874%2EjxBGiB)**
Our objective here is to send out this survey from time to time, keeping the questions mostly the same in the hopes that we can track how responses evolve over time.
Hearing directly from those who support Mark the most, and even those who don’t, is extraordinarily helpful to our campaign.
So please:
[**Can you take two minutes to complete our very short Team Kelly state of the race and issue survey today?**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-sept-issue-survey/?source=em210902-1-15&refcode2=1264.6688874.jxBGiB&t=3&akid=1264%2E6688874%2EjxBGiB)
Thank you in advance for making your voice heard. Means a lot.
All our best,
Team Kelly
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-sept-issue-survey/?source=em210902-1-15&refcode2=1264.6688874.jxBGiB&t=4&akid=1264%2E6688874%2EjxBGiB)**

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=5&akid=1264%2E6688874%2EjxBGiB).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: Giffords
subject: Add your name if you agree with the CDC that gun violence is a public health threat
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
After decades of near silence from the CDC, Director Rochelle Walensky finally called gun violence “a serious public health threat.”
#

Friend —
After decades of near silence from the CDC, Director Rochelle Walensky finally called gun violence “a serious public health threat.”
In an interview with CNN, Walensky stated, “Something has to be done about this...Now is the time.”
[**Do you agree? Then add your name to show your support for Dr. Walensky and make it clear that Americans consider gun violence a public health threat that needs to be addressed.**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/cdc_petition/?source=em210902-1-15&refcode2=826.3935704.HynyaF&t=1&akid=826%2E3935704%2EHynyaF)
[](https://go.giffords.org/signup/cdc_petition/?source=em210902-1-15&refcode2=826.3935704.HynyaF&t=2&akid=826%2E3935704%2EHynyaF)
The truth is, the NRA and their successor the National Sports Shooting Foundation have very loud voices, and they hold a lot of power in Washington.
The only way we beat them is if our movement is LOUDER with even MORE VOICES.
[**So please, add your name to say you agree with the CDC that gun violence is a serious public health threat.**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/cdc_petition/?source=em210902-1-15&refcode2=826.3935704.HynyaF&t=3&akid=826%2E3935704%2EHynyaF)
Thank you for using your voice.
The team at Giffords
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.giffords.org/signup/cdc_petition/?source=em210902-1-15&refcode2=826.3935704.HynyaF&t=4&akid=826%2E3935704%2EHynyaF)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=826%2E3935704%2EHynyaF) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

The Far-Left leadership has been a disaster for the well-being of our nation. Unnecessary spending, uncontrolled immigration, mask mandates, vaccine passports, and defunded police are not the policies Americans want for their country or their communities.

clean_body: Politico: “Democrats face enthusiasm test” | | | = | | Derek, we were shocked and confused when we saw this article about the latest poll: “The Virginia poll also contains some warning signs for Democrats that their voters are less engaged than Republicans'.” – POLITICO Derek, we are up against a right-wing extremist who’s been endorsed by Donald Trump three times. He’s a self-funded billionaire who made his fortune by screwing over the little guy at a notoriously ruthless private equity firm. He even sees Ted Cruz as a mentor. He represents the future of Trumpism in America, Derek, and he’s all wrong for Virginia. So why aren’t Democrats fired up to beat this guy? = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = Derek, the only way we’re going to beat an extremist like Glenn Youngkin is by building a massive grassroots movement with supporters who are fired up to defend Virginia. So at this point in the election, it’s pretty devastating to learn that we might lose simply because folks aren’t engaged enough. Some recent polls show a tied race — we can’t afford to have anyone sit on the sidelines for this one. = | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks for doing what you can, Team Terry =** Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click._ Paid for by Terry for Virginia

body:
My race in Florida will be the most closely watched race in the entire country.
|

| | | | Peter,

My race in Florida will be the most closely watched race in the entire country. Here's a play-by-play of what is going on in the fight for the Senate and for Trump's Legacy:

**In just the past few months:**
* Fox News has said my race could be the most expensive ever.
* CNN continues to move my race up on their list of Top 10 seats most likely to flip.
* The DNC and DCCC outraised their Republican counterparts in July.
* My opponent raised $4.6 million in Quarter 2 while spending over $2.2 million in Facebook ads since the launch of her campaign.
* I am pacing to land short of my Quarter 3 goal and will be outraised again if we don't improve in September.

**In the last 24 hours since I last emailed you:**
* My liberal opponent has spent almost $20,000 more on ads.

**And by the time you have read this far into the email: **
* A Democrat has already donated $10 to flip the Senate and reverse everything we built under President Trump.

This is what we are up against, Peter. **[To hold our own against the Democrats, will you donate $10 of your own to fight back against the Left?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58241948:6w2Wu82aN:m:1:3253819041:CE93DA2E136C3A9BC8676524722EB967:r "To hold our own

| Dear Patriot, It's happening again. First, YouTube suspended my account for telling the truth about masks. _Thankfully, your generous contributions allowed me to stay afloat during that difficult time, and make sure my voice was still heard. I am extremely grateful for that._ But now, Twitter is going on a rampage against dissident voices. My ability to get information out to the public is once again in dire jeopardy. The Left is on a non-stop crusade to erase my voice completely. The number of people who have been silenced by Twitter recently is stunning: ***** Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene, a duly elected Congresswoman, was suspended by Twitter this month.** ***** The Press Secretary for Florida Gov. Ron Desantis, one of the leading figures in the Republican Party, was also suspended from her Twitter account this month.** ***** Former New York Times reporter Alex Berenson was completely banned from Twitter for having an alternative view on the COVID-19 pandemic.** This is a free speech crisis, and it requires immediate action. Recently, I told you about my move over to Rumble, an upstart free-speech competitor to YouTube. Now, in preparation for Twitter coming after me, I have begun posting on LibertyTree.com, another free-speech friendly site. However, these websites are both very small compared to the behemoths that are YouTube and Twitter. Getting my message out to the public without the use of those platforms will be difficult -- and very expensive. And all this comes at a time when I am facing a well-funded challenge to my Senate seat by a radical Bernie supporter in the 2022 elections. His message of socialism will be plastered all over every social media site, with millions of dollars in Left-wing money to back him up. And my voice on those platforms may soon be completely silent. That's why I urgently need your help, before it's too late. clean_body: | | | | | | | Dear Patriot, It's happening again. First, YouTube suspended my account for telling the truth about masks. Thankfully, your generous contributions allowed me to stay afloat during that difficult time, and make sure my voice was still heard. I am extremely grateful for that. But now, Twitter is going on a rampage against dissident voices. My ability to get information out to the public is once again in dire jeopardy. The Left is on a non-stop crusade to erase my voice completely. The number of people who have been silenced by Twitter recently is stunning: *** Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene, a duly elected Congresswoman, was suspended by Twitter this month. *** The Press Secretary for Florida Gov. Ron Desantis, one of the leading figures in the Republican Party, was also suspended from her Twitter account this month. *** Former New York Times reporter Alex Berenson was completely banned from Twitter for having an alternative view on the COVID-19 pandemic. This is a free speech crisis, and it requires immediate action. Recently, I told you about my move over to Rumble, an upstart free-speech competitor to YouTube. Now, in preparation for Twitter coming after me, I have begun posting on LibertyTree.com, another free-speech friendly site. However, these websites are both very small compared to the behemoths that are YouTube and Twitter. Getting my message out to the public without the use of those platforms will be difficult -- and very expensive. And all this comes at a time when I am facing a well-funded challenge to my Senate seat by a radical Bernie supporter in the 2022 elections. His message of socialism will be plastered all over every social media site, with millions of dollars in Left-wing money to back him up. And my voice on those platforms may soon be completely silent. That's why I urgently need your help, before it's too late. I am posting regularly on and \-- two websites that are free-speech alternatives to Big Tech. But both of those sites are still small compared to the behemoths in Silicon Valley. And I'm concerned that soon, only Left-wing politicians will have access to those sites -- because conservatives like me will be banned. I have to spread my message through alternate channels, but that is going to be tremendously expensive. I don't have Leftists like George Soros or Michael Bloomberg shoveling millions of dollars at me, the way Democrat politicians do. If I'm going to survive this onslaught from Big Tech, and continue to get information out to the public, I need your support. In order to prevent the radical Left from taking my Senate seat, I must have the resources to continue reaching millions of people without the help of YouTube and Twitter. In Liberty, Rand Paul | | | | | | | ****P.S. - YouTube has already suspended me once for telling the truth about masks. And now Twitter is going on a rampage against conservative voices, and there is a giant target on my back. I am being targeted by Big Tech right in the middle of a heated Senate race -- one where my socialist opponent is raking in huge bucks. I have already begun moving to free-speech platforms, such as Rumble and Liberty Tree, in preparation for this onslaught of censorship. But both of those sites are still small compared to the behemoths in Silicon Valley. Making sure that my voice is still heard will be extremely difficult -- and expensive. | | | | Paid for by Rand Paul for US Senate | No longer want to receive these emails? . body:
If we want to keep the Senate in Democratic hands, we have to keep Georgia blue. | | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35115985/304081502/683353327?refcode=20210902_TM_FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2QyYzlmNy0yODBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uZYJZk_g-i7g9wB2TsrwHHaVb-0BW21wrnfD40lak-4=) Friend: In a moment, I'm going to ask you to pitch in to my reelection campaign before our critical midnight deadline — so we can keep Georgia blue and protect our Democratic Senate majority. **But first, let me explain why your support is so critical — and what could happen to the future of our progressive agenda without it.** My journey to becoming Georgia's first-ever Black senator was an unlikely one. I wasn't born with a silver spoon in my mouth — I had 11 brothers and sisters and grew up in public housing. But through hard work and the support of my community, I went on to become the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church. Now, this kid from the housing projects is fighting in the Senate to build a government that works for everyone — not just those at the top. Since day one, I've made my priorities clear: Pass the For the People Act to defend voting rights and strengthen our democracy, raise the minimum wage and build an economy that works for everyone, and expand affordable health care so filling a prescription doesn't break the bank. But here's the honest truth: I simply can't win these critical fights for justice without grassroots folks like you by my side — so I have to ask: [**Will you split a $10 donation right now between our campaign and Seth Moulton so we can hit our crucial midnight fundraising goal, power our reelection campaign to victory, and protect our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35115986/304081503/-2107361499?refcode=20210902_TM_FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2QyYzlmNy0yODBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uZYJZk_g-i7g9wB2TsrwHHaVb-0BW21wrnfD40lak-4=) With the Senate split 50-50, Republicans need to flip only one seat to put Mitch McConnell back in power — and election experts from The Washington Post to NBC News confirm that I'm the GOP's top target for defeat. This means that Democrats' razor-thin majority in the Senate will be in serious danger if we don't have the resources to keep Georgia blue. **But right now, we're not on track to raise the $15,000 we need to fight back against GOP attacks and win in Georgia. The ONLY way I can close this budget gap is with _your_ grassroots support, friend. ** My last election was one of the most expensive races in history, and there's no question that the GOP will spend MILLIONS on top of millions to try and crush our people-powered movement again. **We can't let them. If we want to keep the Senate in Democratic hands, we have to keep Georgia blue. So please, I'm personally asking:** [**Before our critical midnight deadline, will you split a $10 donation between our campaign and Seth Moulton so we can win in Georgia, protect our Democratic Senate majority and continue fighting for our progressive values?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35115987/304081504/-2107361499?refcode=20210902_TM_FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2QyYzlmNy0yODBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uZYJZk_g-i7g9wB2TsrwHHaVb-0BW21wrnfD40lak-4=) Thanks for fighting alongside me at moments like these — I appreciate you. — Raphael

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35115988/304081505/1848844371?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2QyYzlmNy0yODBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uZYJZk_g-i7g9wB2TsrwHHaVb-0BW21wrnfD40lak-4=&emci=be354123-280c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=57d2c9f7-280c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=194769) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35115989/304081506/-1745464800?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2QyYzlmNy0yODBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uZYJZk_g-i7g9wB2TsrwHHaVb-0BW21wrnfD40lak-4=&emci=be354123-280c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=57d2c9f7-280c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=194769) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35115990/304081507/341442065?hl=en&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2QyYzlmNy0yODBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uZYJZk_g-i7g9wB2TsrwHHaVb-0BW21wrnfD40lak-4=&emci=be354123-280c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=57d2c9f7-280c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=194769) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35115991/304081508/-368236352?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2QyYzlmNy0yODBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uZYJZk_g-i7g9wB2TsrwHHaVb-0BW21wrnfD40lak-4=&emci=be354123-280c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=57d2c9f7-280c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=194769)

NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com

QUICKLY: Do you think Republicans are wrong to obstruct the investigation into the January 6 insurrection?](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Ra_)

[ANSWER THE POLL NOW >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/k2R-)
_To ensure our data is representative of the country, we 're requesting 200 responses from your state -- including 15 from your community. Please submit your feedback straight away!_

---

We're sick to our stomachs.

**FIRST: **Trump and his Republicans spent months LYING about election fraud and UNDERMINING our democracy.

**THEN:** They incited a deadly insurrection at the Capitol to OVERTURN the results of the 2020 election.

**NOW: **[**They 're doing everything in their power to DERAIL our Democrats' efforts to investigate that horrific day and hold its perpetrators accountable.**](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/_)****

One thing is clear: **Trump and his Republicans think they can get away with one of the worst attacks on our democracy in history.**

And right now, they're betting that grassroots Democrats like you will pack up, go home, and forget January 6 ever happened.

We can't bear the thought of Republicans being proven right about this team.

[**That 's why we're calling on 15 of our very best supporters from your area to ****take our poll and let us know where they stand on this critical issue.**** Can we count on your feedback straight away?**](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/D_)

__
Thanks,

DCCC

subject: In the end, the good guys will win.

body:
A terrorist emerged from the bathroom, bare-chested and armed with an assault rifle, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=b0398fe824cc4356ab646ca5cbcb5ffd&_e=OKnm8UGeJQBBMrBm0YWAN1athXpFCLWQnot5emVlu-Gb6OP94SfVXIRJCzd6LtMs57ERXn-3JW_1_VkSVqg2jxepB9zhl_eX3GspeRMuHJ5GfuXPNwCE4w3h2Zd6GLkywA-ce39kiQlqbIvmRR8Msb82dHMdphFt8dIOSBi-SkQBHC2dw0QXwZwkdEsIIm9-Pgb_9L4kQZFF0Rr6lgLwJ7_ICqbcffS9ZfDm_yBqEnPIKGM9jVzExffRjZp4vu9YBhdeg3g5g8qxWTQX91l7_OsZ2-2l_i3SJGWgIp91gtW4qKpFDL5U8mItAK7ShRrPDXCGGXd0cvs4AlgfJs9LHwwOAyzWSNJ5fySLyXsemXub1WRsBK9e-voo_0-6b3SMnjUvavByWiAR7nq1wOjY5Og9aDMelj7I_fIQ1dFVXWZfJpGsuCJ5_IlCEDKKX366kEK68evHoK_SKY70ps3htJZ1__Q4l9ihLrGa9nlrnBI%3D)
---
Peter,

Like so many Americans, I am watching the scenes coming out of Afghanistan with disbelief, extreme sadness and even anger. You see, I served the greatest country on Earth in Afghanistan back in 2015. But Afghanistan wasn't the only place I looked terrorism directly in the eyes...

**August 21 st marked six years since the fateful late-summer afternoon that changed my life and those of my two best friends - forever.**

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=b0398fe824cc4356ab646ca5cbcb5ffd&_e=OKnm8UGeJQBBMrBm0YWAN1athXpFCLWQnot5emVlu-Gb6OP94SfVXIRJCzd6LtMs57ERXn-3JW_1_VkSVqg2jxepB9zhl_eX3GspeRMuHJ5GfuXPNwCE4w3h2Zd6GLkywA-ce39kiQlqbIvmRR8Msb82dHMdphFt8dIOSBi-SkQBHC2dw0QXwZwkdEsIIm9-Pgb_9L4kQZFF0Rr6lgLwJ7_ICqbcffS9ZfDm_yBqEnPIKGM9jVzExffRjZp4vu9YPVjYo-ECumqKnBC9RaObxeQeagbIRoNsHkDO0gsQlhNvT8Py_WSaedaD-0b-sK-MjEhfjGNekDP1S4Tj29owUyr_UmgUg1CYOHMVcRQWAoJcssbRHfO8kNGGNk3gImc_5bPskf8hw0wmz9pygqF3KqGnDyBU_qnBSieJlbDg9-b7blrM9tkvH-a5gW_FEhvUxF0RsS8CKxdr03U4jyJrQwD0XS_fzkz3AG54mNMzvv8%3D)
I had just finished serving our great nation in Afghanistan when my best friends and I decided to take a vacation in Europe. We were traveling on a Paris-bound train when a terrorist emerged from the bathroom, bare-chested and armed with an assault rifle, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take over and kill us all.

As a soldier, I was trained to take out a terrorist threat -As an American, I was taught to stand up for freedom no matter where I was in the world. **Which is why I, my friends and other brave travelers took the action needed to stop this terrorist.**

This split-second decision prevented what witnesses contend could have become a mass slaughter. There is a reason I was able to make this split-second decision to intervene, Peter - **I have and always will be willing to give my life in the fight for freedom, in the image of true American values.**

[**At the end of this email, I am going to ask you to donate $6 to my campaign for Congress, in honor of the sixth anniversary of the Thalys train attack. name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch: Secret Service Records Show Biden Dog Major Repeatedly Bit Secret Service Personnel
body:
Judicial Watch announced recently that it received 36 pages of records communications from the Secret Service that show the Bidens’ dog Major was responsible for numerous biting incidents of Secret Service personnel.

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Aug 30, 2021
---|---|---
## Today's Top Stories
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56566&L=25697&F=H&) | **[Court Rules Judicial Watch Lawsuit Can Proceed against Colorado Officials to Force Cleanup of State’s Voter Rolls](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56566&L=25697&F=H&)** Judicial Watch filed the lawsuit October 5, 2020, in the U.S. District Court for the District of Colorado on behalf of itself and three residents of Colorado against Jena Griswold, Colorado Secretary of State, and the State of Colorado for failing to clean the state’s voter rolls as required by the National Voter Registration Act of 1993 (NVRA). The court’s recent ruling to allow Judicial Watch’s claims to proceed came after Colorado’s motion to dismiss the case, which the court denied in all key respects. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56566&L=25697&F=H&)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56566&L=25724&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvYmlkZW4tZG9nLW1ham9yLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA5MDIxNjE0MTQ=) | **[Judicial Watch: Secret Service Records Show Biden Dog Major Repeatedly Bit Secret Service Personnel](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56566&L=25724&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvYmlkZW4tZG9nLW1ham9yLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA5MDIxNjE0MTQ=)** Judicial Watch announced recently that it received 36 pages of records communications from the Secret Service that show the Bidens’ dog Major was responsible for numerous biting incidents of Secret Service personnel. One email notes that “at the current rate an Agent or Officer has been bitten every day this week (3/1-3/8) causing damage to attire or bruising/punctures to the skin.” The documents show that agents were advised to protect their “hands/fingers” by placing their hands “in their pockets.” Photos of the dog bite injuries were redacted (blacked out) by the agency. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56566&L=25724&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvYmlkZW4tZG9nLW1ham9yLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA5MDIxNjE0MTQ=)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56566&L=25696&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvbmV3LWZhdWNpLWVtYWlscy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwOTAyMTYxNDE0) | **[Judicial Watch: New Fauci Agency COVID Emails Detail Discussions about Wuhan Institute; Describe Gates Foundation Placement of Chinese Representatives on ‘Important International Counsels’](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56566&L=25696&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvbmV3LWZhdWNpLWVtYWlscy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwOTAyMTYxNDE0)** “These emails provide extraordinary and troubling information about Fauci’s agency partnership with China and its monitoring, concerns and funding for the Wuhan Institute,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “The Gates Foundation should also explain the government report about its assistance to and advocacy for China.” [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56566&L=25696&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvbmV3LWZhdWNpLWVtYWlscy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwOTAyMTYxNDE0)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56566&L=25720&F=H&) | **[Over $2 Million to Study if U.S.’s Costly Latin American Anti-Gang Program Works](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56566&L=25720&F=H&)** In yet another example of taxpayer money going to waste, the U.S. government is spending north of $2 million to research if a costly, decade-old Latin American gang prevention initiative is working. Since 2010 Uncle Sam has funded a program called Gang Resistance Education and Training (GREAT) in El Salvador, Honduras, Panama, and Costa Rica but no one really knows if it has met its mission of preventing youth crime, violence, and gang involvement. The program operates in schools throughout the U.S. using thousands of law enforcement officers to help immunize children in the years immediately before the prime ages for introduction into gangs and delinquent behavior. Nevertheless, there are approximately 30,000 gangs and 850,000 gang members throughout the U.S., according to the Department of Justice (DOJ). [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56566&L=25720&F=H&)
---|---
|
---
| |
---
### [‘Minor’ Major issues: Emails show Biden dog was nippier than White House said ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56566&L=25725&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW4tdGhlLW5ld3MvbWlub3ItbWFqb3ItaXNzdWVzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA5MDIxNjE0MTQ=) NBC News The Biden family dog was a bit more of a problem pooch than the White House initially acknowledged, according to Secret Service emails obtained by the conservative legal group Judicial Watch.

The White House said at the end of March that Major, the Bidens’ 3-year-old German shepherd, was involved in a pair of “nipping” incidents, but the emails show he was involved in several more. clean_body: Judicial Watch announced recently that it received 36 pages of records communications from the Secret Service that show the Bidens’ dog Major was responsible for numerous biting incidents of Secret Service personnel. | | | Because no one is above the law! | Aug 30, 2021 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | | Judicial Watch filed the lawsuit October 5, 2020, in the U.S. District Court for the District of Colorado on behalf of itself and three residents of Colorado against Jena Griswold, Colorado Secretary of State, and the State of Colorado for failing to clean the state’s voter rolls as required by the National Voter Registration Act of 1993 (NVRA). The court’s recent ruling to allow Judicial Watch’s claims to proceed came after Colorado’s motion to dismiss the case, which the court denied in all key respects. ---|--- | | | | = | = Judicial Watch announced recently that it received 36 pages of records communications from the Secret Service that show the Bidens’ dog Major was responsible for numerous biting incidents of Secret Service personnel. One email notes that “at the current rate an Agent or Officer has been bitten every day this week (3/1-3/8) causing damage to attire or bruising/punctures to the skin.” The documents show that agents were advised to protect their “hands/fingers” by placing their hands “in their pockets.” Photos of the dog bite injuries were redacted (blacked out) by the agency. = ---|--- | | | | | “These emails provide extraordinary and troubling information about Fauci’s agency partnership with China and its monitoring, concerns and funding for the Wuhan Institute,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “The Gates Foundation should also explain the government report about its assistance to and advocacy for China.” ---|--- | | | | | In yet another example of taxpayer money going to waste, the U.S. government is spending north of $2 million to research if a costly, decade-old Latin American gang prevention initiative is working. Since 2010 Uncle Sam has funded a program called Gang Resistance Education and Training (GREAT) in El Salvador, Honduras, Panama, and Costa Rica but no one really knows if it has met its mission of preventing youth crime, violence, and gang involvement. The program operates in schools throughout the U.S. using thousands of law enforcement officers to help immunize children in the years immediately before the prime ages for introduction into gangs and delinquent behavior. Nevertheless, there are approximately 30,000 gangs and 850,000 gang members throughout the U.S., according to the Department of Justice (DOJ). ---|--- | | | = NBC News The Biden family dog was a bit more of a problem pooch than the White House initially acknowledged, according to Secret Service emails obtained by the conservative legal group Judicial Watch. The White House said at the end of March that Major, the Bidens’ 3-year-old German shepherd, was involved in a pair of “nipping” incidents, but the emails show he was involved in several more. = == The Daily Caller The White House refuses to engage the issue, probably because it has no reasonable response. It is bizarre from a public health standpoint to allow thousands of people to enter the country illegally every day, coming from countries around the world, with no COVID testing, no quarantine and the ability to move freely throughout the country with no tracking or realistic follow-up. It is a reckless and irresponsible policy, and frankly indefensible. == == The New York Post White House Press Secretary Jen Psaki said Wednesday that President Biden won’t release visitor logs from his Delaware residences, despite making 17 trips home in six months. The decision comes despite the Biden administration’s claim to “restore transparency and trust in government” — including with the resumption of limited release of White House visitor logs. == = = = = = = | CLIPS = = | == | | = | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- == == == = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2021, All Rights Reserved == |

| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4mi6s1MEvfa1N-AK5i4wUnXCqTga0IUowGaamY1UuXnMakvuARShOCJrL_4P4W0JfopB3scD8sbQT1DEjGLFEcJig--0qjxhWSOB9E649zOxZ9EgenJFv9-kItnsfYYXM52Z_N8pqPQKdhVXjdfk7sQ9OxmSyO56hpWoGooPkajztSS4SIKeJGaPW7RQErWj8HQnovf_RFHcj9xsHfanhqGU_fKA6Uba50Uy4xzHJcz3Pc3l87a7arlxKGQDVl_FBUgHmdJY6rZxqAhXCGm3shtIzCPeIZixDMTAnrzrNpqZ0lxcL7AjqF8QLt4LvE_qbt8dZSpi8BMqOUlfKJgpKuAnvSUFcOQmWbpbJyrSGuqu2_YyoPrhJq3a5ax_NIcIGxIdRy36ueH34zCEhjNxD8asw/3ez/9he4E7Z-SMi2UEkeSKAo6A/h0/ly7Hy1ZAfzfLqhaIMjGLjKJqKSz4cf4JpHODmIt_UaE)
Hi Derek,

January 6 was a chaotic, emotional day for our country. On one of the darkest days in the modern history of our democracy -- on the eve of Trump leaving office -- hope for the future is what inspired me and kept me going.

And it's going to take all of us working together to keep that promise: [
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4mi6s1MEvfa1N-AK5i4wUnXCqTga0IUowGaamY1UuXnMalemXl0H7PrXiQQ2kEb6pRYYCL7R1E2SxOOOFBtSRGlqolRQsTa4eqR87XU06iHm-yxcc9FgTi7o4SwrLJIRhAk1fVCb-GM0sB5j1V9-cHnUamLAoITE5Kl6D4xZkf3l719th9UEKUgf2IJ9PeCB-YhMdHFjDkTJQ566bybRxZlO0HQ1uUtYV_ZTIrv8dzCjJON7gPUYlah77Dv5WQdqtYc8381zmRHjA-hU_B9oWvsTYKKEUI0qVD3UvwgufDbD6zFMrlDhMBykMDRN8aSCP8qmNwsAcbXE3TIpsCz3rmHGTpgl9CRweg0HoUDlAkZNMgi1YvIUfraZUWiBAh-de1l53Ykj0irCCK2ldxb0QaCXw/3ez/9he4E7Z-SMi2UEkeSKAo6A/h1/N0UmfTkdE09HNTYpCoQqc8wdYybf1J13WQWZAUs0wYQ) Derek, there are candidates running for office all over the country who believe that the divisive and violent rhetoric of the insurrection is what America needs. They brag about attending Stop the Steal rallies and push the conspiracy theories of the Big Lie.

And one of those candidates is right here in NJ-03.

Republican candidate Tricia Flanagan launched her campaign with a racist attack ad against me that says that NJ-03 is "MAGA country" and that I'm not "one of us." She even tweeted at Sebastian Gorka, a xenophobic former Trump administration official with ties to neo-Nazi groups, and asked him for help with her campaign.

Rhetoric and actions like these are why I need your support to stand against those who want to divide us with lies, violence, and disinformation. I know we've asked a lot of you lately, but we won't have good people in government unless good people like you stay engaged in the process.

**[America functions best when we engage each other with civility and respect, knowing that even when we disagree, we are working toward a common purpose. I've seen what happens when we work together, and even $10, $25, or $50 means that we can keep moving forward. Can you split a donation right now between my campaign and Common Good VA?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4mi6s1MEvfa1N-AK5i4wUnXCqTga0IUowGaamY1UuXnMamoWWy8GX72aF5lU9suhu4Wgmxbr5WTz3eYz1Zby0dGPPiM-Zbu75MpWsLDNRzGOghhDtu4wZL68cKUwf1hyhFdvW9m1zz0FSndYz1dR0o7z3Kec8YupumBQykOW0lrKlH3bLxb5S-x17kMvBsGIAU3YDzmfcC2L6igrRvw2JRHi4bKf8iNd5ffzdnsgeD2eJ29KEQwVA9bJqvp9xGyZW79nu9xuuRUDVP4-0eBXW4sdvSzxZHuuxbHgBVUL5l2ZWQJZRMdXN1EG6z9ng6NUjiu3EQ1keNi1Ewayx3oQtlZC8yZ0vS6sb3C78cKUvsmA9ZpAv9DYLdqqzbHFbvhM6a9fA6rWJf2qXnJ-JWx1VyLFQ/3ez/9he4E7Z-SMi2UEkeSKAo6A/h2/TnzQ50b1lkNp32HLNsvXCRE6CD3695toGDeirzK8tfo)**[
