clean_body: | | | Hi Derek, January 6 was a chaotic, emotional day for our country. On one of the darkest days in the modern history of our democracy -- on the eve of Trump leaving office -- hope for the future is what inspired me and kept me going. And it's going to take all of us working together to keep that promise: Derek, there are candidates running for office all over the country who believe that the divisive and violent rhetoric of the insurrection is what America needs. They brag about attending Stop the Steal rallies and push the conspiracy theories of the Big Lie. And one of those candidates is right here in NJ-03. Republican candidate Tricia Flanagan launched her campaign with a racist attack ad against me that says that NJ-03 is "MAGA country" and that I'm not "one of us." She even tweeted at Sebastian Gorka, a xenophobic former Trump administration official with ties to neo-Nazi groups, and asked him for help with her campaign. Rhetoric and actions like these are why I need your support to stand against those who want to divide us with lies, violence, and disinformation. I know we've asked a lot of you lately, but we won't have good people in government unless good people like you stay engaged in the process. Since I was elected to Congress, we've survived some tough times together. And especially when it looked most bleak, we always found hope, resilience, and community. Let's use that to keep building on the promise of America -- together. Andy | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Terry McAuliffe, please .

body:
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]
Hi Peter ,
I wanted you to see this message from our new Executive Director, Brit Bender, about the incredible Donor Match [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral] opportunity we have this month to help us beat the Republican mega-dollar money machine:
---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Brit Bender <brit@tndp.org>
Date: Thu, Sep 2, 2021 at 10:39 AM
Subject: Donor Match 🤝
To: <hendrell@tndp.org>
Hey Hendrell,
We have an amazing opportunity this month — a group of generous donors has agreed to match EVERY donation, dollar for dollar, up to our $50,000 end-of-quarter goal at the end of September. Thanks to our incredible grassroots base we've already raised $3,109 which DOUBLES to $6,218, but we need to keep pushing in order to meet our goal.
Raising this money is crucial for us to finish out the year strong so we can start 2022 with a bang. Will you donate $25 (which doubles to $50!) to help us reach our goal? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]

We need to take on the Republican's mega-dollar money machine, but we can't do that without the help of our grassroots donors. They keep us going, and I couldn't be more grateful for them.
Can you donate now (and have your gift doubled!) to help us fight the Republican mega-dollar money machine so we can meet our goal and elect Democrats in Tennessee again? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]

Talk to you soon,
Brit Bender

| Peter,

I’m writing today to say **thank you.** Because grassroots supporters like you stepped up when we needed you most, we were able to not only hit but surpass our monthly goal in what is usually the slowest fundraising month of the year.

Thanks to the support of grassroots donors like you, I can spend less time dialing for dollars and more time working on the issues that matter most to families and workers in the Greater Lehigh Valley and across the country.

I am excited to be back from our August recess and to get to work providing Americans with health care, infrastructure, good jobs, and more. Your support means the world and is what keeps me going every day.

Thank you,
_Susan Wild_

[_**P.S. If you have the capacity, please consider chipping in $5 or more today to get our September off to a strong start.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35116735/304084284/-1930076705?refcode=BLU-SWC-20210902-1-EM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMGQ2NDhmYy0yYjBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DY8XyAGt6l-8clwT4wFUnbeXz4DRK_zMTHli6y_6jY8=)

name: Christy Smith
subject: I refuse to give up this fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress Christy Smith for Congress
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35117010/304085248/-1614289773?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjFkMWUzZS0yZDBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a0xc6u7OC0TFqTxlLmhq9XqoyNX44wip2Kuyf7jQmwY=&emci=74a956bb-2b0c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=8f1d1e3e-2d0c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=11385749)

Hi Peter,

Yesterday, the Texas Legislature passed one of the most restrictive abortion bans this country has ever seen and my heart is broken for the Texans who just lost access to critical health care.

**This is personal to me: Over 20 years ago, I found myself on the verge of death.**

While 35 weeks pregnant, I went into labor with my first child. After 14 hours in labor while suffering multiple seizures and fighting to hang onto my life, my beautiful, healthy daughter was delivered.

When I became pregnant again, my husband, doctor, and I all sat down and discussed what this meant. We knew very well that this pregnancy could leave me dead and my daughter without a mother.

I made the choice to continue with the pregnancy. Today, I am a profoundly proud mom to two daughters. And when looking back at that decision, I am eternally grateful that I had the option to discuss other possibilities with my husband and my doctor.

I know that many of you are scared right now. Scared of far-right politicians, like Mike Garcia, clawing back the rights and protections over our bodies that we have spent generations fighting for. **I know just how personal, how fundamental, and how necessary the right to choice is.**

This campaign isn't just about a fundamental difference of opinion between Mike and me. This campaign is about radical Republicans, like Mike, making decisions about our bodies.

I know today feels dark but for the people of Texas who just lost access to life saving healthcare, I refuse to give up this fight.

\-- Christy [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35117011/304085249/-392799195?refcode=em21_210902_txrr-s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjFkMWUzZS0yZDBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a0xc6u7OC0TFqTxlLmhq9XqoyNX44wip2Kuyf7jQmwY=)

* * *

Yesterday’s SCOTUS attacks on reproductive justice.

| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/35117012/304085280/1300596418?refcode=210902_CHFR_txabortionteafundlogo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUxODQ3NzRkLTJkMGMtZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6JLDctCqJo-Mi3mJhtsrAV2xLru6Z7KdzX4nQxt97E8=)

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/35117013/304085281/-194033665?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUxODQ3NzRkLTJkMGMtZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6JLDctCqJo-Mi3mJhtsrAV2xLru6Z7KdzX4nQxt97E8=&emci=0bcdf83b-fe0b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=e184774d-2d0c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=17300922) **BREAKING: Yesterday evening, the U.S. Supreme court refused to block a Texas reproductive justice law that bans abortions after 6 weeks of pregnancy. This is the most restrictive abortion law in the nation.**

To nobody’s surprise, the vote was 5-to-4, with three Trump-appointed justices joining two other conservatives in favor of the harsh abortion restrictions. The far-right has been working to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ for decades — _**and this ruling for Texas makes these extremists dangerously close to succeeding in other states as well.**_

This is a severe assault on reproductive freedom, and it further perpetuates socioeconomic inequalities in our society -- the very thing that we at BTE work to dismantle. **Our allies over at[ _TEA (Texas Equal Access) Fund_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/35117014/304085282/362885155?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUxODQ3NzRkLTJkMGMtZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6JLDctCqJo-Mi3mJhtsrAV2xLru6Z7KdzX4nQxt97E8=&emci=0bcdf83b-fe0b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=e184774d-2d0c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=17300922) put it perfectly in their Instagram post below:** [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/35117015/304085283/512578473?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUxODQ3NzRkLTJkMGMtZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6JLDctCqJo-Mi3mJhtsrAV2xLru6Z7KdzX4nQxt97E8=&emci=0bcdf83b-fe0b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=e184774d-2d0c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=17300922) **TEA Fund was created to fund abortions for women facing financial barriers to abortion access.**

As three progressive young women, our mission in building Barrier To Entry PAC has always been to deconstruct the hurdles that systemically keep the working class down— and that includes the severe barriers to abortion access.

**We are disgusted with yesterday’s SCOTUS ruling \-- but now, we’re more fired up than ever to elect leaders who will defend reproductive justice and protect women’s fundamental right to choose what they do with their bodies.**

[**Today, we’re calling on our BTE supporters to immediately rush a contribution of any size directly to our friends over at TEA Fund. Your gift will empower Texas Equal Access Fund in its mission to fight back against these grievous attacks on reproductive rights. PLEASE CHIP IN NOW >>**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/35117016/304085284/-1985029345?ms=210902_partner_barriertoentrypac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUxODQ3NzRkLTJkMGMtZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6JLDctCqJo-Mi3mJhtsrAV2xLru6Z7KdzX4nQxt97E8=&emci=0bcdf83b-fe0b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=e184774d-2d0c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=17300922) **______[DONATE TO TEA FUND](https://click.everyaction.com/k/35117017/304085285/-1985029345?ms=210902_partner_barriertoentrypac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUxODQ3NzRkLTJkMGMtZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6JLDctCqJo-Mi3mJhtsrAV2xLru6Z7KdzX4nQxt97E8=&emci=0bcdf83b-fe0b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=e184774d-2d0c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=17300922)** Thanks for being an ally in the fight for reproductive justice. **_Eden, Megan, and Jimena_**

clean_body: Yesterday’s SCOTUS attacks on reproductive justice. | | | = BREAKING: Yesterday evening, the U.S. Supreme court refused to block a Texas reproductive justice law that bans abortions after 6 weeks of pregnancy. This is the most restrictive abortion law in the nation. To nobody’s surprise, the vote was 5-to-4, with three Trump-appointed justices joining two other conservatives in favor of the harsh abortion restrictions. The far-right has been working to overturn Roe v. Wade for decades — and this ruling for Texas makes these extremists dangerously close to succeeding in other states as well. This is a severe assault on reproductive freedom, and it further perpetuates socioeconomic inequalities in our society -- the very thing that we at BTE work to dismantle. Our allies over at put it perfectly in their Instagram post below: TEA Fund was created to fund abortions for women facing financial barriers to abortion access. As three progressive young women, our mission in building Barrier To Entry PAC has always been to deconstruct the hurdles that systemically keep the working class down— and that includes the severe barriers to abortion access. We are disgusted with yesterday’s SCOTUS ruling \-- but now, we’re more fired up than ever to elect leaders who will defend reproductive justice and protect women’s fundamental right to choose what they do with their bodies. ____ Thanks for being an ally in the fight for reproductive justice. Eden, Megan, and Jimena ********** ********** ****************EXPRESS DONATE to Barrier to Entry PAC**************** ****************If you've stored payment info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:**************** | ****************= "="**************** | ****************= "="**************** | ****************= "="**************** | ****************= "="**************** ---|---|---|--- BARRIER TO ENTRY PAC supports candidates and campaign staff from working class backgrounds as they carve their paths in the Democratic political space. name: Tom Fitton
subject: Challenging Critical Race Theory
body:
Judicial Watch continues to exert a powerful and positive impact against public corruption and unlawful government secrecy

| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

If you're as unnerved as I am about the radical, racist propaganda creeping into our classrooms, our government, our corporations, even our military...you'll be pleased to know that Judicial Watch attorneys are pursuing a number of cases challenging this madness called **Critical Race Theory**.
**_We 're going after school districts, government agencies, politicians and bureaucrats who push this radical revolutionary agenda_**, and we're suing the U.S. Department of Defense to expose how even the **_U.S. Military Academy at West Point_** is forcing this radical left-wing agenda on its cadets. Incredible!
We're also _suing_ the **Pentagon** to uncover coordinated social media attacks on **Fox News ' Tucker Carlson**, after Carlson criticized its focus on advancing their new **Critical Race****Theory** training. **_[That's why I hope you will make your best donation to Judicial Watch right now.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56601&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA5MDIxNjM5NDQ=) _**
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56601&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA5MDIxNjM5NDQ=)
---

Under the guise of "equity," "diversity" and "anti-racism," leading leftists are promoting this blatantly racist and un-American **Critical Race Theory** in our classrooms, in the halls of government, our military and even our corporate boardrooms.

**The radicalism of Critical Race Theory springs from the most thoroughly Marxist segments of the radical academic elite.**

According to **Critical Race Theory** , all Western cultures - especially **America** - are infused to the core with "white supremacy," "white privilege" and "institutionalized racism." It is repackaged **Marxism** whose proponents want to end America as we know it.

**This extreme ideology is infecting our whole society. And our tax dollars are being abused and our rights attacked. But your Judicial Watch is fighting back through litigation and education. In fact, Judicial Watch has litigated against Critical Race Theory and its Marxist predecessors for many years.**

You might recall news reports a few years back of so-called "diversity trainers" coming in to lecture federal employees that the **Founding Fathers** were racists. It was your _Judicial Watch that brought that ugly episode to light_.

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56601&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA5MDIxNjM5NDQ=)
---

And more recently, after being alerted by taxpayers and parents we filed **Maryland Freedom of Information** requests demanding all records dealing with **Montgomery County 's** **Critical Race Theory** program. The county delivered 685 pages of heavily redacted documents -- _which were shocking ... _

...among the propaganda being taught schoolkids was a "pyramid of covert white supremacy" where students were taught that the phrase **" Make America Great Again"**_was covert racism_! And the propaganda didn't come cheap. The records revealed that the school district paid $454,000 to the "Mid-Atlantic Equity Consortium" to deliver this so-called "Anti-racist system audit." Unbelievable.

But there's more...

**In Wellesley, Massachusetts, we found outright segregation in public schools.** In response to our open records requests for information, the school district was forced to turn over documents showing it was promoting _outright racial segregation_ ... all in the name of "diversity, equity, and inclusion."

These 111 pages of documents we uncovered included language detailing their "equity plan" with a stated goal to "amplify student voices by offering affinity spaces." In plain English, _they segregated areas for students not based on their belief or parties or interests_ ... _but simply on the color of their skin!_

**And in Dedham, Massachusetts, Judicial Watch is in federal court on behalf of a high school football coach who was fired after he spoke out against Critical Race Theory and Black Lives Matter propaganda in his daughter 's classroom.**

**And there 's much, much more where these examples are coming from**.

**_[Your tax-deductible gift today will help Judicial Watch file more lawsuits and further expose and stop this anti-American Critical Race Theory agenda at every turn](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56601&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA5MDIxNjM5NDQ=)_**.

Our legal battles and their successes are impossible without your support. Thank you.

Sincerely,

Tom Fitton
President

P.S. **Critical Race Theory** is the latest vehicle of social destruction for the extremist Left agenda - and it is a vehicle that is often at odds with the law and fundamental American values. Your support for **Judicial Watch** helps us challenge this Marxist, racist, totalitarian movement before it wrecks our country. **_[I hope I can count on you now](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56601&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA5MDIxNjM5NDQ=)_**.

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56601&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA5MDIxNjM5NDQ=)

| Peter,

As we wrap up the month of August and summer comes to a close, I feel extremely grateful and optimistic about my re-election campaign.

Each month, supporters like you allow us to meet and surpass our goals. It might be an "off-year," but our team certainly isn't treating it like one, and that is the enthusiasm we need to maintain in order to win re-election in this competitive district!

**I want to sincerely thank you all for being a supporter of our campaign. Your generosity is what allows this campaign to remain strong and on a path to victory in 2022.**

We certainly have a long way to go, but I wanted to take this moment to share my gratitude.

With appreciation,

Abigail Spanberger

name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
I'm not asking today, just thanking.

We pushed hard during the last week of August to reach our end-of-month fundraising goal, and -- thanks to grassroots supporters like you -- we raised what we needed to keep this campaign going strong.

It wasn't a last-minute megadonor that helped us do it either... our average online contribution was only $18! That means a whole bunch of folks chipped in just a few dollars at a time to emails, texts, or even tweets from our campaign. Carol from Verona gave $10 on Sunday and Bill from New Franken added a $5 donation on Monday -- donations like these are what helped push us over the edge and I couldn't be more grateful.

This is what I mean when I say the success of our campaign literally depends on grassroots supporters like you -- and an increasingly large part of our contributions come from messages just like this one! One person chips in $5, another chips in $25, someone else decides to give $3... it all adds up. Every dollar makes a difference.

Campaigns should be funded by real people. That's why I've never taken a dime of corporate PAC money and I never will. But the guy who's currently in this Senate seat has different priorities, which is why he's making sure his wealthy campaign donors get their money's worth by fighting for legislation that enriches them.

Ron Johnson has put big corporations, special interests, the top 1%, and even himself ahead of everyone else for the last ten years. We need to get rid of him, and I have no doubt our campaign has what it takes to go all the way. I have a track record of beating Republicans in statewide elections in Wisconsin, but I can't do it again without you.

That's why it means so much to me that so many folks stepped up last month to help us meet our fundraising goal. It's clear we're building the strongest team to take down Ron Johnson, and together, we will get the job done.

Onward!

— Sarah Godlewski

Sarah is fighting for you, not the top 1% -- that's why she's not accepting a dime of corporate PAC money. If you're ready to step up and join this grassroots team, make a contribution today.

CONTRIBUTE >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/godlewski-sept-21

Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
Sarah for Wisconsin
PO Box 166
Madison, WI 53701
United States

clean_body: I'm not asking today, just thanking. We pushed hard during the last week of August to reach our end-of-month fundraising goal, and -- thanks to grassroots supporters like you -- we raised what we needed to keep this campaign going strong. It wasn't a last-minute megadonor that helped us do it either... our average online contribution was only $18! That means a whole bunch of folks chipped in just a few dollars at a time to emails, texts, or even tweets from our campaign. Carol from Verona gave $10 on Sunday and Bill from New Franken added a $5 donation on Monday -- donations like these are what helped push us over the edge and I couldn't be more grateful. This is what I mean when I say the success of our campaign literally depends on grassroots supporters like you -- and an increasingly large part of our contributions come from messages just like this one! One person chips in $5, another chips in $25, someone else decides to give $3... it all adds up. Every dollar makes a difference. Campaigns should be funded by real people. That's why I've never taken a dime of corporate PAC money and I never will. But the guy who's currently in this Senate seat has different priorities, which is why he's making sure his wealthy campaign donors get their money's worth by fighting for legislation that enriches them. Ron Johnson has put big corporations, special interests, the top 1%, and even himself ahead of everyone else for the last ten years. We need to get rid of him, and I have no doubt our campaign has what it takes to go all the way. I have a track record of beating Republicans in statewide elections in Wisconsin, but I can't do it again without you. That's why it means so much to me that so many folks stepped up last month to help us meet our fundraising goal. It's clear we're building the strongest team to take down Ron Johnson, and together, we will get the job done. Onward! — Sarah Godlewski Sarah is fighting for you, not the top 1% -- that's why she's not accepting a dime of corporate PAC money. If you're ready to step up and join this grassroots team, make a contribution today. CONTRIBUTE >> Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin Sarah for Wisconsin PO Box 166 Madison, WI 53701 United States

body:
We need to get rid of this fraud |

| | Hi Peter,

It's time to pull the plug on His Fraudulency, Joe Biden.

The guy who never should have been President in the first place, has messed everything up to the Nth degree.

Afghanistan debacle.

Border crisis.

Inflation.

We have had enough of his lies and his radical, failed Socialist policies. It's time to #FIREBIDEN!

[That's where we come in.](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=1a78a13266&e=ba6e67b849)

My name is Jarrin Jackson, and I am the chairman of Drain the DC Swamp PAC - I also served in Afghanistan as an infantry officer. We are America First patriots supporting Trump and actually FIGHTING Biden - pressuring Congressmen and Senators to remove him from office!

At this point, is there any real doubt that His Fraudulency has been a complete disaster?

_A wave of prominent Republican lawmakers on Thursday called for President Joe Biden to be impeached or to resign, arguing his decisions created an environment ripe for crisis that indicates he is not capable of leadership.

“Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, Antony Blinken, Lloyd Austin and General Milley should all resign or face impeachment and removal from office,” Tennessee Sen. Marsha Blackburn tweeted.

“This is the product of Joe Biden’s catastrophic failure of leadership. It is now painfully clear he has neither the will nor the capacity to lead. He must resign,” Missouri Sen. Josh Hawley said in a statement.

They join a chorus of other Republicans calling for Biden’s resignation, impeachment, or removal by the 25th Amendment, as well as the resignation of other top officials in his administration, as Taliban forces took control of the country amid a chaotic U.S. exit._

[Will you help us pressure lawmakers to #FIREBIDEN?](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=284f17406a&e=ba6e67b849)

---
| Unfortunately, that's not all this incompetent President has unleashed on us.

Gas prices are at an 8 year high and spiking, thanks for Biden's anti-energy "Green New Deal" policies. It's part of a general spike in prices- known as inflation, which is defined as too many dollars chasing too few goods.

_**In other words, the Federal Government is printing money like crazy but the country isn't producing enough. Welcome to Socialism.**_

_And of course, we have all seen the grizzly images of the humanitarian crisis at the Southern border._ Tens of thousands of unaccompanied children, criminals and gang members, and illegal immigrants streaming across our border.

Not only has Biden refused to enforce Federal law, but he actually STOPPED construction on Trump's border wall, which was actually working to stop illegal immigration!

He has refused to enforce Federal immigration law, for which the Supreme Court has already smacked him down. He is spending us into oblivion and causing inflation, paying people NOT to work.

It's time to end this nightmare. Time to use impeachment, or the 25th Amendment, to #FIREBIDEN.

It's time to block ALL of Biden's nominees to anything. It's time to block ALL his legislation. It's time to remove this demented fool before he destroys the country.

The 14 American soldiers killed in Afghanistan due to Biden's incompetence and lies deserve nothing less. _**He MUST be held accountable, and if the establishment politicians won't do it, we will make life difficult for them!**_

clean_body: We need to get rid of this fraud | | | | | Hi Peter, It's time to pull the plug on His Fraudulency, Joe Biden. The guy who never should have been President in the first place, has messed everything up to the Nth degree. Afghanistan debacle. Border crisis. Inflation. We have had enough of his lies and his radical, failed Socialist policies. It's time to #FIREBIDEN! My name is Jarrin Jackson, and I am the chairman of Drain the DC Swamp PAC - I also served in Afghanistan as an infantry officer. We are America First patriots supporting Trump and actually FIGHTING Biden - pressuring Congressmen and Senators to remove him from office! At this point, is there any real doubt that His Fraudulency has been a complete disaster? A wave of prominent Republican lawmakers on Thursday called for President Joe Biden to be impeached or to resign, arguing his decisions created an environment ripe for crisis that indicates he is not capable of leadership. “Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, Antony Blinken, Lloyd Austin and General Milley should all resign or face impeachment and removal from office,” Tennessee Sen. Marsha Blackburn tweeted. “This is the product of Joe Biden’s catastrophic failure of leadership. It is now painfully clear he has neither the will nor the capacity to lead. He must resign,” Missouri Sen. Josh Hawley said in a statement. They join a chorus of other Republicans calling for Biden’s resignation, impeachment, or removal by the 25th Amendment, as well as the resignation of other top officials in his administration, as Taliban forces took control of the country amid a chaotic U.S. exit. | | Unfortunately, that's not all this incompetent President has unleashed on us. Gas prices are at an 8 year high and spiking, thanks for Biden's anti-energy "Green New Deal" policies. It's part of a general spike in prices- known as inflation, which is defined as too many dollars chasing too few goods. In other words, the Federal Government is printing money like crazy but the country isn't producing enough. Welcome to Socialism. And of course, we have all seen the grizzly images of the humanitarian crisis at the Southern border. Tens of thousands of unaccompanied children, criminals and gang members, and illegal immigrants streaming across our border. Not only has Biden refused to enforce Federal law, but he actually STOPPED construction on Trump's border wall, which was actually working to stop illegal immigration! He has refused to enforce Federal immigration law, for which the Supreme Court has already smacked him down. He is spending us into oblivion and causing inflation, paying people NOT to work. It's time to end this nightmare. Time to use impeachment, or the 25th Amendment, to #FIREBIDEN. | | Now, this won't be easy. There are some weak-kneed "Republicans" who will resist. That's why Drain the DC Swamp PAC needs to pressure those weak Republicans and soft Dems to impeach him and remove him! Who knows, maybe if he's impeached he might resign like Nixon did. God knows he should. We cannot trust the politicians to do the right thing- many of them, anyway. They won't see the light until they feel the heat! It's time to block ALL of Biden's nominees to anything. It's time to block ALL his legislation. It's time to remove this demented fool before he destroys the country. The 14 American soldiers killed in Afghanistan due to Biden's incompetence and lies deserve nothing less. He MUST be held accountable, and if the establishment politicians won't do it, we will make life difficult for them! Swampers always betray you the first chance they get, and every single time thereafter. Time to ramp up the pressure! It won't stop at Biden either. We need to impeach Harris and the rest of this failed Woke Socialist bunch. | Thank you! Respectfully, | | Jarrin Jackson Chairman of Drain the DC Swamp PAC Combat Infantry Veteran P.S. subject: If anything deserves an investigation, it’s this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Gallagher for Wisconsin |
body:
Our military presence is 100% gone and America’s longest war has officially ended in surrender and defeat. [](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=963f93051f1d4c15b6d48bcd9a98d111&_e=6Bb3m0MFnJjVpytNDSs2caxFbDec_FK4aoYJdTXy1TDoX7t4WheWr7JTU26i63SsyxoL80NBX11pPNE18l7tGvjNmfJ8gKoGbPFUeGHIR7Z_yd5atElG4m5hgimpUgJvwOXWynUznVazPqtAdGeovxPcZfBEwAcVBY-OvLJ9rsc5px5BhNLa0vgzFEZ29PIrhmwKUO9m8rOAjtKKkZ1tEnTksJ9y1AqTFNKEfOrtJg0ffiSxWAUqAoQ7LYUBoxjzmSx6I8OYWf58VdLW0-mPvpfn0Rd_W3blJUkvZMVEI8rocetMTJNBigojH0nxr3F4nTsPsV2WE61gBsxMzoQZpVbaTmVcRAYzzSNwIChjKGBG3pyDSePGbOzQczPLpf3PrFMaU0kV85BvJ6teOhtUjMsF_HXv9IZMy2_ryRrcs4IPfWyJilxju5mkHUUFlndE5dFvfeaxogG5_4A81VTAKejea4tY_jaKHoTO3jEjhgs%3D) Friend, **There’s not a single American soldier left in Afghanistan. ** Our military presence is 100% gone and America’s longest war has officially ended in surrender and defeat. _But why are American citizens still trapped behind enemy lines?_ _Why didn’t we stay until every single one of our own was evacuated?_ **Because President Biden and his administration are more concerned with arbitrary withdrawal dates than they are with keeping America secure. ** It’s beyond shameful and it will be remembered as one of the most egregious leadership failures in American history. Rep. Gallagher is calling for a full Congressional investigation into how this failure was allowed to happen because if anything deserves it, it’s this.
* _Hundreds of lives were lost –– including 13 American service members._
* _Billions of dollars of military equipment ended up in the hands of Taliban terrorists._
* _America’s credibility is being called into question worldwide._

The time to act is now. We cannot let Democrats stonewall an investigation in order to protect the future of their party over the future of the country. [**DEMAND AN INVESTIGATION: ADD YOUR NAME**](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=963f93051f1d4c15b6d48bcd9a98d111&_e=6Bb3m0MFnJjVpytNDSs2caxFbDec_FK4aoYJdTXy1TDoX7t4WheWr7JTU26i63SsyxoL80NBX11pPNE18l7tGvjNmfJ8gKoGbPFUeGHIR7Z_yd5atElG4m5hgimpUgJvwOXWynUznVazPqtAdGeovxPcZfBEwAcVBY-OvLJ9rsc5px5BhNLa0vgzFEZ29PIrhmwKUO9m8rOAjtKKkZ1tEnTksJ9y1AqTFNKEfOrtJg0ffiSxWAUqAoQ7LYUBoxjzmSx6I8OYWf58VdLW0-mPvqwOhjTiKzeXo8tS0lZCJC_rDyVuVV4m43uZTi4OuE8ia3l40tLe8PJEXb1CdFcknfAo5uPY_ZM0Z6lVRJmMDsI_jbpK69IYVhw7Da4lRSiydSUgYY5XlMcmdh12SXqyH3pPNFR3c2GN__-PvUr8mKhna5KZt1rsbkxDx-Qi_A2kO9WXlNRW4-tORGcVSA_goKmn5wISerCWsc8aZQhOzH8%3D) Thank you, Patrick McNulty | |

body:

Peter,
Over my years working in the D.C. swamp, including as Acting Director of National Intelligence for the greatest President in history, Donald J. Trump, and his Ambassador to Germany, I received some important advice:
**_" Judge a man by the character of his enemies."_**
And when it comes to Kash Patel, he has all the right enemies.
As he writes in the email below, lead deep stater Adam "Shifty" Schiff recently launched an all-out assault on his character - where I'm honored to be name-dropped alongside him.
**[The timing of Schiff's smear is extremely telling, as it comes as Kash is launching a historic first-of-its kind LEGAL OFFENSIVE TRUST against the fake news media.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58244287:Jxd5E82Nk:m:1:3253819041:EA1F34B20A9821292981E16283371594:r)**
**After all, it was Kash who drafted the Nunes memo exposing just how fake the Russia investigation was.**
And unlike most weak-kneed "investigations" coming out of Washington, Kash didn't pull any punches, and named names going all the way to the top, including corrupt officials like Hillary Clinton and James Comey.
So Schiff's hatred is based on the fact that Kash is a patriot who isn't willing to sell out his country to the deep state.
**[I consider Kash a good friend, and close ally in the fight for America First- and that's why I'm hoping you will help him continue that fight by chipping in to his LEGAL OFFENSIVE FUND against the fake news media. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58244287:Jxd5E82Nk:m:1:3253819041:EA1F34B20A9821292981E16283371594:r)**
You can read more about his fight below. But just know that Kash is the man, and a true patriot we can count on.
Thank you!
Richard Grenell
Former Acting Director of National Intelligence for President Donald J. Trump [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58244287:Jxd5E82Nk:m:1:3253819041:EA1F34B20A9821292981E16283371594:r)

* * *

**\--Begin Forwarded Message--**

_" Political hacks like Ric Grenell and others were put in positions of responsibility, **like Kash Patel** , that they had no business being in."_ - Deep State Rep. Adam Schiff
The timing on this attack isn't surprising at all. It comes just as I am launching my new [LEGAL OFFENSIVE FUND](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58244287:Jxd5E82Nk:m:1:3253819041:EA1F34B20A9821292981E16283371594:r) to take on the fake news media, who anti-America losers like Adam Schiff rely on to smear people like me.
With Adam Schiff being this angry with me, I know that I'm right on target, and the only thing to do now is double-down.
But to do that I need the support of American patriots, thousands of which have already stepped up.
**[So can I count on you to make a generous contribution to my LEGAL OFFENSIVE FUND against he fake news media?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58244287:Jxd5E82Nk:m:1:3253819041:EA1F34B20A9821292981E16283371594:r)**

**We will go after the fake news media with the same fierceness I did the deep state during my days working for Devin Nunes.** If you have been wronged by the Deep State and Big Tech, please reach out, this offensive trust is to help you.

This fight will cost money, and we need to band together to provide the funds necessary to push this important battle across the finish line.

I will be your juggernaut, and fight this until the end.

Kash Patel

| | Friend, **Every state is a border state when Democrats are running the show.** If last month’s record numbers didn’t prove it, I don’t know what will.

20% of migrant children are testing positive for COVID. 18% of migrant families are testing positive. The U.S. has a positivity rate of 9.5%. Why is the southern border still open?

The anti-American left shackles cities, counties and states with COVID measures while waving in the flood of COVID-positive illegals across the border. It’s utterly absurd.

Pitch in NOW to help Lauren to fight back on our border crisis.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65373%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=I9W1B97fP5p9sL9S4GjJRQ&sysid=1)

For Freedom,
Team Boebert

clean_body: I wanted to send a quick note. = Team -- I wanted to send a quick note to say thanks. My team is still adding up the numbers, but it looks like we hit our end of month fundraising goal for August. Listen, it’s folks like you -- chipping in $15 here, $10 there -- who come together to help make this campaign possible. We’re relying on grassroots donors and we’re so thankful to have your support. I know it’s going to be a tough race. This is one of the most competitive seats in the country. But for now, I wanted to take a step back, and just say thanks for being on our team. Thank you, \-- Tom | ******=**** Tom O'Halleran has a proven track record of working across the aisle to get things done. He believes Congress has a responsibility to put aside partisan politics and work together to solve the problems affecting America and Arizona. With your help, we can find solutions to the problems that Arizonans and Americans face today. = | ****=****** | | Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress Tom O'Halleran, PO Box 63992, Phoenix, AZ 85082

body:
Carey backed by leading small business organization | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/careyforcongress/randpaulendorsement-4964069?e=f89184af42)

| | |
---

# NFIB Endorses Mike Carey For Congress in OH-15 Special Election
---
| [ ](https://CareyForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7159c791b9aebaf10c300cf35&id=408d43471e&e=f89184af42)
---
| COLUMBUS, Ohio (Sept. 2, 2021) – The National Federation of Independent Business(NFIB), the nation’s leading small business advocacy organization, today endorsed Mike Carey for Congress in the special election for Ohio’s 15th Congressional District. “Mike Carey has a great understanding of the issues most important to Ohio’s small businesses,” said Ohio Executive Director Roger Geiger. “He knows burdensome government regulations can stifle small business growth and supports policies important to the small business recovery. On behalf of Ohio’s small business community, we are proud to endorse Mike Carey today for election to Congress.” “We are confident Mike Carey will be a strong voice for Ohio’s small businesses in Congress,” said NFIB Senior National Political Director Sharon Sussin. “We are pleased to endorse him today for election to the U.S. House of Representatives and look forward to working with him.” _This endorsement is issued from NFIB FedPAC, NFIB’s political action committee. NFIB FedPAC is funded by NFIB member donations above membership dues. Decisions made by the NFIB FedPAC are managed by a member-driven grassroots evaluation process._

[View press release online](https://CareyForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7159c791b9aebaf10c300cf35&id=df92a50e85&e=f89184af42).

name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: BREAKING: Trump just endorsed our GOP opponent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
#

**BREAKING: Donald Trump just gave his "complete and total endorsement" to one of our Republican opponents.**
We can't let Trump and the GOP take this open seat next year. Will you rush $3 to give us the resources to fight back and send Democrat Malcolm Kenyatta to the Senate to fight for working families?
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35120265/304095886/-353695395?refcode2=2a49e7f5-370c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210902-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTQ5ZTdmNS0zNzBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z7o97bZ_z8_cnbFHKKI-j5tKwQTGmOp5DMRvIVgZ-Qk=)**
Look, Republican Pat Toomey has been enough of a disgrace to working Pennsylvanians. We can't afford for someone more extreme to take his place.
The Republican that Trump endorsed called women's rights "nonsense" and continues to spread the dangerous misinformation that led to the violent insurrection on our nation's capitol in January.
If this Trump-endorsed Republican wins this race, we can say goodbye to any hope of expanding our Democratic Senate majority and delivering a government that works for working people.
Telling you this brings me no joy, but I promised to always tell the truth and say what the hell I think.
And now that Trump is officially involved, we know this candidate is going to raise a ton of money off of this endorsement.
**So I need as many folks as possible to stand with me today to show that working people are united in our fight to defeat Trumpism.**
[If you're able, will you please pitch in $3 today to help us fight back? Every donation makes a big difference in this critical moment.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35120266/304095889/-353695395?refcode2=2a49e7f5-370c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210902-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTQ5ZTdmNS0zNzBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z7o97bZ_z8_cnbFHKKI-j5tKwQTGmOp5DMRvIVgZ-Qk=)
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35120267/304095890/-353695395?refcode2=2a49e7f5-370c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210902-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTQ5ZTdmNS0zNzBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z7o97bZ_z8_cnbFHKKI-j5tKwQTGmOp5DMRvIVgZ-Qk=)**
Thanks for everything,
Malcolm

name: Team Cooper
subject: Roe v. Wade is in danger.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
Roy Cooper will never give up on protecting women’s rights. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35120271/304095978/823540626?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWUyZjlmYi0zNzBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VXJmM3JxusoVh63kvlb2QVP750cZ-rNiK-Bju5qIc5o=&emci=f014bd10-240c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=09e2f9fb-370c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=1049176)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35120272/304095979/435245919?refcode=em_RC_FR_RR_TexasAbortionBan_090221_img_ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWUyZjlmYi0zNzBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VXJmM3JxusoVh63kvlb2QVP750cZ-rNiK-Bju5qIc5o=) Peter — **Texas just enacted one of the most extreme anti-choice laws since before the landmark _Roe v. Wade_ decision.** **[Roy Cooper is committed to defending women’s rights here in North Carolina, but he needs your help. Chip in $25 to support Roy and elect NC leaders who will PROTECT the right to choose>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35120274/304095981/435245919?refcode=em_RC_FR_RR_TexasAbortionBan_090221_l1_ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWUyZjlmYi0zNzBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VXJmM3JxusoVh63kvlb2QVP750cZ-rNiK-Bju5qIc5o=)** Texas’s restrictive law bans procedures as early as six weeks into a pregnancy — before most women even know they’re pregnant — and opens the door for ANYONE to sue abortion providers or others who help someone obtain an abortion. Think about that for a minute. Texas is deputizing its citizens to police women’s medical decisions and bodily autonomy. But it gets worse. **Just before midnight last night — a day after Texas’s law went into effect — the Supreme Court declined to block it. The justices dealt a major blow to reproductive rights and women’s health care everywhere** , essentially nullifying _Roe_ and paving the way for other GOP-controlled states to follow suit. Here in North Carolina, Roy is the reason we will NEVER see extreme right-wing anti-choice laws like this one. Republicans recently pushed to enact an extreme anti-abortion law before Gov. Cooper shut them down. But we need to make sure it stays that way. If the GOP has their way in elections to come, they’ll build a far-right supermajority that could end Gov. Cooper’s ability to veto radical, restrictive laws targeting women’s rights. _Not on our watch._ **[We can’t let the Texas GOP’s unprecedented attack on women’s reproductive rights happen here in North Carolina, Peter. Can you chip in $25 to support leaders who will fight alongside Roy to block such egregious legislation?>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35120276/304095983/435245919?refcode=em_RC_FR_RR_TexasAbortionBan_090221_l2_ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWUyZjlmYi0zNzBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VXJmM3JxusoVh63kvlb2QVP750cZ-rNiK-Bju5qIc5o=)** Far-right politicians will do whatever it takes to chip away at women’s health care. clean_body: Roy Cooper will never give up on protecting women’s rights. | = Peter — Texas just enacted one of the most extreme anti-choice laws since before the landmark Roe v. Wade decision. = Texas’s restrictive law bans procedures as early as six weeks into a pregnancy — before most women even know they’re pregnant — and opens the door for ANYONE to sue abortion providers or others who help someone obtain an abortion. Think about that for a minute. Texas is deputizing its citizens to police women’s medical decisions and bodily autonomy. But it gets worse. Just before midnight last night — a day after Texas’s law went into effect — the Supreme Court declined to block it. The justices dealt a major blow to reproductive rights and women’s health care everywhere , essentially nullifying Roe and paving the way for other GOP-controlled states to follow suit. Here in North Carolina, Roy is the reason we will NEVER see extreme right-wing anti-choice laws like this one. Republicans recently pushed to enact an extreme anti-abortion law before Gov. Cooper shut them down. But we need to make sure it stays that way. If the GOP has their way in elections to come, they’ll build a far-right supermajority that could end Gov. Cooper’s ability to veto radical, restrictive laws targeting women’s rights. Not on our watch. = Far-right politicians will do whatever it takes to chip away at women’s health care. We need to tell them loud and clear that we see what they’re doing — and we won’t stand for it. Can we count on your contribution to join the fight to protect North Carolinians from extreme GOP attacks? name: Patty Murray
subject: Texas abortion providers need our help
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
Peter, now more than ever, Texas abortion funds need our financial support.
#
Peter,
Abortion providers in Texas have long faced unnecessary restrictions and attacks from the GOP -- but this time it’s much worse.
The new abortion ban that just went into effect outlaws abortion after six weeks -- which is before many people even know that they’re pregnant -- while also giving complete strangers the power to enforce this draconian law by letting them sue abortion providers and anyone who helps someone get an abortion -- even if it’s just driving them to the clinic -- for $10,000.
**Peter, now more than ever, Texas abortion funds need our financial support.**
**[Will you split a $5 contribution now to Whole Woman’s Health, the Lilith Fund, Frontera Fund, and other abortion providers that help Texans get abortion care?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35120366/304096327/-765734023?refcode=pm_em_210902_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjgwN2I2Yi0zODBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hNkEjJ6hxUnUSmNcIEUA9E8QlmjzdrSZJP1_89cXrL0=)**
This is a moment of crisis for Texas abortion providers and Texans trying to get reproductive health care -- any support you can give is appreciated.
Thank you,
Patty Murray

**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35120367/304096328/-765734023?refcode=pm_em_210902_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjgwN2I2Yi0zODBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hNkEjJ6hxUnUSmNcIEUA9E8QlmjzdrSZJP1_89cXrL0=)**

**_As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values._**

name: SSG Brian Mast, U.S. Army (ret.)
subject: I served in Afghanistan. Joe Biden's words are as hollow as his head and his heart.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAST FOR CONGRESS
body:
|
---
| | [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58244424:6nbrI82NP:m:1:3253819041:DE172D9F6FA8AB49A98AC3D78C5493CB:r)
---
| Peter,

I lost two legs and a finger serving our country in Afghanistan.

Those of us that served, we fought for our country. We fought for those on our left and right, and we'll keep our heads high knowing that.

**But Joe Biden has abandoned our allies and betrayed the thousands of men and women like me who sacrificed tremendously in pursuit of peace. And now, he 's even blaming Donald Trump for the disaster Joe Biden himself caused.

Joe Biden's words are as hollow as his head and his heart.

In a minute, I'm going to ask you to **[**join me in fighting to defeat Joe Biden**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58244424:6nbrI82NP:m:1:3253819041:DE172D9F6FA8AB49A98AC3D78C5493CB:r)**, but first let me tell you how I know Joe Biden is full of shit...**

On the evening of September 19, 2010, I was moving across the battlefield in Kandahar, Afghanistan narrowing in on a high-value target. As a bomb tech, it was my job to clear the way for the rest of our team by finding and disposing of any improvised bombs. I found the last bomb by stepping on it, losing two legs and a finger in the process.
---
| [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58244424:6nbrI82NP:m:1:3253819041:DE172D9F6FA8AB49A98AC3D78C5493CB:r)
---
| The next thing I knew, I was in Walter Reed National Military Medical Center. I looked down to the end of my bed where my feet should have been sticking up, but they weren't. And every day since then when I wake up, I am reminded of my time in Afghanistan. The remnants of this war are going to last me the rest of my life, but I am one of the lucky ones--I made it home because my fellow soldiers refused to leave me behind.

Joe Biden has not lived up to the legacy of those men. He has abandoned Americans and our Afghan allies in Afghanistan.

**As a result, Joe Biden does not deserve to have the words "commander" or "chief" anywhere in his title.**

[**If you agree, please help me hold him accountable and stop his disastrous America Last agenda**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58244424:6nbrI82NP:m:1:3253819041:DE172D9F6FA8AB49A98AC3D78C5493CB:r)**:**

name: Never Again PAC
subject: William, Jane, Lynn, and Aileen
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEVER AGAIN PAC
body:
Earlier this week, we faced our end-of-month deadline. We knew hitting our fundraising goal wasn't going to be easy -- the summer months tend to be slow for fundraising, especially during an off-year. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/35120643/304097819/-2023352048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg1NTJlMzFiLTM5MGMtZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=e4z5XW0rvb8doWyNjQWbLy5XetwvKe2q4oBF_uEktk0=&emci=fafdc46e-020c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=8552e31b-390c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=16335001) Team,

Earlier this week, we faced our end-of-month deadline. We knew hitting our fundraising goal wasn't going to be easy -- the summer months tend to be slow for fundraising, especially during an off-year.

But thanks to folks like William from New York, Jane from Arizona, Lynn from Texas, and Aileen from South Carolina chipping in whatever they could afford -- we were able to hit our end-of-month goal!

We are so grateful for your support as we work to defeat the 147 Republican members of Congress who voted to overturn the 2020 election results. Together, we're laying the groundwork needed to defend our democracy.

We've accomplished so much together already, and we're just getting started. Over the coming months, we're going to continue to hold the Treason Caucus accountable and show their constituents why these Republicans are a danger to our democracy.

Our work is only made possible with your help, so we hope you continue to stand with us in this important fight.

We are so grateful for your support as we work to defeat the 147 Republican members of Congress who voted to overturn the 2020 election results. clean_body: Marco Rubio’s opponent did. She led the charge! | Thank goodness we reached you, Peter. She’ll do, say, or spend whatever it takes to seize control of Florida’s US Senate seat. And if she wins she’ll do whatever it takes to destroy our America First Agenda! This could be the most expensive US Senate race in history, and we’ll need every Grassroots Republican involved if we’re going to win. | | | | | | | | | | President Trump has already given Marco Rubio his Complete and Total Endorsement. Will you chip in $5 or more today to show your support, as well? We honestly wouldn’t ask unless it was critically important, but it is... If we lose Florida, our chances of reclaiming the Republican Majority are basically zero! Thank you. \-- Elect Republicans

| I wanted to make sure you saw this huge news out of Texas.
# _**[Texas law banning most abortions takes effect](http://link.email.dynect.net/link.php?DynEngagement=true&H=o%2F0m%2Fev%2F6ITrlgR28I6hZPwmXBqp00S7iuu3en%2BRQinJ0cjHs%2BzdkwOCYveYqIrz97so0fOSBzZOYhe5m%2FVycTm2G%2FjSy%2BNhQem43mvP2USzIURWfnavtGQjAckzwW%2B3&G=0&R=https%3A%2F%2FARXIG4ZTGNA.hatchbuck.com%2FTrackLinkClick%3FID2%3DZ-Vh9xC8eZ7YVwS1aZG2nq31ISvwJxbWyt3r5TiQNA5SdDEqVDisH7cktwgZlFk70&I=20210902182553.000000006bb4%40mail6-56-ussnn1&X=MHwxMjcwODUwOjIxNzI2Mjg4NTM7MXwxMjcwODUxOjE3MzQ1MjYyNzs%3D&V=3&S=bx7ybPb7iCw0So1hqAuo-9LXVHj9EZQeS65m9NVYWtY)**_
Texas’ law bans abortions after six weeks, and also gives individuals the right to sue abortion clinics. This groundbreaking law is a big win for our Pro-Life cause, and should serve as a blue print for other states in our fight to end abortion. As a life-long Christian, and a father, nothing is more sacred to me than the gift of life. When I served in the the Iowa Senate, I was a leading voice defending life, including fighting to defund Planned Parenthood, sponsoring a bill that defined life at conception and as a strong supporter of amending the Iowa Constitution to not grant the right to an abortion. In Congress, I’m continuing my fight to defund Planned Parenthood and pass the Heartbeat Bill.
Pro-Abortion liberals are furious about the momentum our Pro-Life movement has built. Everytime we make progress, they double down on their anti-life agenda. [**Will you stand with us and protect life, no matter the cost?**](http://link.email.dynect.net/link.php?DynEngagement=true&H=o%2F0m%2Fev%2F6ITrlgR28I6hZPwmXBqp00S7iuu3en%2BRQinJ0cjHs%2BzdkwOCYveYqIrz97so0fOSBzZOYhe5m%2FVycTm2G%2FjSy%2BNhQem43mvP2USzIURWfnavtGQjAckzwW%2B3&G=0&R=https%3A%2F%2FARXIG4ZTGNA.hatchbuck.com%2FTrackLinkClick%3FID2%3DgYe3QaVrUMIceylWpi_hjHraPAmUhKLn7iIX3ausaxae1yAn83n79EF_DXDT71xe0&I=20210902182553.000000006bb4%40mail6-56-ussnn1&X=MHwxMjcwODUwOjIxNzI2Mjg4NTM7MXwxMjcwODUxOjE3MzQ1MjYyNzs%3D&V=3&S=Crb1bnKxntiFZ9D8GgVjqvCOJEqcLfLZH2jsI2hXmKw)

I’m deeply disturbed.

This week, my opponent Madison Cawthorn threatened “bloodshed” while pushing Trump's Big Lie -- the false claim that our elections are rigged.

**We knew Madison Cawthorn was awful --_but this is downright alarming._**

It’s sentiments like this that led to January 6th: _The attack on our Capitol, the killing of police officers, and the threat to elected representatives._

But still, Republican Party leaders have said NOTHING as Cawthorn spreads dangerous lies and incites his base to violence.

**Our Democracy cannot wait. The onus is on us to condemn this behavior and make sure Cawthorn’s political career is finished.**

**[So please, if you’re as outraged as I am, will you step up and support my fight to expel Madison Cawthorn from Congress for good? clean_body: He's threatening "bloodshed." | = I’m deeply disturbed. This week, my opponent Madison Cawthorn threatened “bloodshed” while pushing Trump's Big Lie -- the false claim that our elections are rigged. We knew Madison Cawthorn was awful --but this is downright alarming. It’s sentiments like this that led to January 6th: The attack on our Capitol, the killing of police officers, and the threat to elected representatives. But still, Republican Party leaders have said NOTHING as Cawthorn spreads dangerous lies and incites his base to violence. Our Democracy cannot wait. The onus is on us to condemn this behavior and make sure Cawthorn’s political career is finished. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = In solidarity, Eric | | Paid for by Eric Gash For Congress PO Box 543, Hendersonville, NC 28793 www.ericgash.com Eric Gash is a teacher, a pastor, a former professional football player, and former Hendersonville High School football coach. Peter-

body:
In GOP-led states across the country, the right to vote is under attack with unnecessary restrictions that limit voters’ ability to make their voices heard at the ballot box.
#
Team,
Last week, the U.S. House passed the John Lewis Voting Rights Act.
This should be our top priority in the Senate -- and protecting the right to vote should be a non-partisan issue. But Senate Republicans are already threatening to stand in the way.
**[I need 750 supporters to add their name to my petition to protect voting rights and ensure everyone can participate in our democracy. Will you sign your name now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35122537/304103110/-1949633605?ms=jr_em_nd_210902_1&refcode=jr_em_nd_210902_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MzM3Mzg1Ny0zZTBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7VhyeNByZsQLiVrYAqKSSWMNOfIBiOsKRse8z-sPQYE=&emci=ce124d1d-230c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=53373857-3e0c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=3800590)**

**[Add your name now and call on the Senate to pass the John Lewis Voting Rights Act.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35122538/304103111/-1949633605?ms=jr_em_nd_210902_1&refcode=jr_em_nd_210902_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MzM3Mzg1Ny0zZTBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7VhyeNByZsQLiVrYAqKSSWMNOfIBiOsKRse8z-sPQYE=&emci=ce124d1d-230c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=53373857-3e0c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=3800590)**

name: Burt Jones for Georgia
subject: PRESIDENT TRUMP ENDORSES BURT JONES FOR LIEUTENANT GOVERNOR OF GEORGIA
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BURT JONES FOR GEORGIA
body:
---
| | | | | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE THURSDAY, SEPTEMBER 2, 2021
PRESIDENT TRUMP ENDORSES BURT JONES FOR LIEUTENANT GOVERNOR OF GEORGIA
JACKSON - Today, President Donald J. Trump endorsed conservative Burt Jones for Lieutenant Governor of Georgia. In 2016 and 2020, Burt served as President Trump's campaign co-chair in Georgia, and he was the first elected official in Georgia to endorse the President. As President Trump's endorsement proves, Burt is the only candidate in the race for Lieutenant Governor who will safeguard and advance the America First agenda, fight for election integrity, and deliver results for hardworking Georgians.
Read the full text of President Trump's endorsement below:
---
|
---
|
"I am honored and humbled to receive the endorsement of President Donald J. Trump in my campaign for Lieutenant Governor of Georgia. I am the only person in my race who has had the President's back from day one, and it's an honor to have his full support," said Burt Jones. "As Lieutenant Governor, I will work to advance the President's America First agenda and continue to grow our economy, improve our schools, secure our elections, and keep Georgia safe. I look forward to traveling the state and meeting with the good people of Georgia as we work toward a big win in November 2022."
---
| ###

name: Erica Smith
subject: They’re taking away our right to abortion
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
Help me support Planned Parenthood Action Fund.
#
This email is a long one, but I have a lot to say.
**As you may know by now,_Roe v. Wade_ functionally ceases to exist in Texas. An extreme six-week abortion ban officially took effect yesterday after the Supreme Court failed to intervene.**
So today I wanted to share my very personal experience with abortion. I’ll tell you about how my decision affected my family, and how it shaped my faith and policy ideas moving forward.
I had my youngest son, Elias, at 22 weeks. He was very premature as a result of preeclampsia and pregnancy-induced hypertension. It was a really scary situation.
At 16 weeks, my doctors told me that if I continued my pregnancy I would be risking my own death.
This meant I faced an incredibly difficult decision. Before Elias’ delivery, I had to decide on priority of life. _"If it comes down to it,"_ my care team asked, _"Do you want us to save you or your unborn child?"_
Despite my infinite love for my children and family, I made the decision for doctors to save my baby if they could not save us both.
Only I could make that decision. Only I could make that choice.
This experience has shaped my views and policy positions on abortion rights. Nothing should stand in the way of a person’s right to abortion. Every woman deserves to make their own choice and control their own body.
With the rise of back-door attempts at overturning abortion rights across several states, including Texas and here in North Carolina, it has never been more imperative for Congress to codify _Roe v. Wade_ as soon as possible.
But here’s the most important thing: **We’ll have a fighting chance at codifying _Roe v. Wade_ by electing Democratic U.S. Senators who will proudly vote to end the filibuster and guarantee the right to a safe, legal abortion.**
Send me to the U.S. Senate, and I’d be the deciding YES vote on both those things. So today I am humbly asking you to join me in splitting a donation between Planned Parenthood Action Fund and our campaign:
[**_Will you rush a split donation of $5 between Planned Parenthood Action Fund and our campaign today? North Carolina deserves a Senator who will proudly vote to end the filibuster and codify _Roe v. Wade_. Just click here to donate, and your contribution will be split evenly between Planned Parenthood Action Fund and Erica Smith for U.S. Senate._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/13662?refcode=em20210902-407&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=407%2E3698%2E94LALZ)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/13662?refcode=em20210902-407&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=407%2E3698%2E94LALZ)**
Thank you for reading,
Erica ❤️
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210902-407-footer&t=21&refcode2=407_3698_94LALZ&akid=407%2E3698%2E94LALZ)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=22&akid=407%2E3698%2E94LALZ)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=23&akid=407%2E3698%2E94LALZ)

Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

name: John Fetterman
subject: re: Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Reproductive freedom is sacred both in Pennsylvania and across America.
#
Peter,
As of yesterday morning, because of the Supreme Court's refusal to intervene, _Roe v. Wade_ functionally ceased to exist in Texas. **They now have the most extreme abortion law in the country, and its effects will be immediate and devastating.**
Not only does the extreme law ban abortion at six weeks, which is before most people even know they’re pregnant, it deputizes private citizens to act like bounty hunters, promising a $10,000 reward to those who successfully sue anyone who they believe is providing or assisting someone in accessing abortion.
**I want to make it extremely clear where I stand on this issue, Peter: The right to an abortion is non-negotiable. Reproductive freedom is sacred both in Pennsylvania and across America.**
It's obvious that we can't rely on the Supreme Court that Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell stacked with conservative justices like Neil Gorsuch, Brett Kavanaugh, and Amy Coney Barrett to protect _Roe v. Wade_.
It's time for Democrats in Washington to act.
Democrats in the House and Senate should vote like Democrats and **scrap the filibuster** — allowing the swift and essential passage of bills like the Women's Health Protection Act that would protect reproductive freedom nationally.
Peter, send me to the U.S. Senate, and I guarantee you that I will NOT hesitate for a second to protect abortion access and pass the kinds of bold legislation that would transform our country. But I can't get there without you.
[**_Will you please donate $5 to help me add another unwavering Democratic vote to defend reproductive freedom to the U.S. Senate? It will take all of us to elect leaders who will act boldly to protect abortion access for all people nationwide._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/29639?refcode=em20210902-2502&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2502%2E434096%2EzhMyTi)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/29639?refcode=em20210902-2502&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=2502%2E434096%2EzhMyTi)**
Here in Pennsylvania, Governor Wolf and I will veto ANY bill that limits a person's reproductive freedom.
Together, we're the first and second line of defense for abortion rights and reproductive freedom in our Commonwealth.
**But the truth is, Peter, it isn't enough.** Democrats must immediately enact federal protections for reproductive rights on the national level so we can prevent the types of regressive anti-woman abortion bans like the one we're seeing in Texas.
So I'll say for the umpteenth time. The filibuster must go. And we have to fight as hard as we can to elect enough Democrats to the U.S. Senate who will fight relentlessly to defend abortion access.
[**_If you can, please contribute $5 or more to our people-powered movement right now. There are SO many ways we must respond to this dangerous threat to reproductive freedom, including ensuring that we have enough votes to enact federal protections to defend unfettered access to abortion._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/29639?refcode=em20210902-2502&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=2502%2E434096%2EzhMyTi)
Send me to the U.S. Senate, and I will *always* act with conviction and vote in favor of progress for the working families of this country.
Send me to the U.S. Senate, and I will be the 51st Democratic YES vote on urgent changes, like abolishing the filibuster and defending reproductive rights for people across this nation.
Send me to the U.S. Senate, and I will be a leader for ALL Pennsylvanians. No one taken for granted. No left behind.
That's what this campaign is about, and [** _why I'm counting on your support._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/29639?refcode=em20210902-2502&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2502%2E434096%2EzhMyTi)
Thank you,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails-footer-test?refcode=em20210902-2502-footer-test-ctrl&t=27&refcode2=2502_434096_zhMyTi&akid=2502%2E434096%2EzhMyTi)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=28&akid=2502%2E434096%2EzhMyTi)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=29&akid=2502%2E434096%2EzhMyTi)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Brencia=20Berry?=
subject: Build Back Better Bus Tour and Democrats Getting Engaged
body:
| | | |
---
| | | Dear Friends,
The Build Back Better bus tour was great! The tour provided an opportunity for Democrats to engage with people from across the country and discuss the ways in which the Build Back Better agenda is working for America. Our nation is getting back on track, and Democrats are delivering for the people!
Democratic National Committee Chairman, Jaime Harrison praised Democrats, saying, “Thanks to President Biden and Democrats, America is building back better than ever, and the DNC is hitting the road to make sure everybody knows that the ‘D’ in Democrats stands for ‘deliver.”
Since the bus tour began, a Democratic-controlled Congress has tirelessly fought on behalf of the American people. In just a short amount of time, Congress has taken bold action unseen in a generation.
* The House of Representatives [approved](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=2eb8605ac5&e=d6c5c7d7ec) the John R. Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act.
* The House of Representatives took a critical step in [advancing](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=68e27cdafb&e=d6c5c7d7ec) President Biden’s plan to build our country back better by voting to advance the budget framework for the $3.5 trillion spending package.
* The Democratic-led Senate [passed](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=a44ab87192&e=d6c5c7d7ec) an historic infrastructure bill to revitalize and rebuild our country’s roads and bridges.

In contrast, Republicans across the country have vigorously worked to spread [misinformation](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=95817448df&e=d6c5c7d7ec) COVID-19,[ pass anti-voter laws](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=85dfd13e43&e=d6c5c7d7ec) across the country, and even protect the [domestic terrorists](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=ebf2529dfd&e=d6c5c7d7ec) who stormed our Capitol and tried to overthrow our democracy.
While the bus tour has wrapped up, the work of the Democrats continues. The legislation being passed will be an investment into people, not just projects. Democrats will keep fighting for the Build Back Better agenda delivering for all, not just the few. Progress is being made to:
* create good-paying jobs
* make transformative investments in health care child care, and the care economy
* rebuild our crumbling infrastructure
* lower prescription drug prices
* invest in the middle class by cutting taxes for working families
* tackle the climate crisis

Democrats have formed a broad, diverse coalition in every corner of this nation. We are meeting constituents right where they are and continuing to ensure that every voice is heard. I hope that you will join me in this effort.
In this email, you will find ways to support. Help us make progress by keeping Democrats in a position to make change, particularly in California. Share out information about the upcoming California recall and keep the Golden State on the right path. Please also help us highlight local issues by telling us your story. Let us know what is important to you and your community. Lastly, you will find links to photos from this amazing bus tour! Please share and enjoy!

Best, Brencia Berry Director of Coalitions and Community Engagement Democratic National Committee

body:
A terrorist emerged from the bathroom, bare-chested and armed with an assault rifle, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d00e823aa6c245b48a68bacb19e37a79&_e=uIMUCNfFaDWMrsgiEqdCyM8HF_mdRfeXF9lYtqbCR1gEzpoW--odIcoCOBEGG-MMtkQlVgPVKYWmNwPnviGt59usNyN3fdWEZUXb7DTJUhupHLCKLpdSY8fmN2xCvYy8XhqQYxZOWfelGfrw8AEos0QLuG3dD1jJAVRPHt3BbtMxQnUao_7eYwMl0DaMwPsH7l5d0HsZtUgJNC9f9f4q5gbjlne08keLDJI_Yw1ptLqE46edO1jK_o-qmVYUlLVlVLgHzff87_FVbPr2ljGrLeFPeSZcNJ7LLMJPEzwA1ae9BZTuEFMQ2Gb8NxV07O1kpLxWk9sfkw7shippI1B99iDYAO8xliMtg5zm_V3PCvcYVxP6Szo6raqvvFJ_dfNa551omIL9UVoZ2azHfBlZDnkmywd519Ku_eXztXHbQf3t2ssfIzbfvVcuV7hUI2eoWi1ucKLtWnY4qrPlrhr_aw%3D%3D)
