Fellow Conservative,

Like so many Americans, I am watching the scenes coming out of Afghanistan with disbelief, extreme sadness and even anger. You see, I served the greatest country on Earth in Afghanistan back in 2015. But Afghanistan wasn't the only place I looked terrorism directly in the eyes...

**August 21 st marked six years since the fateful late-summer afternoon that changed my life and those of my two best friends - forever.**

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d00e823aa6c245b48a68bacb19e37a79&_e=uIMUCNfFaDWMrsgiEqdCyM8HF_mdRfeXF9lYtqbCR1gEzpoW--odIcoCOBEGG-MMtkQlVgPVKYWmNwPnviGt59usNyN3fdWEZUXb7DTJUhupHLCKLpdSY8fmN2xCvYy8XhqQYxZOWfelGfrw8AEos0QLuG3dD1jJAVRPHt3BbtMxQnUao_7eYwMl0DaMwPsH7l5d0HsZtUgJNC9f9f4q5gbjlne08keLDJI_Yw1ptLqE46edO1jK_o-qmVYUlLVl99pntrGnqrZtFfTGPPnih6h7Gs2Cuuwe8UFjZ_JQixgd5HYL0BXmD_Ye2PcqscK7ZVjggv8uM1MVRPp--jr9HY89lk9aZNdN7u1wfjMXN0ugibFE2Jg85DRizD4LtwBOzdiRiKrncsEq4Bp93oJdsT6s7kGOKGjBznZyICsVIXxczajvPpeB76fljnXnqtd0fN3B0aD0f_fn8eCLXgoBIQ%3D%3D)
I had just finished serving our great nation in Afghanistan when my best friends and I decided to take a vacation in Europe. We were traveling on a Paris-bound train when a terrorist emerged from the bathroom, bare-chested and armed with an assault rifle, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take over and kill us all.

As a soldier, I was trained to take out a terrorist threat -As an American, I was taught to stand up for freedom no matter where I was in the world. **Which is why I, my friends and other brave travelers took the action needed to stop this terrorist.**

This split-second decision prevented what witnesses contend could have become a mass slaughter. There is a reason I was able to make this split-second decision to intervene, Fellow Conservative - **I have and always will be willing to give my life in the fight for freedom, in the image of true American values.**

[**At the end of this email, I am going to ask you to donate $6 to my campaign for Congress, in honor of the sixth anniversary of the Thalys train attack. But first, you need to understand why we need an American fighter like myself in Washington.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d00e823aa6c245b48a68bacb19e37a79&_e=uIMUCNfFaDWMrsgiEqdCyM8HF_mdRfeXF9lYtqbCR1gEzpoW--odIcoCOBEGG-MMtkQlVgPVKYWmNwPnviGt59usNyN3fdWEZUXb7DTJUhupHLCKLpdSY8fmN2xCvYy8XhqQYxZOWfelGfrw8AEos0QLuG3dD1jJAVRPHt3BbtMxQnUao_7eYwMl0DaMwPsH7l5d0HsZtUgJNC9f9f4q5gbjlne08keLDJI_Yw1ptLqE46edO1jK_o-qmVYUlLVlCMZGJdpglibudLjRKsBfbHXYX63DqfvDonQVMRmhma52JD-Oxc5WwreBZb9uBsPaQSjwV2_OjGvo37zIFgdYXoq9WX1Oinz5Kbcm52k76FfL9ayRSVr5Tg2dtgrwGa-MC-9Pll6JDJEomiyLy8Kz2Ah-uZBlgYuiMTp8IfBGcKKl8vVc6paOl518EIS_Mwvc5Iu6FP21iraw0sOZcRnl2g%3D%3D)

[**DONATE $6 TODAY -> **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d00e823aa6c245b48a68bacb19e37a79&_e=uIMUCNfFaDWMrsgiEqdCyM8HF_mdRfeXF9lYtqbCR1gEzpoW--odIcoCOBEGG-MMtkQlVgPVKYWmNwPnviGt59usNyN3fdWEZUXb7DTJUhupHLCKLpdSY8fmN2xCvYy8XhqQYxZOWfelGfrw8AEos0QLuG3dD1jJAVRPHt3BbtMxQnUao_7eYwMl0DaMwPsH7l5d0HsZtUgJNC9f9f4q5gbjlne08keLDJI_Yw1ptLqE46edO1jK_o-qmVYUlLVlRR8zthfN3RQMfEXw3-wBAZJybYtPmyd_PBmv23XP8FLFXsYQ1omAx0u8T9J6jIFectZxfVlT6tnTQGKzNyEELYfTi5BZ4sTP9jS-Zr-S0jdnWLxlsxgneTTvhVJGaIHQiXLGdoEPXqJVj1Y_Aklh60__1_JJjeA7kQ54aNJqFALQQ3NbO4560wuvnjtnFlzL8-J1903tyO0WYScnjtmwow%3D%3D)
Now, our homeland is in danger. Not from radical Islamic terrorists, but radical Democrats who want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. Leftist legislation is assaulting our Nation, our communities, and the American Dream.

Right now, Democrats are...
* Opening and destroying our borders. They are g**ranting dangerous amnesty** that will flood every corner of America.
* **Raising our taxes** like we have never seen, and making common goods like gas and groceries unaffordable.
* **Defunding the police,** leading to a surge in violent crime
* **Erasing historical figures** from our schools like George Washington and Abraham Lincoln
* Teetering on the edge of a **dangerous foreign policy crisis**

These power-hungry Democrat elitists like Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden don’t care about the people they represent. **They only care about their own radical agenda, and my opponent, Peter DeFazio is one of the primary offenders.**

The Biden Democrats' grip on power in Washington is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security. The only way to pull America out of this leftist tailspin is by taking back the House in 2022. **We need a fighter in Congress, Fellow Conservative and I hope that hearing my story proves to you that I am the man for the job.**

My life’s mission has always been to represent the America I know and love - the world’s bastion of freedom and economic prosperity. [**I am taking that mission and putting it into action by running for Congress, by fighting for my neighbors and their wellbeing in Washington.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d00e823aa6c245b48a68bacb19e37a79&_e=uIMUCNfFaDWMrsgiEqdCyM8HF_mdRfeXF9lYtqbCR1gEzpoW--odIcoCOBEGG-MMtkQlVgPVKYWmNwPnviGt59usNyN3fdWEZUXb7DTJUhupHLCKLpdSY8fmN2xCvYy8XhqQYxZOWfelGfrw8AEos0QLuG3dD1jJAVRPHt3BbtMxQnUao_7eYwMl0DaMwPsH7l5d0HsZtUgJNC9f9f4q5gbjlne08keLDJI_Yw1ptLqE46edO1jK_o-qmVYUlLVlqtnt-iwXaW4umT42vklLNi32lyoASpY_8GVN5bgXKphJ9DgySmjGckz4ap2OWIpV74Cl_ezyHME1L1TCPLsRhDZR9esZWADEiviOqkpc9aICsL6_sdzBQDCqi21SCJHd2wJJXq3J_qqJsxz054fg8g0r2pg0dsET7nRYLYo4Pe_agHgx7Q08nKJjBFvtiXGZTM_H3OEV_9OFWFxWP1mgiw%3D%3D)

This will not be an easy road, which is why I am reaching out to you. I will need the financial support of every American patriot; every single dollar will help. clean_body: A terrorist emerged from the bathroom, bare-chested and armed with an assault rifle, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | Fellow Conservative, Like so many Americans, I am watching the scenes coming out of Afghanistan with disbelief, extreme sadness and even anger. You see, I served the greatest country on Earth in Afghanistan back in 2015. But Afghanistan wasn't the only place I looked terrorism directly in the eyes... August 21 st marked six years since the fateful late-summer afternoon that changed my life and those of my two best friends - forever. I had just finished serving our great nation in Afghanistan when my best friends and I decided to take a vacation in Europe. We were traveling on a Paris-bound train when a terrorist emerged from the bathroom, bare-chested and armed with an assault rifle, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take over and kill us all. As a soldier, I was trained to take out a terrorist threat -As an American, I was taught to stand up for freedom no matter where I was in the world. Which is why I, my friends and other brave travelers took the action needed to stop this terrorist. This split-second decision prevented what witnesses contend could have become a mass slaughter. There is a reason I was able to make this split-second decision to intervene, Fellow Conservative - I have and always will be willing to give my life in the fight for freedom, in the image of true American values. Now, our homeland is in danger. Not from radical Islamic terrorists, but radical Democrats who want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. Leftist legislation is assaulting our Nation, our communities, and the American Dream. Right now, Democrats are... Opening and destroying our borders. They are granting dangerous amnesty that will flood every corner of America. Raising our taxes like we have never seen, and making common goods like gas and groceries unaffordable. Defunding the police, leading to a surge in violent crime Erasing historical figures from our schools like George Washington and Abraham Lincoln Teetering on the edge of a dangerous foreign policy crisis These power-hungry Democrat elitists like Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden don’t care about the people they represent. They only care about their own radical agenda, and my opponent, Peter DeFazio is one of the primary offenders. The Biden Democrats' grip on power in Washington is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security. The only way to pull America out of this leftist tailspin is by taking back the House in 2022. We need a fighter in Congress, Fellow Conservative and I hope that hearing my story proves to you that I am the man for the job.** My life’s mission has always been to represent the America I know and love - the world’s bastion of freedom and economic prosperity. This will not be an easy road, which is why I am reaching out to you. I will need the financial support of every American patriot; every single dollar will help. Thank you very much, Alek Skarlatos Republican for Congress | Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. His heroism earned him several awards and medals around the world. ---|--- | ---|--- Alek Skarlatos is a former Oregon National Guardsman. clean_body: Kevin McCarthy just threatened telecom companies that comply with the lawful request to preserve documents related to the January 6th investigation. | = McCarthy threatens telecom companies over Jan. 6 investigation \- CBS News This is unhinged, friend. Kevin McCarthy just threatened telecom companies that comply with the lawful request to preserve documents related to the January 6th investigation. It's yet another attempt from the GOP leader to obstruct the investigation. It's starting to look more and more like McCarthy has something to hide. Friend, I'm running to hold McCarthy accountable. Not just for his role on Jan. 6th -- but for turning his back on our community. It's going to take a ton of people standing with me to make sure we 1.) Hold him accountable and 2.) Deny him a shot at the Speaker's gavel, which is why I'm asking: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = You might be thinking this, friend, but it needs to be said: This threat is certainly wrong, but it also might be unethical or even illegal. McCarthy insinuated that if Republicans get the House majority, these companies will have hell to pay. We'll leave enforcement of laws to the House Ethics Committee and the Department of Justice -- but we can take matters into our own hands_ by holding McCarthy accountable at the ballot box, which is what we will do. = Thanks, Marisa Teacher for Congress =** | = Marisa Wood is a public school teacher and Democrat running a historic campaign to unseat GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy in California's 23rd District. 2022 is our best shot in decades to finally defeat McCarthy. name: Martin Heinrich
subject: The future of Roe v. Wade
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35124349/304108483/-272948131?refcode=MTH_em_20210902_X_PET_ROE_X_ACT_US_all_all_ROE_MTH_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2ZkZjJiYi00NjBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vfoltb8nDOiu2QuTjZZKRliwbVl41BYHH7hq_E6GGeo=&emci=fbfdf2bb-460c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=fcfdf2bb-460c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=252045)
---
Folks, Late last night, the Supreme Court functionally ended _Roe v. Wade._ **Their decision is wrong. It’s unconstitutional. And it puts at risk countless women’s lives.** It begins in Texas, where they’ve banned nearly all abortions after six weeks of pregnancy, before most women know they are even pregnant. And when I say they banned “nearly all,” I mean it. **_There are no exceptions for rape or incest._** Republicans have spent decades working to undermine women’s access to health care. _Their efforts won yesterday_ when a conservative supermajority on the Supreme Court allowed the Texas ban to go into effect. Who lost? Women and every single one of us who believes in the right to privacy. Like in so many areas, New Mexico has led the way in protecting women’s rights — recently repealing a law that criminalized doctors for providing abortions. But just like with voting rights, a woman’s constitutional rights should not stop and start at state lines. That’s why we must now protect reproductive rights through federal law. [**Time is of the essence. Add your name right now to join me in calling for action:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35124350/304108484/-1090204186?refcode=MTH_em_20210902_X_PET_ROE_X_ACT_US_all_all_ROE_MTH_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2ZkZjJiYi00NjBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vfoltb8nDOiu2QuTjZZKRliwbVl41BYHH7hq_E6GGeo=&emci=fbfdf2bb-460c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=fcfdf2bb-460c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=252045) | [ADD YOUR NAME →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35124351/304108485/-1090204186?refcode=MTH_em_20210902_X_PET_ROE_X_ACT_US_all_all_ROE_MTH_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2ZkZjJiYi00NjBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vfoltb8nDOiu2QuTjZZKRliwbVl41BYHH7hq_E6GGeo=&emci=fbfdf2bb-460c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=fcfdf2bb-460c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=252045)
---
The Supreme Court will take up another extreme case before the end of the year — a law that could ban abortions after 15 weeks in Mississippi. _We must act quickly to protect Roe v. Wade before the Supreme Court deals a final blow._
**[Join me in demanding a federal law guaranteeing a woman’s right to reproductive health care:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35124352/304108486/-1090204186?refcode=MTH_em_20210902_X_PET_ROE_X_ACT_US_all_all_ROE_MTH_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2ZkZjJiYi00NjBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vfoltb8nDOiu2QuTjZZKRliwbVl41BYHH7hq_E6GGeo=&emci=fbfdf2bb-460c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=fcfdf2bb-460c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=252045)**
[ADD YOUR NAME →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35124353/304108487/-1090204186?refcode=MTH_em_20210902_X_PET_ROE_X_ACT_US_all_all_ROE_MTH_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2ZkZjJiYi00NjBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vfoltb8nDOiu2QuTjZZKRliwbVl41BYHH7hq_E6GGeo=&emci=fbfdf2bb-460c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=fcfdf2bb-460c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=252045)

name: Mark Takano (personal)
subject: following up from last month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
There is a lot to be worried about right now

| Peter — Thank you!!

I'll be honest, we came up a little short of our end-of-month fundraising goal. But even though we missed our goal, I’m still so grateful for all your support -- whether you donated, signed petitions, read my emails or have supported me in any other way -- I truly appreciate it.

Although there is a lot to be worried about right now -- Gov. Newsom losing his recall election, losing our House majority, the future of Roe v. Wade, raging wildfires, and more -- **I am optimistic that with you on my side, we will persevere and continue to build a stronger, more equitable California and nation.**

But Peter, we have a lot of work to do and a major End of Quarter fundraising deadline at the end of this month.

If we want to take on Trump, Larry Elder, and the rest of the MAGA party, we need to hit our fundraising goals. And because we missed last month’s deadline, we have our work cut out for us.

[**So Peter, if you’re able and you haven’t already -- or want to chip in again -- can I count on you to chip in $3 to jump into September with a running start? name: Marco Rubio
subject: I'm begging
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
Friend, I can’t believe this.
|
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: 15 million
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
That's how many mail ballots unaccounted for |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=3f5c578275&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,

Word just in – about 15 million mail in ballots were unaccounted for in the 2020 Presidential election.

This is unacceptable. And I’m here to stand up for election integrity in one of the key swing states in which FRAUD ousted our rightful President.

**My name is Mark Finchem. I am a State Representative in Arizona and am the vanguard leading the charge in the fight for election integrity in Arizona, in the greatest grassroots movement of the millennium! And now I am running for Secretary of State in Arizona. **

**_I paid for important hearings out of pocket when no one else would pay for them. I listened when others covered their ears and I spoke up when others stayed silent._**

[_Please donate today to stand up for election integrity in Arizona!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=46d1925161&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=f432694dc8&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| If you are done with the propaganda from those who stole the election – it’s time to stand up and speak out.

“Safest and most secure?” That is absurd.

In fact, the Public Interest Legal Foundation delivered a research brief highlighting a few key findings regarding the 2020 election.

In particular:
* In 2020, there were 90.6 million ballots sent
* Of these 90.6 million ballots, 1.1 million were undeliverable
* 560,814 were rejected
* 14.7 million were “unknown.”

**These numbers don’t mean anything without additional clarity, so let me quote the brief directly on its definition of “unknown”**

_The U.S. Election Assistance Commission asks local officials how many ballots were not returned as voted, were undeliverable, or were otherwise “unable to be tracked.” The USPS Inspector General most recently reported that only 13 percent of mail ballots in the 2018 General Election used the official tracking system. This means there is a wide variety of things that can happen to a ballot in the “unknown” column. A ballot can be put in the wrong mailbox and land in an unfriendly neighbor’s trash. It can be thrown out with your unpaid bills. It can be left outside for the wind to carry the last mile (like seen in Nevada in 2020). Election officials simply do not know what happened. Unknown ballots are the greatest blind spot in the American electoral system._

**It should be noted that there were only 5.9 million ballots that were “unknown” in 2016, in which President Trump rightfully won.**

Let’s do some math. There was about a 117% increase in the number of ballots sent out. There was a **__149%__** increase in the number of ballots that were “unknown” and could have ended up in the wrong mailbox or the trash.

Folks, it doesn’t take a genius to do the math. It takes a pen and paper.

**_And when we are talking fraud, we are talking about only needing a small number of fraudulent votes for the Democrats to be CRIMINALS. Heck, even one would do the job._**

And the Democrats are pushing to increase the number of mail in ballots and voter fraud even further.

**In fact, the President of the Public Interest Legal Foundation issued the following statement:**

_“These figures detail how the 2020 push to mail voting needs to be a one-year experiment. Bills like H.R.1/S.1 risk inflating these numbers even further, pushing our election system toward error, disenfranchisement and ultimately widespread doubt about election outcomes. Some of the counties with the least experience in administering mail voting rejected the most ballots nationwide. If continued, 2020-style chaos will become the norm.”_

Think about that.

**If we let the Democrats continue down this path, and we let them bully us, and we let them call us conspiracy theorists and nutjobs, then they have already won. _“2020-style chaos will become the norm.”_**

I don’t know about you, but I got the pen in my hand and I did the math. It’s up for the Democrats to prove millions of Americans wrong, and that there was NO fraud in the 2020 election!
---
| ***Join the #ProveIt movement***
My name is Mark Finchem. I am a proud patriot, conservative, and supporter of Donald Trump. I have fought for election integrity from day one. And every day we see that the brand of election integrity grows stronger and the Fake News Media gets more scared.

**_[But we cannot do it without your help.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=1f578a720b&e=44b8c466b0)_**

[_Please donate TODAY to make a stand against the Democrats, and stand up for our elections!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=a2f8b3a29f&e=44b8c466b0)

[Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=06b96c6c02&e=44b8c466b0)

God Bless You,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=b98737df48&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---

Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737
[Add us to your address book](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=ef84eab184) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=ef84eab184).

name: Michael Bennet
subject: Hey, folks, here’s how you can make a difference in Texas right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
This is what you can do right now to help provide abortion access in Texas. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35124905/304110834/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWU1MDFkZS00OTBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UDMVJBXA93N1QTjgSfHZ_AU7Z46B5Yc4QD9BWTQUXOQ=)
Friend — I know you’re as angry and hurt as I am about the Supreme Court’s decision to let Texas’s extreme abortion ban stand. Texas Republicans have created a road map to undermine _Roe v. Wade._ I will continue to fight for the Women’s Health Protection Act, which will ensure all women, regardless of where they live, can access abortion care. It will codify _Roe v. Wade,_ enshrining access to reproductive care into law and will protect reproductive freedom from state and local government attacks. I’m ready to fight for this in Congress, but the most immediate thing we can do for vulnerable folks all over Texas is help providers continue their critical work. [**Click this link to split a donation to abortion funds helping people on the ground, providing the information and resources necessary for folks to get the reproductive care they need. Consider setting up a monthly contribution, they’re going to need our help long after today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35124906/304110835/1416029863?refcode=mfb-em-210902-abortion-fund&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWU1MDFkZS00OTBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UDMVJBXA93N1QTjgSfHZ_AU7Z46B5Yc4QD9BWTQUXOQ=) | | **[DONATE TO TEXAS ABORTION FUNDS](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35124907/304110836/1416029863?refcode=mfb-em-210902-abortion-fund&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWU1MDFkZS00OTBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UDMVJBXA93N1QTjgSfHZ_AU7Z46B5Yc4QD9BWTQUXOQ=)**
---
It’s very possible that vulnerable people will flee Texas — and other states that may follow suit — for Colorado to access abortion care. **[Click here to rush a contribution to Colorado’s Cobalt Abortion Fund because they might need to help more patients as a result of this law and could also use our support.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35124908/304110837/7714240?refcode=mfb-em-210902-abortion-fund&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWU1MDFkZS00OTBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UDMVJBXA93N1QTjgSfHZ_AU7Z46B5Yc4QD9BWTQUXOQ=)**
In November, our state rejected a measure to limit reproductive freedom. Coloradans have been very clear on this issue: The decision about whether or not to have an abortion should be made between a woman and her doctor, period.
Thanks for listening, and thanks for being in this fight with me.
— Michael
---

Denver, CO 80201
United States

Derek,
There’s a reason everyone from _The New York Times_ to analysts at Nate Silver’s _FiveThirtyEight_ think the Virginia governor’s race is the most competitive election in 2021 -– it’s the GOP’s best shot to win.
Donald Trump knows that. That’s why he endorsed Glenn Youngkin, a far-right culture warrior who plans on spending $75 million to buy the Governor’s office.
And Derek, Trump’s bet on Youngkin might be working. A poll from a 538 top-rated pollster shows Youngkin and Terry in a virtual tie.
If Youngkin wins, it doesn’t just set back Virginia’s progress -- it sets back our country’s progress.
We can’t let that happen, Derek. We’ve got to stop Donald Trump now, and we do that by stopping Glenn Youngkin from becoming Virginia’s next governor.
[**To stand up to Trump and Youngkin, we’ll need to build the largest grassroots donor team in the history of Virginia. Can we count on your support?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35125089/304112647/1097049879?refcode=20210902.7_TEA_9N&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGU1MDFkZS00OTBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DjSSxd_D4Wt9qhxjEOtkgldKNfWmCSKKoNq8HAxn210=)

name: Team Freitas
subject: Hold Biden Accountable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Nick Freitas
body:
Friend, Joe Biden’s handling of Afghanistan can be described in one word....**atrocious**. He allowed Afghanistan to fall into the hands of the Taliban, leaving our weapons, allies, and citizens behind. [**Hold Biden Accountable**](http://links.nickforva.com/u/click?_t=1288bb27b50344f7a99321d594ffc386&_m=260cc3e1e24e495fa7dc01bf8ee4f214&_e=pDFttnVnvRx3r3QDjWD0x6tb0U6UahmY8JlBGITQ9vCmEb8tsj9B1s1ZLSpmiQxQ0xXv6SCm57mdeATsv2a3slKv5LGN4UHA0IegcNusq8EctQXiDuRB7lmRZ4H-MRZCd6xMxIAdLOaEdHTYZManN1H5jl4pC9XqYh_G-0f7w0DCr5Hqla6RQbsazeDWITxPaMg77_SbCTwWKEX9sbrRkFCCj9gkxI4c76C35enVJArop7ba5tcT6S6a3qcIs6EKTfYuwEdkOYUrD0eyyAbeufZt_q5Wpk1Sk99_ZwJcee6_RUiikiAvKP8y6xLTEynqPXRtgO2htaVsBiGkIHP6DDjXRSxq96Gv2MDMMEBhK30cNIqLcPmE9rb3cmDnWfas9EDjwBU0lJlcRS_2o_t85DD3VLL97Ew1G3JbOZlmXR0Ct223WJf3qKA1Yr5BYxyxZFtmxY_0yfhQQACSX5IQqA%3D%3D) After all of this, Joe Biden still REFUSES to admit that he did anything wrong or that anyone else could have done it better. clean_body: Friend, Joe Biden’s handling of Afghanistan can be described in one word....atrocious. He allowed Afghanistan to fall into the hands of the Taliban, leaving our weapons, allies, and citizens behind. After all of this, Joe Biden still REFUSES to admit that he did anything wrong or that anyone else could have done it better. We wholeheartedly disagree. Biden is 100% responsible for this catastrophe, though its our citizens and allies left behind who are suffering the consequences. Nick believes that, as the Commander in Chief, “Biden’s decision to abandon Americans in Afghanistan should stain his presidency”. Thank you, Team Freitas Paid for by Friends of Nick Freitas

subject: The Texas GOP is trying to dismantle our democracy by making it harder to vote. My promise to Nevadans is that will never happen here whileI’m Governor

body:

| | **Folks -- The Texas GOP just launched a MASSIVE attack on voting rights:** [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcvIZrrsPi2ArbSUBJFmQliKlGNMz-yK8G0mWKzfsnrZyeWI9UNtbzJAsTveoF2ZWDzAjpHYcYy9vYmrWaCfFfOKoV8be_nphpi6qxFwNk6CO_d-Q6C2mA_VKDGu2KwTG30anBK50u01QWmt9NMqzMvDx-NXqXH2-UxOueugZVPjq8sTRcvaUn938nMjOXKJRGudvWbULki_ZypjYGj8DvBmvUNKGNpNjKRJ1uc2jzePnnT-bM1BsI9RAo_0J9QMb3PEoebEdTJC9Kdd-EpcZHYvpgKcWx9Lsm8DmZerD_QIAJcJpejs_JRQ3eUFqm2wHm6g7o9rQs6rs2yjyzZo4hO4exDgtlerJYwrjpXrpiU3kCS2eecbSNyRM9se5AqlWkpoas2tj7mT_Az2hEGIb_SuJXiOF5eZhvwwodXBwd6k/3ez/EnP2Dr3RRbW4jfuvnK5Mpg/h0/e_xtJCcNr1KHs4CpofcibWvIdo7qGBsnJ1Jq86AVcac) The bill makes it even harder for folks to use their voice at the ballot box by: \- Banning election officials from promoting the use of vote by mail \- Outlawing methods that make voting easier like drive-through polling places, 24-hour voting, and temporary voting locations. \- Requiring large counties (which lean Democratic) to live-stream ballot counting The Texas GOP is using Donald Trump’s Big Lie to undermine our election processes and make voting harder because, frankly, _Texas isn’t a red state -- it’s a voter-suppressed state._ I’m sick and tired of Republicans acting like our fundamental right to vote is a pawn in their partisan games. **Our team is asking you to send Texas Republicans a message:[Nevadans support expanding and protecting voting rights. Will you sign on to our petition?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcvIZrrsPi2ArbSUBJFmQliKlGNMz-yK8G0mWKzfsnrZoEuY20jiNaQeuYjP9GyT61FPCWn5FJYvT1SCRouNJECWWvtjmrVU5Fw2AO7mK7nJWbcyz-M8wPxJweYbafaEhbU_m5qL2y749zBmxo0fpz4HTCAc-Toj9aG3aq76_9nXDTPfVRfUxcSd3AwtwbmoOCDGF1rAsQZsbVFZnMYbclhAHciognBnlRAlaQD_S-pUWDho4Ktwa65GNxJcJd4ini4ZHEpH-Oe0uZZT4CYIMW1C8LBfdmIM0zG71WF9_K4qcX8njSFf_sPA6FSsjF2SUieregJe5l134g2yUVo8w_qeIRJClqi-PBOwj9kb5Wfte9zd3cA0gBDqPkcFc76HYP39HlXT58y6bjoyRcuaukAuMVZy_9ik4CiMTokRKmBJ/3ez/EnP2Dr3RRbW4jfuvnK5Mpg/h1/IXhh7mAxLUWAxFXrTSQfSQcTanksTgO75ZjfNv46Pag)** | | | [SUPPORT VOTING RIGHTS →](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcvIZrrsPi2ArbSUBJFmQliKlGNMz-yK8G0mWKzfsnrZv1PL5eRb4J7E2FFhToMoCDYTIwdLxjY6-XlV09ONAuqegGrH-4M24OV9YJEi-ql5_lTThGfRmB1ydQ0IuD6kD0OQfik7h-UiqVfD6Imilq6EJkmx4a1PDOKznCFz_J6Xl5aGVF7TlabutxbCVuy-1yjMseDZOywfcCGayKZ0Fqn6RHeWwdsQOlIdx0D4LLS5HXltz7sgc-4307IaxtwVlZHUeDgMPIGh3kePH1fRUqx4kcd5Ne985_ieJYJplWbrhVG_P-xJFByVD-NKL02RLw-J9ZOMNsu2YZlgPiC3fQg9ulMJNpJ8YoUlrvdlS5eTnjJjDv38lfC560y3TuaJMpH1vnoCzKFXLoMk52OlIw74yVTUWKq_fmvCSDetfSQv/3ez/EnP2Dr3RRbW4jfuvnK5Mpg/h2/1pIzbRqC7J3vPdBz7aU341aaq5rsouscRwN0r8Byrbw)

While Republicans are continuing to build barriers to the ballot box, **I fought to make it easier for Nevadans to vote.** I signed a bill **permanently expanding mail-in voting and guaranteeing a mail ballot to every eligible voter.**
Nevada is leading the way in protecting the right to vote and I’m doing everything in my power to expand access to polls while ensuring our elections are **secure and fair.**
**[I’m horrified by what I’m seeing in Texas, and that’s why I’m taking a stand. Can I count on you to stand with me in support of expanding voting rights?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcvIZrrsPi2ArbSUBJFmQliKlGNMz-yK8G0mWKzfsnrZB6srtCwuZGU17wAsmA8TYrrMGa936WBlmleCT_hYYayhhgsW4gzP7Ba80R6SiSzUftEX4ik7TsjaIiy-rbtRNFbPrDz-30wpLhw1OoNoEXG4SOw_G2YzYZU8JKhRny9LGDj_xH_60ddJFxP6mr3WZugd1G8jjzq97KOFQ8yJYywC7CUovCNYFEAG_zJSA_wljmbKlNYRuAseFFtydNrChSudjOWc3mZ-VbjgyAZ6q_6nH4RoBUiUmASdmiDWLB_qb0V9rMlghxjpgaE8Q4Y8KXMIai-Z8ZIJnYhw9hX9U-CscDhIho8gdITCFiAWsVGkrV773T2LB56IqTFOUnrYsEslKv43HOCMC4colnLdGUeDio5UuavUivRyohivTfAS/3ez/EnP2Dr3RRbW4jfuvnK5Mpg/h3/pCeIieVhM-EcfzdHksGAIbX0Fvmqb0dcwsN2TReg39k)**

| Team, I’m simply amazed.

Thanks to so many Democrats stepping up, **we were able to fund our September anti-Calvert ads.**

That’s the power of grassroots movements that I so adamantly believe in, and I truly can’t thank you all enough for the parts you’ve played thus far in bringing better leadership to my Southern California community. [**_(If you didn’t have the chance to give, or you’d like to kickstart our momentum for the last month of this quarter, click here!)_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35125937/304123787/64319039?amount=3&amounts=3,10,25,50&refcode=BMFC_20210902_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzA1MzcyZC00ZjBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jPyoOu_i15DGoR0WRnVa9E2ES5asmrI3mRJXBjl4Ijg=) If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [DONATE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35125938/304123788/64319039?amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&refcode=BMFC_20210902_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzA1MzcyZC00ZjBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jPyoOu_i15DGoR0WRnVa9E2ES5asmrI3mRJXBjl4Ijg=)

I’m incredibly honored by your immense generosity, and I could talk nonstop about how important it is. But for the sake of time, I wanted to give a few more short thank yous:

To Deb from Oxford, KS: **THANK YOU for your $3 contribution.**
To Sungyun from Marietta, GA: **THANK YOU for your $10 contribution.**
To Juanita from Stockton, CA: **THANK YOU for your $25 contribution.**

Our movement is people-powered, and we truly couldn’t do this without gracious grassroots Democrats like you who consistently step up.

So to Deb, Sungyun, Juanita, and the hundreds of amazing members of this team: **THANK YOU!**

President Biden created a colossal disaster. Between his handling of the economy, coronavirus, Afghanistan and the southern border, it seems to me tha I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | [](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=99dfd53a6bd645078f15e14e61f617d2&_e=Ta8ZoLHgg6X0ozVFdzKR_RwmZ4B2A8STfr1eWYvCKhpd93WgVw3drSPQVDlVrwSMqI_9UsLNPawUFnUfG7NAIk7n6yTNAfaS1AKpkqt9TnhkqjeKA4gbrAMc1Js4kES5v0qJsnyDExYMDYsSdczJG2Tif0yrPCWnqs-6nL2Tt1dSDPFqhbqIgAdy3RkB3RE-rapDalX_paChwnqRe3ZfbvytQQiSKqZD7oX1Zqw8g7PPbrL1VV085wqT8sj5toYYzg7dnC9AJMwYm4TXJz88Utz3p4vsPnyCsPDZnOfPTsL3MNwPggf9GlFiHc8-tw_nYQ9da7CYunZstT_HmszSAw-sg7kkXmQCJDMbqQ402r3iRCIEESJyvcXQRFiiuPUxC037MHk2_g2P-a3NWqy8cfiEiftk83Rlzblo0TBuR-h-bJnsKErOEhWEQX7zdFoZ0EMdUL8IBaZljp9LAdbG9s18658JYZxY1oFFtkjffh7Dgtb6nUfDzp9H_QvxX3OZAYSEIrcEgjS8Se_IQ0oJeNyQxB1pqOixJWYTimPBmD9TyI3TBfjjnWMjO7Kgnji8-wWPWjUoY4r5txx8dvH3zQ2HYzvXyBxbXBEZaXOJ9zr1BGIezsgK2WzM4kcR_HkJ)

Peter,

Tuesday afternoon President Biden spoke to the American public about his chaotic withdrawal from Afghanistan, and for me as an Afghan veteran, it cemented in my mind that he is absolutely unfit for office.

The American presence in Afghanistan didn’t have to end the way that it did. The fault for what we’ve all witnessed with horror over the last several weeks – and the horrors that we’ll continue to witness as the Taliban once again turns Afghanistan into a safe-haven for terrorism – lies squarely with the current president and his senior advisors.

Not President Trump.

Not former secretary of State Mike Pompeo.

Not Republicans in Congress.

**[Watch the full clip of my interview with Fox below, then I’m asking you to sign onto my petition calling for an official investigation into how our country’s leaders let the Taliban become one Central Asia’s most powerful militaries overnight](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=99dfd53a6bd645078f15e14e61f617d2&_e=Ta8ZoLHgg6X0ozVFdzKR_RwmZ4B2A8STfr1eWYvCKhpd93WgVw3drSPQVDlVrwSMqI_9UsLNPawUFnUfG7NAIk7n6yTNAfaS1AKpkqt9TnhkqjeKA4gbrAMc1Js4kES5v0qJsnyDExYMDYsSdczJG2Tif0yrPCWnqs-6nL2Tt1dSDPFqhbqIgAdy3RkB3RE-rapDalX_paChwnqRe3ZfbvytQQiSKqZD7oX1Zqw8g7PPbrL1VV085wqT8sj5toYYzg7dnC9AJMwYm4TXJz88Utz3p4vsPnyCsPDZnOfPTsL3MNwPggf9GlFiHc8-tw_nYQ9da7CYunZstT_HmszSAw-sg7kkXmQCJDMbqQ402r3iRCIEESJyvcXQRFiiuPUxC037MHk2_g2P-a3NWqy8cfiEiftk83Rlzblo0TBuR-hUOOnMZZZgbBgw8oIxAiVP_S7za4_uml1zdL4yYalbvKtrHq_6F1ug-KqHYXSJbXhnmcT77KfFdkmfjdkFUrlbSkk8AQu-5k-XHKEkPQ-BaVKdrOUgxTQPsoV6ejUrn9rNMSKHgxHh07QLFFbQuk_GfrlYa-ifJXdeex3gcTWQ-5KuqdCIZJC1zaGdSzKkb2s7fIKB49t9RpmBzHX15s48)**.

President Biden created a colossal disaster. Between his handling of the economy, coronavirus, Afghanistan and the southern border, it seems to me that our country is in free fall. It’s hard to believe Biden has been president for just seven months.

President Biden and the Joint Chiefs of Staff should resign pending an investigation into their actions. Please join me in calling for the House to open an official inquiry immediately.

In service,
Alek Skarlatos
Republican for Congress

clean_body: President Biden created a colossal disaster. Between his handling of the economy, coronavirus, Afghanistan and the southern border, it seems to me tha I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | Peter, Tuesday afternoon President Biden spoke to the American public about his chaotic withdrawal from Afghanistan, and for me as an Afghan veteran, it cemented in my mind that he is absolutely unfit for office. The American presence in Afghanistan didn’t have to end the way that it did. The fault for what we’ve all witnessed with horror over the last several weeks – and the horrors that we’ll continue to witness as the Taliban once again turns Afghanistan into a safe-haven for terrorism – lies squarely with the current president and his senior advisors. Not President Trump. Not former secretary of State Mike Pompeo. Not Republicans in Congress. . President Biden created a colossal disaster. Between his handling of the economy, coronavirus, Afghanistan and the southern border, it seems to me that our country is in free fall. It’s hard to believe Biden has been president for just seven months. President Biden and the Joint Chiefs of Staff should resign pending an investigation into their actions. Please join me in calling for the House to open an official inquiry immediately. In service, Alek Skarlatos Republican for Congress | Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. His heroism earned him several awards and medals around the world. ---|--- | ---|--- Alek Skarlatos is a former Oregon National Guardsman. We only have **TWO WEEKS LEFT** until the deadline to cast your vote in the election to recall Gavin Newsom and friend, we need your help!

We know you’re just as tired of Gavin Newsom as we are, and if we want to have a shot at recalling him, we need to reach every voter in California to make sure they cast their votes. [**Can you rush in $25 or $50 to help us do this with ASAP? California’s future is in the balance.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=832d68fed94842dba9d612a1fa78af23&_e=PI1hgiTWDKl7313JRDXZ3oQS4nk3wlXNo25RDX837Y-y01S9Tmij_5IQUHg4y7pYaYada8PWHpD9zW8-zR1DdonHODH7922CgDFQt6lIE8UwTPt7_0pQoFwoQzUJfQwtLq2w8v8orOcBJAA8NB637Mdbs3a2ndvj-z4NOV2n6X3CK81i5NfL5q4n9YGq3dXVbZxNWXHYTQUyJiC5JMNNuNhtWjHMu_kTFnkjSr5iJ9wTyo1vfWE4BZlC4HUi_eQm2lTnQenEv5Lb_4wJ4zo0VwFnCStfRCoVunsw0svX5uycdiv3GWJztkvWtmypdpN32aA8u7C6LyPZp7jpK2ne92GS8P9iO3urrh1V8kdcYp0sLsb8teYZK7wwa4FHenrz)

clean_body: It’s imperative that you respond to this call to action and help us ensure Gavin Newsom loses this election. | We only have TWO WEEKS LEFT until the deadline to cast your vote in the election to recall Gavin Newsom and friend, we need your help! We know you’re just as tired of Gavin Newsom as we are, and if we want to have a shot at recalling him, we need to reach every voter in California to make sure they cast their votes. The deadline is right around the corner, and we don’t have much time to reach the rest of California before it’s too late! If we can’t reach every conservative and make sure that they vote in this special recall election, we’ll be stuck with Newsom and he and the radical Left will continue to destroy our beautiful state with their destructive agenda. We have a grim future ahead of us with a Governor who will be out for blood if we can’t pull this off, friend. That’s why it’s imperative that you respond to this call to action and help us ensure Gavin Newsom loses this election. Thank you, Lou Barnett Campaign Manager Larry Elder Recall Newsom Ballot Committee | PAID FOR BY LARRY ELDER BALLOT MEASURE COMMITTEE RECALL NEWSOM Committee major funding from: Elder for Governor 2021 Geoff Palmer Saul Fox Don't want to receive any more of our emails? | | Folks, If you’ve seen the news, you know that the **Supreme Court has given a green light to Texas in its cruel circumventing of _Roe v. Wade_.** We have to be honest with you, we’re feeling frustrated, angry, and even a little scared, too. For 48 years, generations of activists have been on the frontlines in the fight to protect a woman’s right to make her own health care decisions. Make no mistake, **the Supreme Court has created a public health crisis for millions of women.** _Texas’s cruel anti-choice law, which bans abortion at six weeks_ — far before most folks can tell they’re pregnant — encourages private citizens to sue anyone who assists in the abortion process. And folks, there isn’t even an exemption in cases of rape or incest. Like the pro-choice activists that have come before us, **it’s time that we stand up and raise our voices against the recent barbaric decision from the Supreme Court.** [**Will you add your name and join Susie in calling on states and the federal government to protect a woman’s right to choose?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35126440/304131169/909618173?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGU1NzE0My01MjBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yIWSozdkabKQobvIZquNaDohn-VOwSjCAiQYqf1YVpI=&emci=5905db92-310c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=58e57143-520c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=10997957) | | | [Sign on: Protect women’s rights >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35126441/304131170/909618173?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGU1NzE0My01MjBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yIWSozdkabKQobvIZquNaDohn-VOwSjCAiQYqf1YVpI=&emci=5905db92-310c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=58e57143-520c-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=10997957)

Reproductive rights are under attack at the state level.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35126545/304132598/-182076786?refcode=BLU-SJC-20210902-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzFhMGFmNi01MjBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HvRY-Y44230Bc7R4mEk8B5tzyZjYHuDgn2UjpvMzIrQ=)

| It’s unconscionable that, in 2021, our generation must continue to fight for a right that should have been settled 48 years ago. But last night, the conservative majority on the Supreme Court declined to block a Texas law that imposes the harshest abortion restrictions in the nation.

Reproductive rights are under attack at the state level. The new Texas law prohibits abortions after six weeks — before most people even know they are pregnant. What’s more, the law enables private citizens to sue abortion providers and anyone who helped someone else access an abortion, including spouses, friends, and even ride-share drivers. This ban is cruel and sets an absolutely devastating precedent.

**We need overwhelming majorities in Congress to do whatever it takes to defend _Roe v. Wade_ and protect reproductive rights at a federal level — and as a co-chair of recruitment at the DCCC, I’m helping lead the charge to elect more pro-choice members of Congress.**

[_**If you have the capacity, please consider contributing to my campaign today to ensure we hold our Democratic majority in Congress and don’t lose the rights we secured nearly 50 years ago.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35126546/304132599/-182076786?refcode=BLU-SJC-20210902-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzFhMGFmNi01MjBjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HvRY-Y44230Bc7R4mEk8B5tzyZjYHuDgn2UjpvMzIrQ=)

name: Catherine Cortez Masto
subject: McConnell’s handpicked candidate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good Virginia
body:
If I lose, Democrats will lose the Senate. | | |
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4misVJqoYYv96WDbNd4mRZCGpvPKgAIw7UkB8pWmEYg7urEEgKzZgRejhepEz39vZ_AkRQjfz_ggBnfjcBagX2GC5-t6aurBbUmcR5q3OuHCB_4AxMbnmlmWRYDA7wtN9UXQCCbHCgCTfg3o_u_RD7PndtHJMCdutP9c2r1jsK-Su-qpy_G0v2oW56caNzX25g6kP-Jeo3Ko9Hnh7Rns0i50MCPH6ktH8CidMZNO_eXvbjNjOI6e-1A2sWptfcZ5U5qDtisCFEd-fR9RuZ2dHo8Q_8myc8nWKEHfETYkyuAdrJLsLSBy2UWMhtIg8UKoLB8/3ez/QyCi0prSR6205qOW1DytRg/h0/VW5uwSxHfh5uw0d9orlmjLA2z1aUoqtwMjE01sBzIac) Derek,

I’m Catherine Cortez Masto, and I proudly represent Nevada in the U.S. Senate. Last election cycle, I worked tirelessly to defeat Mitch McConnell and help flip the Senate as the Chair of the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee, Senate Democrats’ campaign arm. Now, Mitch McConnell is making it crystal clear that he wants revenge.

In a moment, **[I’m going to ask you to split a $25 donation between my campaign and Common Good VA to defend our hard-won Senate majority.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4misVJqoYYv96WDbNd4mRZCGpvPKgAIw7UkB8pWmEYg7uoW0_KEHv4yZkecKd5EuEoQDFcFxoX8SSyiulItO0xbBrmyDOd2yRikcQz1t2x-YzcAwkmvq2hS6ekwM-NS2VJMKvVXh_oUOGR_uBJc_wPEFfFFCzszXzS18IoyjQUXC0vsDV-FI4yVgTNCRaw8uALcyFpBDvH9Wmo2LgTG_hk8RGKRQF0Ugl7RgSIMp6a77TpD9hB3q1mihPTW2PTOtlJkaOrpuJcjxUYgJP7QpWJLjqOb3AYxU43yVbuQUayx0xPBFhriej3CUcFetR5sE1e-Sx6RM3nYQQkApMccTyvYfw/3ez/QyCi0prSR6205qOW1DytRg/h1/ppJgr5GkuLAeeDo4I-Jrm9wdqfldqlWroYvLQ4JMoV8)** I hope you’ll let me explain – because if I lose this race, Democrats will lose the Senate majority.

I just got some urgent news that completely changes the state of my race, and I wanted you to be the first to know: **Mitch McConnell’s handpicked candidate has _officially_ announced his campaign to defeat me and take back the Senate for Republicans.**

CNN is reporting that my Senate seat is one of the most likely to flip and _The Cook Political Report_ just shifted this race in Republicans’ favor. Donald Trump nearly flipped Nevada in 2020, and the GOP and outside groups have already spent over $1 million this year to defeat me.

**That’s why my campaign just launched an emergency rapid-response goal to raise $50,000. Reaching this goal will help ensure we have the resources to defend this critical seat – and Common Good Virginia thought I should reach out. clean_body: If I lose, Democrats will lose the Senate. | | | Derek, I’m Catherine Cortez Masto, and I proudly represent Nevada in the U.S. Senate. Last election cycle, I worked tirelessly to defeat Mitch McConnell and help flip the Senate as the Chair of the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee, Senate Democrats’ campaign arm. Now, Mitch McConnell is making it crystal clear that he wants revenge. In a moment, I hope you’ll let me explain – because if I lose this race, Democrats will lose the Senate majority. I just got some urgent news that completely changes the state of my race, and I wanted you to be the first to know: Mitch McConnell’s handpicked candidate has officially announced his campaign to defeat me and take back the Senate for Republicans. CNN is reporting that my Senate seat is one of the most likely to flip and The Cook Political Report just shifted this race in Republicans’ favor. Donald Trump nearly flipped Nevada in 2020, and the GOP and outside groups have already spent over $1 million this year to defeat me. That’s why my campaign just launched an emergency rapid-response goal to raise $50,000. Reaching this goal will help ensure we have the resources to defend this critical seat – and Common Good Virginia thought I should reach out. I’m counting on you to rush a donation to help us defend the Senate. Nevada races are always close, Derek: just 2 percentage points decided my race in 2016, and just 2 percentage points separated President Biden from Donald Trump last year. Now that the GOP’s dark-money allies have a far-right, Trump-supporting extremist to throw their money behind and flip the only seat they need to regain Senate control, this race could be the most expensive in Nevada history. I really mean it when I say the Senate majority will be decided in Nevada – and the only way I can win is with grassroots supporters like you. That’s why I’m reaching out to you personally, Derek. Defending our Senate majority is the only way we’ll be able to keep fighting for the progress Americans need and deserve. But defending the Senate will take considerable resources – and right now I’m falling short of my emergency rapid-response goal. At my core, I'm a runner. But I wasn't always fast.

I grew up in the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, where I learned discipline, faith in God, and the value of hard work. It's also where I trained non-stop and got _**real fast.**_

**I'm from a working-class family.** I was one of seven children, so you'd be correct to say my parents had their hands full. My childhood was a happy one - **even more so once I overcame a stutter and disciplined myself to get in strong physical shape.**

Growing up in Georgia, I learned about sacrificing the things you want in the moment for the future you know you can have ... _**if you work hard enough.**_

Growing up in Georgia, I also learned it doesn't matter where you come from, what your family has, or what color your skin is - if you want something bad enough and you're willing to work hard for it, you can achieve it.

You may know of me from my days playing college football at the University of Georgia, where I was awarded the Heisman Trophy in 1982.

I was blessed to be successful in college football, enough so that my college career paved the way for me to play football professionally for many years in the USFL and NFL.

My career took me all over the country. Despite living in New Jersey when I played for the Generals, Dallas when I played for the Cowboys, Minneapolis when I played for the Vikings, or Philadelphia and New York when I played for the Eagles and the Giants, respectively, **my heart was always in Georgia.**

And at this moment in time, I'm deeply concerned about the future of Georgia and our country.

**Unfortunately, a liberal Democrat was elected to the U.S. Senate from Georgia in a runoff election earlier this year, and he's now serving out the last two years of a beloved former Republican senator's term.**

**The future of Georgia - and our country - is too important for me to stand on the sideline as radical liberals take our country down the wrong path.**

_**That's why I'm running for the United States Senate.**_

clean_body: I'm a conservative because I believe all people have the opportunity to pursue their dreams. | Peter, Today in America, politicians pit American against American. Rich vs. Poor. Black vs. White. Urban vs. Rural. I don't believe in that garbage. It's a lie. I'm a conservative who believes in smaller government, a strong military, personal responsibility, and making sure ALL people have the opportunity to pursue their dreams. I will win this incredibly important race, but I need your help. At my core, I'm a runner. But I wasn't always fast. I grew up in the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, where I learned discipline, faith in God, and the value of hard work. It's also where I trained non-stop and got real fast. I'm from a working-class family. I was one of seven children, so you'd be correct to say my parents had their hands full. My childhood was a happy one - even more so once I overcame a stutter and disciplined myself to get in strong physical shape. Growing up in Georgia, I learned about sacrificing the things you want in the moment for the future you know you can have ... if you work hard enough. Growing up in Georgia, I also learned it doesn't matter where you come from, what your family has, or what color your skin is - if you want something bad enough and you're willing to work hard for it, you can achieve it. You may know of me from my days playing college football at the University of Georgia, where I was awarded the Heisman Trophy in 1982. I was blessed to be successful in college football, enough so that my college career paved the way for me to play football professionally for many years in the USFL and NFL. My career took me all over the country. Despite living in New Jersey when I played for the Generals, Dallas when I played for the Cowboys, Minneapolis when I played for the Vikings, or Philadelphia and New York when I played for the Eagles and the Giants, respectively, my heart was always in Georgia. And at this moment in time, I'm deeply concerned about the future of Georgia and our country. Unfortunately, a liberal Democrat was elected to the U.S. Senate from Georgia in a runoff election earlier this year, and he's now serving out the last two years of a beloved former Republican senator's term. The future of Georgia - and our country - is too important for me to stand on the sideline as radical liberals take our country down the wrong path. That's why I'm running for the United States Senate. I'm just a guy from a small town in Georgia who's been blessed by God to live the American Dream. I'm ready to fight to keep that dream alive - for you too. Very Respectfully, Herschel Walker P.S. The liberals in Washington are going to unleash everything they've got to defeat me, so I need you on my team. Thank you. | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. At my core, I'm a runner. But I wasn't always fast.

I grew up in the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, where I learned discipline, faith in God, and the value of hard work. It's also where I trained non-stop and got _**real fast.**_

**I'm from a working-class family.** I was one of seven children, so you'd be correct to say my parents had their hands full. My childhood was a happy one - **even more so once I overcame a stutter and disciplined myself to get in strong physical shape.**

Growing up in Georgia, I learned about sacrificing the things you want in the moment for the future you know you can have ... _**if you work hard enough.**_

Growing up in Georgia, I also learned it doesn't matter where you come from, what your family has, or what color your skin is - if you want something bad enough and you're willing to work hard for it, you can achieve it.

You may know of me from my days playing college football at the University of Georgia, where I was awarded the Heisman Trophy in 1982.

I was blessed to be successful in college football, enough so that my college career paved the way for me to play football professionally for many years in the USFL and NFL.

My career took me all over the country. Despite living in New Jersey when I played for the Generals, Dallas when I played for the Cowboys, Minneapolis when I played for the Vikings, or Philadelphia and New York when I played for the Eagles and the Giants, respectively, **my heart was always in Georgia.**

And at this moment in time, I'm deeply concerned about the future of Georgia and our country.

**Unfortunately, a liberal Democrat was elected to the U.S. Senate from Georgia in a runoff election earlier this year, and he's now serving out the last two years of a beloved former Republican senator's term.**

**The future of Georgia - and our country - is too important for me to stand on the sideline as radical liberals take our country down the wrong path.**

_**That's why I'm running for the United States Senate.**_

name: Patrick Leahy
subject: Your reproductive rights shouldn't depend on which state you live in
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leahy for U
body:
I support reproductive rights.

| [](https://links.e.leahyforvermont.com/els/v2/j~94s-jNLdfy/ZnVNT01xbXNPSUpMNHJwWEdZOG9XZGw3NWJoTkpsbldFcjhQNTF1WE5CMkR1VTRvYVlNRU5ubE1KMzZsR0kxeWdwWXZSWnQ5anEvaWlCL3pxNEpyaTFaZkg1WEMzaHVXT2pZY0tpcXR2emc9S0/VkpSZUFjaE5zcHVpbnI1L045anN6NitEM3dCK1ErKytVejJBNEZ6OUhSalJkMmx4SFRxUHdUZ0FxSlhjdGsrdGlTeC9WZ01hVHlRQTdWSDJzMjh6MndCU1JhUlQvZWI3S0) Friend, _Roe v. Wade_ , the law of the land that protects the right to choose, is in danger. Earlier this week, Texas passed an abortion ban, the nation's most restrictive, which bans all abortion (including in cases of rape or incest) after six weeks. To put six weeks into perspective, most people do not yet know they're pregnant at six weeks. This is an all-out and totally unconstitutional ban. Which makes what happened late last night even more devastating. In a 5-4 decision, the Supreme Court is refusing to block the ban. _Roe v. Wade_ has never been more threatened than now. Will you stand up for Roe today, alongside me and the majority of Americans who support _Roe_ and reproductive rights? **[Do you support _Roe v. Wade_ , my friend?](https://links.e.leahyforvermont.)** | | [**YES »**](https://links.e.leahyforvermont.)
---
| | [**NO »**](https://links.e.leahyforvermont.com/els/v2/-YL0Fq3-N_sr/ZnVNT01xbXNPSUpMNHJwWEdZOG9XZGw3NWJoTkpsbldFcjhQNTF1WE5CMkR1VTRvYVlNRU5ubE1KMzZsR0kxeWdwWXZSWnQ5anEvaWlCL3pxNEpyaTFaZkg1WEMzaHVXT2pZY0tpcXR2emc9S0/VkpSZUFjaE5zcHVpbnI1L045anN6NitEM3dCK1ErKytVejJBNEZ6OUhSalJkMmx4SFRxUHdUZ0FxSlhjdGsrdGlTeC9WZ01hVHlRQTdWSDJzMjh6MndCU1JhUlQvZWI3S0)
---

Access to health care shouldn't depend on which state you live in.
Vermont currently has a proposed constitutional amendment (Prop 5) that, if passed by the legislature and voters in 2022, would guarantee reproductive rights to all Vermonters. I'm proud of the work Vermont is doing on this issue.
But the fact is that, even though Vermont and Texas could not be more different on this issue right now, Vermonters and Texans both deserve access to reproductive care. Where you live shouldn't determine your access to safe and legal choices.
**[That 's why I am standing up for all Americans and standing up for _Roe v. Wade_. Will you join me? Add your name right now to show your support for _Roe v. Wade_ and reproductive rights.](https://links.e.leahyforvermont.)**
Thank you for voicing your support.
Sincerely,
Patrick Leahy
U.S. Senator
[ADD YOUR NAME »](https://links.e.leahyforvermont.)
---

name: Heidi St. John for Congress
subject: Heidi St. John Responds to Trump Endorsement
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| | |
---|---
|
Friends,

For the first 200 years of America's history, congressional races were about electing a qualified person who understood and could best represent the issues of a particular congressional district. In recent years, that has changed. In many races, the focus is on building a congressional coalition for either the liberal or conservative agenda.
President Trump is understandably focused on building that coalition and on payback for weak Republican representatives like Jamie Herrera-Beutler who voted for impeachment.

Unfortunately, Mar-a-Lago is about as far away from Washington's 3rd Congressional as you can get--nearly 2700 miles. The former President neither knows nor understands the issues that are important to 3rd district voters.
I do.
While both Joe Kent and I represent a dependable vote for the America-first agenda in Washington DC, I'm the only candidate who has lived in the district, worked in the district, and been a conservative activist in the district for nearly two decades. Joe is a johnny-come-lately who is deeply tied to the beltway and a former Portland resident where he was a registered democrat.
In March 2021, when I was brand-new to this race, I participated in a forum with Joe Kent. We were asked if we would support whoever Trump endorsed. We all said we would, in good faith--because we believed each of us could represent the area well.
It has been said, "You don't know what you don't know." There was much I did not know about Mr. Kent when I said I would support him if he got Trump's endorsement. Now I know better. Joe isn't who I thought he was. He isn't from here. He is an opportunist who has a history of bending the truth and members of his campaign have launched a dishonest, dirty campaign against me, full of fake news and outright lies.

People govern how they campaign.
Joe is not the person I want representing me, my children, my grandchildren or this district, and so, I am going to stay in the race. If we want to change the way things are done in Washington DC, we need to send true representatives to speak for us.
If elected, I believe that Joe will promptly return to his beltway friends and abandon his constituents, just like Jaime Hererra-Beutler. Voters have never had a more dramatic choice. I'm running to represent our district, AND I will be a powerful voice in defending our families against the progressive agenda that is dismantling this amazing country one piece of devastating legislation at a time.
Find out how you can join me in my fight for the soul of America at heidistjohnforcongress.com.
|

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | ---|--- | Friends, For the first 200 years of America's history, congressional races were about electing a qualified person who understood and could best represent the issues of a particular congressional district. In recent years, that has changed. In many races, the focus is on building a congressional coalition for either the liberal or conservative agenda. President Trump is understandably focused on building that coalition and on payback for weak Republican representatives like Jamie Herrera-Beutler who voted for impeachment. Unfortunately, Mar-a-Lago is about as far away from Washington's 3rd Congressional as you can get--nearly 2700 miles. The former President neither knows nor understands the issues that are important to 3rd district voters. I do. While both Joe Kent and I represent a dependable vote for the America-first agenda in Washington DC, I'm the only candidate who has lived in the district, worked in the district, and been a conservative activist in the district for nearly two decades. Joe is a johnny-come-lately who is deeply tied to the beltway and a former Portland resident where he was a registered democrat. In March 2021, when I was brand-new to this race, I participated in a forum with Joe Kent. We were asked if we would support whoever Trump endorsed. We all said we would, in good faith--because we believed each of us could represent the area well. It has been said, "You don't know what you don't know." There was much I did not know about Mr. Kent when I said I would support him if he got Trump's endorsement. Now I know better. Joe isn't who I thought he was. He isn't from here. He is an opportunist who has a history of bending the truth and members of his campaign have launched a dishonest, dirty campaign against me, full of fake news and outright lies. People govern how they campaign. Joe is not the person I want representing me, my children, my grandchildren or this district, and so, I am going to stay in the race. If we want to change the way things are done in Washington DC, we need to send true representatives to speak for us. If elected, I believe that Joe will promptly return to his beltway friends and abandon his constituents, just like Jaime Hererra-Beutler. Voters have never had a more dramatic choice. I'm running to represent our district, AND I will be a powerful voice in defending our families against the progressive agenda that is dismantling this amazing country one piece of devastating legislation at a time. Find out how you can join me in my fight for the soul of America at heidistjohnforcongress.com. | | | | | | | == | | | | Upcoming Events | | | ---|--- | September 7th - Strike For School Choice 12:00 pm | OSPI Building 600 Washington St SE, Olympia, WA 98504, September 9th - Private Event September 14th - Private Event September 17th - Private Event September 22 - Washington State Republican Party Annual Dinner October 6 - Clark County Freedom Rally with Rick Green October 7 - Lewis County Freedom Rally with Rick Green | | | | == | America's Town Hall | | == | | == | | | | | == | == == | | | | | Friends of Heidi St. John for Congress | PO Box 2828, Battle Ground, WA 98604 | | Sent by mailto:info@heidistjohnforcongress.com powered by

Now, ahead of his next big rally, we’re opening up the list again \-- | | | | Now, we have to warn you: this offer won’t last forever. We can only hold your spot at the top of the Official Trump Supporter List until 11:59 PM TONIGHT. After that, we’ll need to give your spot to someone else. | Congratulations again, Peter! And please hurry! \-- Elect Republicans

name: =?utf-8?Q?Sean=20Spicer?=
subject: Biden Admin continues to spin Afghan exit...
body:
First stop of Radical Nation tour and more | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/d738d145119e/biden-admin-continues-to-spin-afghan-exit?e=f6564bbe3b)
---
| | | |
---
| | | |
---
## The Biden admin continues to spin their failure in Afghanistan...
As President Biden continues to blame President Trump for the mess that was the exit from Afghanistan, I urge you to watch this video of Biden’s own administration explaining how they were going to handle Afghanistan.
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=2d0313d107&e=f6564bbe3b)
Team Biden can’t even seem to get their talking points straight when it comes to Americans being stranded in Afghanistan.
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=e537fbc140&e=f6564bbe3b)
When President Biden says that 90% of people who wanted to leave were able, does he realize that means 10% who wanted to leave are still there, essentially stranded? When did Jen Psaki say no one is stranded? Does John Kirby think it is normal to leave Americans in countries that have been taken over by terrorists? So many questions.
| | | |
---
| | | | | | [](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=71367fa970&e=f6564bbe3b)
---
|
### Pre-Order _Radical Nation_ ...
_Radical Nation_ is one of the first comprehensive looks at the Biden administration and the leaders within it.Excited to announce the first stop on my book tour for _Radical Nation_ with the Franklin County Republicans on October 15th in Greencastle, PA. For more info and tickets click [here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=96dfdc9ab3&e=f6564bbe3b).|
---
[Pre-Order here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=4e5b04b452&e=f6564bbe3b)
---
| | | |
---
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=b75f030730&e=f6564bbe3b)
| | | |
---
## Stories I’m reading...
[Cable News Ratings Tuesday, August 31](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=07e586b972&e=f6564bbe3b) — via MediaiteThanks to everyone who has turned into Spicer & Co on Newsmax at 6p. We appreciate it, see you tonight at 6p.
|
---
[No, the decades-long decline in trust in media isn’t Trump’s fault ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=3e1b795f37&e=f6564bbe3b)— via Washington Examiner
|
---
[Newport-Mesa Unified School District, teacher under fire for social media post rejecting flag](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=92837ed13b&e=f6564bbe3b) \- via LA Times Its a weasel word/phrase to say she is “no longer in the classroom” - FIRE HER
|
---
[Mom of slain Marine protests as Facebook temporarily removes her Instagram](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=0a6c11004a&e=f6564bbe3b) \- via NY Post Big tech doesn’t like it when you criticize the Biden Administration.
| | | |
---
Last week I asked if you thought we would meet the August 31st deadline, [most people thought we would not](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=832bf39b7b&e=f6564bbe3b), but I think most people were operating under the assumption we wouldn’t leave anyone behind. Now I want to know:
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=c4563a5ef1&e=f6564bbe3b)
| | | |
---
| | | | | | [](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=fbc3cd80fd&e=f6564bbe3b)
---
|
## What I’m reading this week...
Check out this new book by Sam Sorbo. |
---
[Get a copy here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=3edd36038c&e=f6564bbe3b)

https://tinyurl.com/JoinTeamMia [https://tinyurl.com/JoinTeamMia]Dear Peter,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/89949/images/victory.png]I am deeply honored to have been chosen to serve as the next assembly member for California’s 18th Assembly District. I am filled with deep gratitude and appreciation for the support you all have shown throughout the course of this campaign.
This district is unlike any other in California. The energy, diversity, and rich culture which our community exhibits are unparalleled and set the stage for the work we will accomplish in the State Assembly. Rob and I chose to build our life here for a reason, and that’s because of the individuals who contribute their all to ensuring everyone has fair representation.
As your newly elected assembly member, I am here to affirm my commitment to you by taking the stories and lived experiences of individuals throughout AD-18 to the State Capitol in order to be YOUR voice.
In Sacramento, we will fight for more affordable housing and invest in our school systems so our students will have access to quality education. Together we will tackle the climate change crisis by replacing our current fuel with clean and sustainable energy so that our children will grow up in a thriving world. Together we will take on the systems that have kept our BIPOC communities down and fight to build a new system where true justice will be served. This is our time to shine a light on what needs to be fixed – and we will do it together.
The strength of this campaign rested solely on the power of the people. None of this would have been possible with you. This victory belongs to every voter, canvasser, phone banker, and text banker. This victory belongs to every child, single parent, and working family. This victory is, in fact, our victory, and I want to say thank you from the bottom of my heart. You all are my inspiration and my motivation that I will take to Sacramento each and every day.
I’m ready to serve as Assemblymember because I have you all, my community, guiding me every step of the way.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/89949/images/thanks.jpg]Thank you always,
Mia Bonta
Assemblymember District 18
Paid for by Mia Bonta for Assembly 2021, FPPC# 1437973
1241 High St, Oakland, CA 94601 | 415-891-9751 | volunteer@miabonta.comhttps://www.facebook.com/miabonta [https://www.facebook.com/miabonta] https://twitter.com/MiaBonta [https://twitter.com/MiaBonta] https://instagram.com/mia.bonta [https://instagram.com/mia.bonta] https://www.linkedin.com/in/mialisabonta/ [https://www.linkedin.com/in/mialisabonta/]

name: Kevin Kiley
subject: AB 1102
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Governor 2021 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
body:
|
---
Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [The Final 10 Days](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziormZCQAB6F9AUAqQMgCVCUazfGTmJPDsFbVLCWrSj1-uA&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_sept_2&n=1) Newsom has raised $65 million against the Recall, mostly from lobbyists like his French Laundry tablemates. They wine him, they dine him. They elect him, they own him. By contrast, we’ve run the first major campaign for Governor in modern California history that is 100-percent citizen backed. Newsom, to be fair, did just receive one contribution from an actual person: George Soros chipped in $1 million. Meanwhile, the Legislature adjourns for the year a few days before the election. Our victory over AB 455 will be short-lived if we don’t elect a Governor who respects the Constitution. As to AB 1102, we’re still waiting for the new bill to appear in print. We’ve also just learned Newsom's attacks on religious liberty – which were struck down 5 times by the Supreme Court – will cost taxpayers millions in attorney fees. If I'm elected, worship and fellowship will be beyond the reach of any bureaucrat. But if Newsom survives, the abuses are sure to continue. Legislation is even planned to effectively abolish recalls. So another message for undecided voters: vote yes if you support this recall or if you could ever see yourself supporting a future recall. [Support our Get Out The Vote efforts for the final 10 days](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7PyukeanaPVVByy4cGnphLXxOEH1CWIcHtuMj2-9EAmrlzX4&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_sept_2&n=2) [Attend an event over Labor Day Weekend](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQzioq0A5ZW0oB7-89p0PKwCTilADXHPIO_Hx4k1oD6gAI3Kw&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_sept_2&n=3) [Share this post on Facebook](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6lpHI-UVcODcFSdMgu5zpAxipLtjB2OPYTgJfjVZuR3PKIOW8LIbVp4MIEdr2ojHfQ&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_sept_2&n=4) Kevin Kiley
