clean_body: | Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: Newsom has raised $65 million against the Recall, mostly from lobbyists like his French Laundry tablemates. They wine him, they dine him. They elect him, they own him. By contrast, we’ve run the first major campaign for Governor in modern California history that is 100-percent citizen backed. Newsom, to be fair, did just receive one contribution from an actual person: George Soros chipped in $1 million. Meanwhile, the Legislature adjourns for the year a few days before the election. Our victory over AB 455 will be short-lived if we don’t elect a Governor who respects the Constitution. As to AB 1102, we’re still waiting for the new bill to appear in print. We’ve also just learned Newsom's attacks on religious liberty – which were struck down 5 times by the Supreme Court – will cost taxpayers millions in attorney fees. If I'm elected, worship and fellowship will be beyond the reach of any bureaucrat. But if Newsom survives, the abuses are sure to continue. Legislation is even planned to effectively abolish recalls. So another message for undecided voters: vote yes if you support this recall or if you could ever see yourself supporting a future recall. Kevin Kiley Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Governor 2021 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: humbly asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | | [](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/V4_GFa9_E0h_)
I'm coming to you with the most important request I've ever made.

In 2020, we defended my House Majority, gained our Senate Majority, defeated Donald Trump, and put Joe Biden and Kamala Harris in the White House.

**[But now, my House Majority is facing a historically slim margin and a surge of momentum from Trump's fringe, right-wing cronies, and I need you to step up to protect our House Democrats and become a founding Majority Maker.](https://links.e.dccc.)**

Majority Makers are Democrats who give recurring monthly contributions of $3, $10, or even $25, because they know that in 2022, there's even more at stake, and we can't afford to lose to Trump and his House Republicans.

Majority Makers will receive exclusive updates about the state of our races and opportunities to hear directly from me and other Democratic leaders.

**[And because the situation is so dire, I'm personally inviting you to be one of the first 1,500 founding donors by making a recurring $3 donation before midnight. My team will rush you this personalized member card in the mail when you join today.](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/p28-cvLW6Xh~)** | [](https://links.e.dccc.)
NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com
MAJORITY MAKER STATUS: PENDING
[Suggested Support: $3](https://links.e.dccc.)
---

**Here 's the reality: Defeating Trump didn't send him and his Republicans home.** They're determined to do anything they can to retake power. And Trump's road to the White House starts with destroying my House Majority.

Under no circumstances can we let that happen.

Because when Trump and his Republicans tried to destroy the Affordable Care Act...

_Our Democrats expanded access for millions._

When Trump and his Republicans tried to ban immigrants, attack the LGBTQ+ community, and threaten women's rights...

_Our Democrats fought to make America a safe place for everyone. _

And when President Trump and his Republicans attacked the right to vote, tried to overturn the 2020 election, and even incited a deadly insurrection...

_Our Democrats fought to protect our vote, tell the truth, and save our democratic institutions._

We cannot let Trump and his Republicans take back the House -- at any cost.

**Everything 's at stake and I need your help to defend my Democrats and my House Majority. So I'm opening up founding donor contributions to the first 1,500 grassroots Democrats who chip in a recurring monthly $3 contribution to become Majority Makers.**

**[At the most critical time since the end of Trump's presidency, I'm asking you: Will you sit back or will you step up and give a $3 recurring contribution to become a founding Majority Maker to protect our House Majority?](https://links.e.dccc.)**

| [**Chip in $1 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.)
---
| [**Chip in $5 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.)
---
| [**Chip in $10 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Z6_Zc-)
---
| [**Chip in $15 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Ra_Vfxw_)
---
| [**Chip in $25 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.)
---
| [**Or chip in another amount >> **](https://links.e.dccc.)
---

Thanks for your critical support,

Nancy
---

Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc.org/contact/) | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
---

This message was sent to: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates) | If you'd like to sign up for emails in a different account, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates).

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45560863&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjA4MDQ5Mzg5MAS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45560863&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjA4MDQ5Mzg5MAS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.

Democratic turnout in the 2020 Election was historic!

[**_Securing the White House and our Democratic majorities would not have been possible without the *over* 65 million people who voted by mail._**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkK8aWz8yXSg3LN-xzub5hSboeMa3xKazc6NF4Chny62T2rZoP0iNs4ekARhdDHMGZryoh2oUnx0w7W8jnA7yPCoxfXBRr22QmV8qHdFZlRwu4E7bmKNF8X28qkCCH1Ka4CCmnlXzkfaBF_8LeqTmbRXerQIXkZ1FKdwIfd4DWlj6SDkg_8tT6u8NM_j_WHH5QSujT3verueAz2rIXrjAy5I4A86kMTX4lt857Q26g6vUcCXDiOCFxpqMXfQUEviV9hMozYQx52Jke9RWw_PzK9fJy-TzppeWnGLA5XRrRWOWXiXLmaKfY-oAEY6CxmK9A/3ez/wH8T9YHfTy6G2Itu5DysMQ/h8/2ayQPwWs7dko5HUeJAl6--w4DS7HLsUnrqv3X-qZ708)

[Unfortunately, far-right Republicans are scaling back mail-in voting to make sure Democrats LOSE our Majorities in the next election.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkK8aWz8yXSg3LN-xzub5hSboeMa3xKazc6NF4Chny62T2rZoP0iNs4ekARhdDHMGZryoh2oUnx0w7W8jnA7yPCoxfXBRr22QmV8qHdFZlRwu4E7bmKNF8X28qkCCH1Ka4CCmnlXzkfaBF_8LeqTmbRTZJIv-HvzLQWjHx8F9k8etd_Mr5l9W9nDo3Hr4sgm6v-Gke8t6UTQsuXjwD33DkNpckD7n69cOr63dEOcV1_ird9UBXgaqmAoiQbpgif7SCq6aKkcJAf4i-iDwIc4dR-9hbJFQJONlco34TNDq8jhismmMS9ZmgdgYjgvNXO3cW3DSEaA5CQdYWnfsBZ29P1/3ez/wH8T9YHfTy6G2Itu5DysMQ/h9/A4edukh5f9AmBgUw9UT_2kfkfRGAg3NvBRb0fILTPuE)

_We have to start fighting NOW to save mail-in voting if we want to protect voting rights for generations to come._

[So we need to know if Democrats like you plan on voting by mail.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkK8aWz8yXSg3LN-xzub5hSboeMa3xKazc6NF4Chny62T2rZoP0iNs4ekARhdDHMGZryoh2oUnx0w7W8jnA7yPCoxfXBRr22QmV8qHdFZlRwu4E7bmKNF8X28qkCCH1Ka4CCmnlXzkfaBF_8LeqTmbRZlIb4quKqObYRfCg6VekPpxfz2Y4EhapyoeuKNltxpsFwSeqS5SWw6ZvDxug2GsMz6sT8BCI1ai9gbJ2IC5UNSoceJHnXqmEuOw87Qg_lgQRvA_CjToFQ-YHK9olDY-hQgwQ2nnyN2rcFQYwVIQg8xZ014r7WXai4nPwYkBDCnMr7kaqtfqQo_ROY_PKoJ0-/3ez/wH8T9YHfTy6G2Itu5DysMQ/h10/MiznqavLQc1Lh4sEaBzcubbX0lqaoyUb2FpNfmks5cs)
